clean_body: Are you planning on helping out? | Hello Peter, There’s one Senate seat left to be called, and our last chance to flip a seat red this year is less than one week away. Less than one week away — do you realize what this means? We have just a handful of days to gather all the remaining support we can to flip Georgia red. | Time is running out to secure Georgia. Without your help, this runoff election will be difficult to win. If we receive your support, we can lock in one last ad campaign to get Patriots out to the polls and make sure they vote for Herschel Walker on December 6th. Your continued support of Republicans does not go unnoticed. Thanks to freedom-loving Americans like you, we were able to take back the House. Thanks to you, we still have a chance at taking back Georgia. Sincerely, Senate GOP Alerts Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright (C) 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Quentin Wathum-Ocama, YDA
subject: Herschel Walker is unfit for office.
body:
Young Georgians need you! | Hey folks, I wanted to get this in front of you again since we are less than a week away from the Georgia Runoff. We are working hard to re-elect Reverend Warnock as you saw below and we would greatly appreciate your ongoing support for our efforts. [We can't let Herschel Walker be in the Senate. ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zNra5tIr9qXBOFThEXgvzdEIjenHbjYHoJrelfzIM04NGVRzDeGDOSH6hzpalb8nvaI22aJ5BUoymT8hgNaJCHhsbRhvrnpfoqYfff-GwhPbftDiPcYotpEmFDGbSO_N21E-xXvRQnYstYr--XyxdVZKZEAb6r_EeXfnHauBmyNzmpk6gWZkoGWWPOczh_4jWUiVpIw4PvAob-6wImvs2hI9lRY-QnWkeS3H3tIV6uAYHGzRsEnNzez9sH5SE9BuHPHPBIqOOnLIcuEexhSABJpO1GuPArj-LHet89zAFv3w6lIlGsWmG2i7D-LLa1r2cD3lk7mfQqoGVYWxNDxnZ6/3rn/BXXzcQpORQGOuXvij_-Kzw/h0/Zp7nhxQEfjFMM7EVyL0azul5qNi20RvYcd3G4U4LI7s)

So much rides on this runoff next Tuesday. A 51-49 Senate means no power sharing agreement with the Republicans and means we have full control of the committees. It means fewer arbitrary tie breaking votes having to be made by the Vice President. It also means we won't have to rely so heavily on a certain duo from West Virginia and Arizona every vote. That seems like a pretty good deal to me. **We can't afford Walker. We need Warnock.** [Can you give just $50 right now to get us to our goal before midnight tonight? We only have less than $1200 to go and only 12 people need to give $100 to help us beat our mark. Can you be one of them?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zNra5tIr9qXBOFThEXgvzdEIjenHbjYHoJrelfzIM04NGVRzDeGDOSH6hzpalb8nuvh00EvX85TA3tn0Zr8eP3yn1XLlEKEg61v-3FanrVgrzO0UKuAPZMTOUOeHGf8pIrXHQ4SppMTL3_6UdxPdpFwx8tABRIjHF7t0DuLAa6Q68d88aYoWz34UFEOnYDaVzJefDnGgj09nMzZczOCsdWBkcp6z9Mrcxwt9z_TctpEQG50c9qcTwQqC8mD55lyiTccuoexTC1UjzQ-BNFTGctGy8xAwr51yyEs5uOmIshqlZyVLSf1PtqI16qRDrKj2zf8eTwXO_TqDXjenSQQBDn/3rn/BXXzcQpORQGOuXvij_-Kzw/h2/Tba-mp-G_2F8LrYBO6cH4eSeppPTBWRcNQmiVcT02NY)

clean_body: Young Georgians need you! | Hey folks, I wanted to get this in front of you again since we are less than a week away from the Georgia Runoff. We are working hard to re-elect Reverend Warnock as you saw below and we would greatly appreciate your ongoing support for our efforts. | So much rides on this runoff next Tuesday. A 51-49 Senate means no power sharing agreement with the Republicans and means we have full control of the committees. It means fewer arbitrary tie breaking votes having to be made by the Vice President. It also means we won't have to rely so heavily on a certain duo from West Virginia and Arizona every vote. That seems like a pretty good deal to me. We can't afford Walker. We need Warnock. Respectfully, Quentin Wathum-Ocama YDA, President -\--------- Forwarded message --------- From: The Young Democrats <info@yda.org> Date: December 01, 2022 at 1:21 PM EDT Subject: FW: Herschel Walker is unfit for office. | Derek- Since filing to run for Senate: ** He’s pulled out a fake badge while claiming to be a Law Enforcement Agent while claiming Reverend Warnock is anti-police. He’s filed tax exemptions for his home in Texas as a primary residence while claiming he lives in Georgia. He’s had numerous allegations have been lodged Walker for paying for abortions while he runs on an anti-abortion platform, and now allegations of domestic abuse. He’s had his own family turn his back on him, while running to “promote family values.” Herschel Walker cannot be elected to the US Senate. We know that Senator Warnock is the best and the only option for the US Senate in Georgia. He has worked tirelessly for us in the US Senate since his special election in 2020. Now we will work as hard as we can for as long as we can to re-elect him to that seat because Young Georgians cannot afford Herschel Walker. We are all in on Georgia until December 6th. Keep fighting the good fight. Onward, YDA | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. name: Sen. Raphael Warnock (via Democrats.org)
subject: I'm personally asking: Will you split $10 or more right now between my campaign and the DNC?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
With time running out before this critical election, I’m counting on you to step up. | |
---
Derek -- I'm fired up. Early voting is underway for our runoff election here in Georgia. Our team is on the ground right now knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority. But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling millions of dollars into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads to help elect Herschel Walker. **I'm worried that if we don't fight back, we could get outspent and drowned out right as voters head to the polls.** **That's why we need the resources to spread our pro-Georgia message to voters in this final stretch and win.** But with time running out before this critical election, I’m counting on you to step up. **I'm personally asking: Will you split $10 or more right now between my campaign and the DNC to help reach more voters, keep Georgia blue, and elect Democrats nationwide?**

clean_body: With time running out before this critical election, I’m counting on you to step up. | | Derek -- I'm fired up. Early voting is underway for our runoff election here in Georgia. Our team is on the ground right now knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority. But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling millions of dollars into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads to help elect Herschel Walker. I'm worried that if we don't fight back, we could get outspent and drowned out right as voters head to the polls. That's why we need the resources to spread our pro-Georgia message to voters in this final stretch and win. But with time running out before this critical election, I’m counting on you to step up. I'm personally asking: Will you split $10 or more right now between my campaign and the DNC to help reach more voters, keep Georgia blue, and elect Democrats nationwide? I'm deeply appreciative of you, Derek -- today and every day. Let's go win this thing! Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. name: Jim Jordan
subject: THE last uncalled Senate race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The Senate needs Herschel’s vote to stop Dems from doing their darndest. You need him so we can keep America great. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5a0128c885254aeea68fe4749df1e47a&_e=yv_cyFrjokw8FGCyS0eTJ9Vh4V38xG92nbcVIVdoZa86PnNKjSnStJSte1vcz_gTrVaQooMMftD90-kAIDtX5LpeudElDMGsJmnJLquRMbfkO_NAx7jtWyyEJVsfWL37agNflYHiODBnOIcMgKEks5T2_XQ626wrnSYjmuKnA1xk3QLcI1E8Y5_4MQOlyNL6297-nDXNxOBaPB7Aw2d4ABs65lZ9VA-7DE_ksPjTL5yji1Y_F2umF8GCDxEFEGBGz39ofy3s8W7p74doImvqoM979sSA47J083DGrsyLFhbjiJurUxAcLsMykBxSMfLTh9m4ZZHNxsPJmS45cNxR1035r6nzYTxMVqvyAkpj83t6N2djJ3LqpIsMuUs1LuulkSrd7KMYbjG2qp0qf7fsoPFc3Q8f6cIdE9JvemzOMlgo-N0T1oBdGXhbZKYyRcJAcKJmy8exlOFiN_cqKqCpKw%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

By now you know Herschel Walker is in the fight of his life. He's gearing up to face off against the socialist Democrat, Raphael Warnock, in a December 6th Senate runoff that will determine the extent to which Democrats have control over the Senate.

I think a lot of folks, yourself included perhaps, may be thinking that this race isn't important given that Democrats have 50 votes plus Kamala Harris' tie-breaking vote - effectively giving them control of the Senate. If you're in this mindset, then you're the audience I'm hoping to reach today. This race isn't over, and it would be extremely bad form to leave Herschel Walker on the field, alone, in the final hours of his race.

Disclaimer: **[At the end of this email, I'm going to ask you to chip-in $5 to help keep Herschel's campaign funded through December 6th.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5a0128c885254aeea68fe4749df1e47a&_e=yv_cyFrjokw8FGCyS0eTJ9Vh4V38xG92nbcVIVdoZa86PnNKjSnStJSte1vcz_gTrVaQooMMftD90-kAIDtX5LpeudElDMGsJmnJLquRMbfkO_NAx7jtWyyEJVsfWL37agNflYHiODBnOIcMgKEks5T2_XQ626wrnSYjmuKnA1xk3QLcI1E8Y5_4MQOlyNL6297-nDXNxOBaPB7Aw2d4ABs65lZ9VA-7DE_ksPjTL5yji1Y_F2umF8GCDxEFEGBGz39ofy3s8W7p74doImvqoM979sSA47J083DGrsyLFhbjiJurUxAcLsMykBxSMfLTMkFcIfqmptjvYAFXBsoq1UzU0Gdly7gjrp5Rlj550D2cFzjJ_2NQRYNE55MybhE9vyRCOODBi7CxfxzyMf485yo-t41fI5j3qun8hemTIlCWSIAOvpuneouazf8-byV51Y_jmmAXLdJ2fQ2dnKjc3Q%3D%3D)** But first, I'm going to give you five reasons why your donation is needed now more than ever.
1. **_Absences_** : Absences in the Senate happen from time to time, due to health reasons or otherwise. If we can get Herschel elected, Republicans and Dems will each have 50 seats - leaving Democrats with no margin for error. If a Democrat is out sick with the flu and cannot vote, Dems cannot pass legislation. **If Herschel loses, Dems have a cushion.**
2. **_2024_** : The 2024 map for Democrats is tough. If Herschel wins on December 6th, Republicans start the 2024 cycle from a position of strength. If we have 50 seats going into 2024, we can devote even more resources to West Virginia and Montana (**both deep red states**) where Democrat senators will be seeking reelection.

[** CHIP in $5 ->**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5a0128c885254aeea68fe4749df1e47a&_e=yv_cyFrjokw8FGCyS0eTJ9Vh4V38xG92nbcVIVdoZa86PnNKjSnStJSte1vcz_gTrVaQooMMftD90-kAIDtX5LpeudElDMGsJmnJLquRMbfkO_NAx7jtWyyEJVsfWL37agNflYHiODBnOIcMgKEks5T2_XQ626wrnSYjmuKnA1xk3QLcI1E8Y5_4MQOlyNL6297-nDXNxOBaPB7Aw2d4ABs65lZ9VA-7DE_ksPjTL5yji1Y_F2umF8GCDxEFEGBGz39ofy3s8W7p74doImvqoM979sSA47J083DGrsyLFhbPC5kcaiNfWrLlhxyHu7_vJuOGzIRAS0O5gvFFV4e6BVyeNQwRMQzD_6JxZcUP6BP4naSoXC3Wutycxi5rLj_Z4UjZDY2UuNZNFl5R1jvF35AEXlFQwNudTHu-4eETgktUsygx6fJE1nGYJG3rlXhtEq9NeVaOZr1npSSpiag_4TOgyhrOD7sYnOq6NAHETgI%3D)

3. **_Judges_** : With a 50/50 Senate, the Senate Judiciary Committee will have equal numbers of Republicans and Democrats - allowing us to force Democrats to only consider the most consequential nominations. **If Warnock wins, Democrats can confirm anyone they want.**
4. **_Federal nominations:_** With a 50/50 Senate, Republicans will have leverage over who can win confirmation to lead federal agencies. With a 50/50 Senate, we'll get less Elizabeth Warren-type nominees and more “level-headed” options to give the thumbs up or thumbs down to.
5. **_6 years:_** If Herschel Walker wins on December 6th, he'll serve for the next 6 years. If we don't get Herschel over the line, **it could have an impact on who controls the Senate for the next 6 years.** If we're at 49/51, it will be that much harder to win back the Senate in 2024 and retain it in 2026 and 2028.

**We simply cannot afford to lose this race.** We all hoped for a different outcome on November 8th. clean_body: The Senate needs Herschel’s vote to stop Dems from doing their darndest. You need him so we can keep America great. | Fellow American, By now you know Herschel Walker is in the fight of his life. He's gearing up to face off against the socialist Democrat, Raphael Warnock, in a December 6th Senate runoff that will determine the extent to which Democrats have control over the Senate. I think a lot of folks, yourself included perhaps, may be thinking that this race isn't important given that Democrats have 50 votes plus Kamala Harris' tie-breaking vote - effectively giving them control of the Senate. If you're in this mindset, then you're the audience I'm hoping to reach today. This race isn't over, and it would be extremely bad form to leave Herschel Walker on the field, alone, in the final hours of his race. Disclaimer: But first, I'm going to give you five reasons why your donation is needed now more than ever. 1. Absences : Absences in the Senate happen from time to time, due to health reasons or otherwise. If we can get Herschel elected, Republicans and Dems will each have 50 seats - leaving Democrats with no margin for error. If a Democrat is out sick with the flu and cannot vote, Dems cannot pass legislation. If Herschel loses, Dems have a cushion. 2. 2024 : The 2024 map for Democrats is tough. If Herschel wins on December 6th, Republicans start the 2024 cycle from a position of strength. If we have 50 seats going into 2024, we can devote even more resources to West Virginia and Montana (both deep red states) where Democrat senators will be seeking reelection. 3. Judges : With a 50/50 Senate, the Senate Judiciary Committee will have equal numbers of Republicans and Democrats - allowing us to force Democrats to only consider the most consequential nominations. If Warnock wins, Democrats can confirm anyone they want. 4. Federal nominations: With a 50/50 Senate, Republicans will have leverage over who can win confirmation to lead federal agencies. With a 50/50 Senate, we'll get less Elizabeth Warren-type nominees and more “level-headed” options to give the thumbs up or thumbs down to. 5. 6 years: If Herschel Walker wins on December 6th, he'll serve for the next 6 years. If we don't get Herschel over the line, it could have an impact on who controls the Senate for the next 6 years. If we're at 49/51, it will be that much harder to win back the Senate in 2024 and retain it in 2026 and 2028. We simply cannot afford to lose this race. We all hoped for a different outcome on November 8th. But wishing for a different outcome while we still have a chance on December 6th would be foolhardy. I want Herschel to win. The Senate needs Herschel's vote to stop Democrats from doing their darndest. You need him so we can keep America great. Thanks, Jim Jordan | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: ONE WEEK AWAY!
body:
| [](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20221208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_invite_4&n=1) Peter -- I'm excited to announce the guest speaker we have for our December 8th Christmas event. If you're like me, you're sick and tired of the lies about COVID and the experimental jab coming from the mouths of the corporate media and the Medical Industrial Complex. That's why I'm bringing in a medical doctor who is unafraid to go against the approved talking points, and tell you what the science has to say.
## I'm happy to announce Dr. Neil Shah as our guest speaker!
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20221208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_invite_4&n=2) Dr. Shah is a Mayo trained medical doctor who has built an impressive and ever-growing privately owned medical practice in Minnesota. He's not afraid to speak his mind, even when it goes against the mainstream narrative on COVID and the experimental jab. Dr. Shah is well researched, articulate and has a wide grasp on medicine. But he doesn't like what he's seeing from his colleagues in the medical profession. COVID brought forward the "Death of Science!" **Joining me also on stage for the evening will be Medical Freedom champion Mark Bishofsky. Mark ran the massive "Stop the Mandate" rallies in Minnesota that activated tens of thousands of Minnesotans to stand up for health freedom.** And since we exercise our 2nd Amendment rights at Action 4 Liberty, we'll be **giving away a non-Biden approved AR-15!!!** No raffles - just buy a ticket for dinner and you are automatically entered to win! I want to spend the evening with you on December 8th and tell you about what we plan to do in 2023 to Stop the Radical Liberal agenda in Minnesota. We have a BIG fight ahead of us!!! Tickets are $60 per person, or $120 for a couple. We have special kids rates as well. Dinner included! **Want to make a bigger impact??? Reserve a table for $1,000 and invite 7 friends to hear our important message.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20221208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_invite_4&n=3 "REGISTER NOW") [REGISTER NOW](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20221208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_invite_4&n=3)
---
Also, I've invited **Senator-elect Nathan Wesenberg** to share his story about how he overcame the Political Establishment and won a seat in the Minnesota Senate!
I'm excited to meet with you on December 8th and introduce you to our leadership team and our growing team of young liberty professionals.
So come spend a night with us, Dr. Neil Shah, Mark Bishofsky and Nathan Wesenberg and automatically be entered into a drawing to win an AR-15!
See you on Dec 8th!

Jake Duesenberg
[](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_invite_4&n=4)[](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_invite_4&n=5)[http://www.action4liberty.com/](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_invite_4&n=6)
-=-=- Action 4 Liberty · 1920 Oakcrest Ave, 5, Roseville, MN 55042, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_invite_4&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_invite_4&n=8). -=-=-
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_invite_4&n=9), software for leaders.

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I was just on stage with President Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC

| **Peter, President Obama and I just stepped off the rally stage here in Georgia. It's an honor to have him by our side at this pivotal moment.** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55422970/381638981/-1345694891?amount=10&refcode=UD_20221201_EMSPL_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyMjM1NmJlLWRlNzEtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_yAPlfxuQm_eLCNCaBblX0x_o9EV9KDOKdTQeKLau3Q=) If you didn't get a chance to join our rally, here's what you need to know: **In 5 days, we're going to win this runoff election and keep Georgia blue.**

But here’s the thing: Republicans know this, and they’re afraid. We narrowly led Herschel Walker in the general election – so now the GOP is flooding this race with more than $58 million to help Walker take the lead in these final days.

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Georgians are heading to the polls:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | I'm fired up!

Early voting is underway for our runoff election here in Georgia. Our team is on the ground right now – knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help us keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority.

But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling over $50 million into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads and elect Herschel Walker. **I'm worried that if we don't fight back ASAP, we could get outspent and drowned out right as voters head to the polls.**

**That's why we set an ambitious $2 million fundraising goal – so we have the resources we need to spread our pro-Georgia message to voters in this final stretch and win.** But with time running out before this critical deadline, we're not on track to reach our goal.

**[So, I'm personally asking: Will you split $5 or more right now between me and the DSCC to help us hit our final goal, fight for a Democratic Senate, and keep Georgia blue?](https://go.dscc.org/go/5319?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20221201-RaphaelWarnock-EarlyVoteFRTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20221201-RaphaelWarnock-EarlyVoteFRTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=9079%2E9716520%2EwgSG6D)**

subject: I was just on stage with President Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
**Friend, President Obama and I just stepped off the rally stage here in Georgia.** It's an honor to have him by our side at this pivotal moment.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55423180/381641926/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5232-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDM0NTI4Yi1lMTcxLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dDSOP7YiwMroQTHdBDZfBihM4-MHeG8hHBTvTn0NdJs=)
If you didn't get a chance to join our rally, here's what you need to know: **In five days, we're going to win this runoff election and keep Georgia blue.**
But here’s the thing: Republicans know this, and they’re afraid. We narrowly led Herschel Walker in the general election – so now the GOP is flooding this race with more than $58 million to help Walker take the lead in these final days.
They won’t hold back, and neither can we. That’s why I urgently need your support to help hit our critical Rally Day goal before midnight tonight.
**Friend, I’m asking for the last time:[Will you please donate $5 – or whatever you can right now – so we can win in Georgia and expand our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55423181/381641927/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5232-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDM0NTI4Yi1lMTcxLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dDSOP7YiwMroQTHdBDZfBihM4-MHeG8hHBTvTn0NdJs=)**
Thank you so much for all you do, friend.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: U.S. Funds Workshops in India to Counter Stigma, Prejudice in Transgender Community
body:
Though years ago India passed a sweeping law giving transgender
people rights—and prohibiting discrimination in education,
employment, and healthcare—the Biden administration is spending
American taxpayer dollars to counter stigma and prejudice against the
transgender community in the south Asian nation with the world’s
largest democracy.

[alt_text]

[*****]
December 01, 2022

clean_body: If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority. | Fellow American, Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today. Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American. Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff! If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Leave It All On The Playing Field ✅
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
Don't give up
|
---
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007558:JUFmI2GPN:m:1:3331421248:ED379355EB915AE65CC34A6E0DF44CB2:r) Peter, when we started this Senate campaign, the so-called experts said I didn't have a prayer.

Now, we've forced Senator Warnock into a winner-take-all runoff, and it's all thanks to patriots like you.

I'm writing to thank you for getting me this far. I'm also asking you to stay on the field as this race goes into overtime.

Democrats came out on top two years ago when Georgia went to a runoff.

They unleashed a flood of outsider money to drown out local voices and swing Georgia into the blue column. The result has been two years of unchecked liberal dominance in Washington.

We can't let that happen again this year. However, we spent every last dollar we had to get this far.

Peter, we've got to get multiple ads on the air and mobilize our grassroots army. These things cost money that we simply don't have.

With nearly 90% of his campaign war chest coming from outside Georgia, Senator Warnock has virtually limitless resources.

So I'm coming directly to you and asking: will you chip in $5 right now to help us win in overtime?

---
| | [STAY ON THE FIELD FOR OVERTIME](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007558:JUFmI2GPN:m:1:3331421248:ED379355EB915AE65CC34A6E0DF44CB2:r)
---

Thanks so much,

Herschel Walker

---
|

name: Leader Kevin McCarthy
subject: Re: Nancy Pelosi’s last days in power ➡
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
It's absolutely critical that we...

| |
---
| | |
---

Peter,

This is GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy.

Nancy Pelosi is finally being forced out of power, thanks to you. I, more than anyone, want to sit back, dust my hands off, and admire what we've accomplished. Ever since the 2020 election, I've been working around the clock non-stop to fire Pelosi once and for all. That day is _almost_ here.

Pelosi will hand over the Speaker's gavel in January, but until then, she still has a grip on Congress. Our newly-elected recruits aren't sworn in yet, and Pelosi knows she has nothing to lose, now that we've defeated her in the election. That makes her and her leftist followers bolder than they've ever been.

---
| | [BOLSTER GOP DEFENSES](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007576:JjDuI2GeN:m:1:3317145305:4CAC2B876A88A24E40ABB1331DC10101:r)
---
| | [RUSH EMERGENCY SUPPORT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007576:JjDuI2GeN:m:1:3317145305:4CAC2B876A88A24E40ABB1331DC10101:r)
---

We have reason to believe the Democrats are going to try and push through the most radical bills they can before we officially take over the House January 3rd. That means we need all hands on deck to run through the finish line and block their last ditch effort, once and for all.

Peter, our war chests are EMPTY after a bruising election season - we're defenseless. Please, would you consider sparing a few bucks to ensure that we can hold off the Democrats' final charge against our freedoms? We're still nearly $11,000 short of our goal, but I've been assured that if everyone reading this chips in, we should be able to make due for this pivotal deadline.

---
| | [BOLSTER GOP DEFENSES](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007576:JjDuI2GeN:m:1:3317145305:4CAC2B876A88A24E40ABB1331DC10101:r)
---
| | [RUSH EMERGENCY SUPPORT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007576:JjDuI2GeN:m:1:3317145305:4CAC2B876A88A24E40ABB1331DC10101:r)
---

Thank you,
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007576:JjDuI2GeN:m:1:3317145305:4CAC2B876A88A24E40ABB1331DC10101:r)
---
Leader Kevin McCarthy
---
| |

|

---

✅ Secure the Border

---

**ARE YOU IN?**

name: Jessi Melton, Parental Rights Advocate
subject: Child predators now sit on school boards
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007579:JP6RI2GNa:m:1:3317145305:F1DB42347BACE132316F788F0237F496:r)
Peter,

Earlier this year, a Florida school board in Tampa allowed books with instructive **explicit** gay sexual content in _middle schools_.

After this book was brought to parents' attention, many formally requested its removal. Still, the **school committee voted to keep this book even though it provides 'age 11 to 13-year-olds' with explicit instructions on anal sex and gay hookup apps.**

Let me introduce myself. My name is Jessi Melton, President of the Parents Union of America (PUOA).

I'm working with candidates and organizations right now to remove these perverse school board members and have them investigated for attempting to groom American children.

That's why we're raising $25,000 by the end of the month to go after these predatory school boards.

[_**Can you help protect America 's children with a gift of any amount? Click here to send your support >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007579:JP6RI2GNa:m:1:3317145305:F1DB42347BACE132316F788F0237F496:r)

One particular book,_This Book is Gay_ , includes:
* Instructions to young boys on performing anal and oral sex
* How to use a predatory homosexual hook-up app called Grindr
* A section called "Boy-on-Boy Sex" contains cartoon sketches of a full-grown naked man with facial and pubic hair.

_**[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007579:JP6RI2GNa:m:1:3317145305:F1DB42347BACE132316F788F0237F496:r)**_

_This Book is Gay_ is just one of the dozens of books available to middle school students that exposes them to lurid sexual material.

[_**Your urgent gift towards our efforts to remove these school board members.**__**Click here to protect our children**_ _** >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007579:JP6RI2GNa:m:1:3317145305:F1DB42347BACE132316F788F0237F496:r)

**Parents Union of America is actively electing conservative school board members in the largest school districts, and Tampa Bay is at the top of our list.**

Our mission is to fully restore traditional American values into our public school system, with God at the center of learning.

PUOA only assists candidates who display the ability and willingness to fight for our values by going on the offensive in defense of our children.

We are focusing on the most populous school districts. Then we will continue to expand throughout the United States...state by state, county to county.

We're fighting for parents and children to take back public schools. Peter, I know this is a lot to ask, but America's children are in danger.

**Can you help PUOA reach our goal by sending your urgent gift today? Click below.**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007580:JP6RI2GNa:m:1:3317145305:F1DB42347BACE132316F788F0237F496:r)

clean_body: Peter, Earlier this year, a Florida school board in Tampa allowed books with instructive explicit gay sexual content in middle schools. After this book was brought to parents' attention, many formally requested its removal. Still, the school committee voted to keep this book even though it provides 'age 11 to 13-year-olds' with explicit instructions on anal sex and gay hookup apps. Let me introduce myself. My name is Jessi Melton, President of the Parents Union of America (PUOA). I'm working with candidates and organizations right now to remove these perverse school board members and have them investigated for attempting to groom American children. That's why we're raising $25,000 by the end of the month to go after these predatory school boards. One particular book,This Book is Gay , includes: Instructions to young boys on performing anal and oral sex How to use a predatory homosexual hook-up app called Grindr A section called "Boy-on-Boy Sex" contains cartoon sketches of a full-grown naked man with facial and pubic hair. This Book is Gay is just one of the dozens of books available to middle school students that exposes them to lurid sexual material. Parents Union of America is actively electing conservative school board members in the largest school districts, and Tampa Bay is at the top of our list. Our mission is to fully restore traditional American values into our public school system, with God at the center of learning. PUOA only assists candidates who display the ability and willingness to fight for our values by going on the offensive in defense of our children. We are focusing on the most populous school districts. Then we will continue to expand throughout the United States...state by state, county to county. We're fighting for parents and children to take back public schools. Peter, I know this is a lot to ask, but America's children are in danger. Can you help PUOA reach our goal by sending your urgent gift today? Click below.** Thank you for fighting to protect our children. Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn9nnkacska15vi3n7sbuj027dagvmch0cg9ff3g_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjjm1o72cth2bs)**_

All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zao2nqoj7d0b933fsepjb2as2mnhlll592bc2168_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjjm1o72cth2bs)**

body:

---

Hey Friend, this is Nikki Haley. Republicans have taken back the House and nearly took control of the Senate. But there's still one race left in 2022: Herschel Walker's runoff election in Georgia. It's 4th, and goal from the one-yard-line, and Herschel Walker has the ball. We need you up there blocking for him to get him into the end zone.

---
| | | [GET HERSCHEL INTO THE END ZONE: FLIP THIS SEAT](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zel0nsmse8c6bqao1itjgoej9upjslb43vav6mio_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjjm1o71c1h2bs)
---

The Georgia runoff is less than one week away, and the Left is already lining up its best players to defend against our conservative rush. \- Chuck Schumer
\- Bernie Sanders
\- AOC
\- President Biden They have all already put the full weight of their political machine behind Raphael Warnock, asking their wealthy donors from LA to New York for support. And their top supporters have heeded the call.

We're already behind, and we have just days to make up ground and get out the vote. The Left is already counting on a victory.

Can we count on you to stop them?

My very best,
Nikki Haley

name: Alliance Defending Freedom
subject: BREAKING: CVS fires Christian nurse practitioner
body:
This nurse practitioner’s story deserves to go viral. It’s a devastating example of what will continue to happen if we don
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zg70r7b9jkkgllg7l1b9lmfdf7ui7u9ea005hdqo_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjjm1o72cth2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zollfl2k3476nm306ej279k9bhc2q05ibpn1ltbg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjjm1o72cth2bs)
---
[**Sign The Petition: Don't Let CVS Purge Pro-Lifers**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsukk696r283id35houav77hsqabmsuqjv3822p0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjjm1o72cth2bs)
---
Friend, This nurse practitioner’s story deserves to go viral. It’s a devastating example of what will continue to happen if we don’t draw the line for freedom. [**_That’s why we’re suing CVS_**** _._**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj9ibdir9431pu2lo9bvhbtcvihr5m04pfmdnr6o_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjjm1o72cth2bs) But I’m getting ahead of myself. Paige Casey is a young nurse practitioner. For years, she faithfully served her community, working as a nurse practitioner at a local CVS MinuteClinic in Virginia. When she was hired, she made her employer aware that her Catholic faith prevented her from prescribing or dispensing abortion-inducing drugs._ _ CVS accommodated her religious conviction for three-and-a-half years and didn’t require her to administer any life-ending drugs. But then in 2022, they told Paige they would no longer allow her religious freedom. A few months later, **_she was fired—just two days after earning a performance-based raise._** **This is blatant religious discrimination, and according to Virginia law — it’s illegal.**
---
| | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsk0bd5in2m25e774j1dck1g00lrllirql2gmug0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjjm1o72cth2bs)
---
With the ongoing effects still felt from the pandemic, health care workers are needed now more than ever. Forcing them to choose between violating their faith or being fired **_hurts everyone. _** **_And it’s downright un-American. _** Patients are best served by doctors, nurses, and other medical professionals who are free to act ethically and consistent with their beliefs. Despite having a spotless record, Paige is now _unemployed_ , simply because she stood for her faith. This unlawful discrimination cannot be allowed to stand. That’s why Alliance Defending Freedom is filing a lawsuit against CVS on behalf of Paige. ADF is the world’s largest legal organization committed to protecting religious freedom, free speech, marriage and family, parental rights, and the sanctity of life. We defend your most cherished liberties in Congress, state legislatures, and courtrooms across the country — all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court if necessary. [**But we need your help. Will you help us send a strong message to CVS by signing our petition below?**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1l1uoqhhn29pd050eof2bs07o169djdgh8iqjh8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjjm1o72cth2bs) **_We the People, CVS customers, will not stand by and watch attacks on the religious rights of all Americans. _**
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqeb9tefimdq0741urdpcfq408hssh5j64t5bpj8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjjm1o72cth2bs)
---
Thank you in advance.
---
Alliance Defending Freedom
---
15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260
All donations are secure, private, and tax-deductible. Member ECFA.
---

name: Mark Meckler, COS Action
subject: Sign the National Convention of States Petition!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Convention of States Action
body:
I urge you, right this second, to sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States to save America.
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z81ie7unig9ep9f857i11e0pp2a402ne9tl21jpg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge4ob2c5h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, [**I urge you, right this second, to sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States to save America**.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2tetgdonsrkfgfcjmblivqd7q2oqlnrsu6sbah8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge4ob2c5h2bs) An army of conservative heroes including **_Mark Levin, Ben Shapiro, Sean Hannity,_** and** _Lt. Col. Allen West_** have joined our movement to call for an Article V Convention of States. [**Just click here to add your name to this national petition. And then PLEASE forward this email to every single person you know.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo0u0sumkt53h63gr0upat0mgng946pc3f8ftan0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge4ob2c5h2bs)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfo6srv3cccsh3g1q4fvq12rj9m3475qfmrhl69o_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge4ob2c5h2bs)
---
Our nation is spiraling out of control. Debt threatens to cripple our economy. Federal spending has never been higher -- nor has our deficit. And the politicians in Washington won't do anything to save us. _In fact, most of them are part of the problem!_ A Convention of States is our only hope. You see, our Founding Fathers were brilliant men. They left an emergency clause in the Constitution in case the federal government got too big and out-of-control. **Article V of the Constitution allows the states to bypass Congress and the President to call a Convention of States to propose amendments to our Constitution that will rein in the federal government.** Well, conservative leaders all across the country -- along with over **_FIVE MILLION_** grassroots patriots -- believe it is time to invoke Article V and call a Convention of States for the express, _limited_ purpose of imposing fiscal restraints and term limits on Congress and limiting the power, scope, and jurisdiction of the federal government. And I hope you do, too. With the socialists in control in Washington, it's time to take action before it's too late! It's time for "We the People" to use the most powerful weapon in our arsenal - the Constitution - to fight back against Washington's overreach. [**Please sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States right now, and please ask everyone you know to do the same.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztk9ga4v5ns0sshhn7b7hsqqa6f0mtfhuemvvqhg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge4ob2c5h2bs) Here at Convention of States Action, we are working overtime to convince the required 34 state legislatures to call for an Article V convention to place limits on the power and jurisdiction of the federal government. **We have already passed the COS Resolution through the state legislatures in 19 states, including four since the start of this year alone -- bringing us over __HALFWAY__ to calling a Convention of States and taking the power back from the "ruling class" in Washington!** This year alone, the Resolution has passed out of committee in Massachusetts, Pennsylvania, Iowa, and Kansas -- paving the way for the next round of states to pass! With dozens of states currently considering the COS Resolution, _NOW_ is our window of opportunity to double down and secure the needed victories to cross the finish line! We have a citizen activist army operating in all 50 states, working tirelessly to urge their state legislators to act in accordance with the will of the people and demand that they pass this critically important Resolution. **A Convention of States is our only chance to pass important and long overdue measures like a balanced budget amendment, term limits on Congress and the D.C. Swamp, and limits on the scope and jurisdiction of the federal government.** The politicians in Washington wouldn't dare limit their own power. Therefore, we the people need to do it! But in order for that to happen, we need millions and millions of patriotic Americans like you to sign this important national petition. We need to show the members of the state legislatures that the American people are ready for a constitutional solution as big as our nation's problems, an Article V Convention of States. [**Simply click here to sign and we’ll deliver it directly to your state legislators, free of charge. This is our best chance to save America from an out-of-control federal government.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaepg719mh3l2u22lsa6klm8d8qoaf76fhfqdn5g_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge4ob2c5h2bs) Washington won't fix itself. The federal government is too big, and the politicians are too invested in its growth. We the people must take control through our state legislatures. [**Please join the fight to call a Convention of States. Sign the petition today, and urge every freedom-loving American to do the same.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlf3etk9gnd4lodpruaq55mgrf9un9bd3tbn1afg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge4ob2c5h2bs)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj1l6gsan1dpj23a55cj7229q59kub29ourrjl1o_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge4ob2c5h2bs)
---
Thank you, and may God bless America! For America, Mark Meckler President Convention of States Action
---

Suite 580A
Houston, TX 77057

subject: It’s time to hold Fauci to account

body:
With a new Republican majority in the US House, we finally have a chance to do something that Congress should have done years ago ... | | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62008847:6k6cv2GkN:m:1:3331703221:230F841022000C4F6032995649BA0CD9:r)
---
| | Peter,

With a new Republican majority in the US House, we finally have a chance to do something that Congress should have done years ago - hold Anthony Fauci accountable for the mess he made during the COVID-19 pandemic.

Democrats ran cover for Fauci for years on end, pretending that he bore no responsibility for closing schools and businesses. **But as everybody knows, livelihoods, careers, and educations were destroyed on the basis of Fauci 's "science." **
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62008847:6k6cv2GkN:m:1:3331703221:230F841022000C4F6032995649BA0CD9:r)
---
| **America deserves to know what Anthony Fauci knew, when he knew it, and what exactly he was doing behind closed doors before, during and after COVID. **

**The only way for that to happen is with a full Congressional investigation.**

Democrats are going to do everything they can to protect the legacy of their hero, so we need all the support we can to hold Fauci responsible for his actions. [**_Will you donate today to make sure we can finally hold Anthony Fauci accountable?_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62008847:6k6cv2GkN:m:1:3331703221:230F841022000C4F6032995649BA0CD9:r)

name: Vince Speranza, American Veterans Center
subject: I fought at the Battle of the Bulge
body:
I was a 19-year-old machine gunner at the Battle of the Bulge in World War II. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6423%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=p3aR0iwb0DGeDSF%2f9m6yCA&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84445%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zRVNtMdW1UdepT8GCxXlDg&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American, I was a 19-year-old machine gunner at the Battle of the Bulge in World War II. _And I didn’t talk about my Army service for more than 65 years after that._ **But my life changed forever when, as an 85-year-old, I returned to Bastogne, Belgium to pay my respects to my fallen comrades.** On my first day, a local man hugged me and thanked me for my service. Then he took my daughter and me to the area that my division - the 101st Airborne, also known as the “Screaming Eagles” - had held. I even identified the _exact_ location of my foxhole.
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84445%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zRVNtMdW1UdepT8GCxXlDg&sysid=1)
---
_Above: My friends at the American Veterans Center released a video documentary about my World War II service in July 2021._
---
Today, I’ve shared my story with thousands of Americans, and my 56-minute video documentary with the American Veterans Center (AVC) has been seen nearly 1 million times online. **So when my friends at the American Veterans Center told me they were launching an urgent campaign to honor even more veterans’ legacies, I knew that I had to act.** I know how powerful - and critically important - the American Veterans Center’s work is to honor servicemen and women like me. [**Can I count on you to help AVC continue their important mission with your generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84446%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nKjmo3FUBHd1WY0mKMmaZA&sysid=1)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84447%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9pNK5x6mQBM%2fzM7HcyAZrQ&sysid=1)
---
**When I visited Bastogne for the first time since the Battle of the Bulge, I was stunned to learn that I had become a local legend.** More than 65 years ago, I’d brought back beer for wounded soldiers in my unit - and, since there were few taverns open and no glasses to be found, I’d poured it all into my helmet. I told this story to a few locals on my trip to Bastogne ... and I couldn’t believe it when they led me to a bar that served “Airborne Beer” in honor of the event. **I never imagined that a Belgian beer would be part of my legacy, but thanks to American Veterans Center supporters like you, it’s now part of our shared American history, too.**
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84445%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zRVNtMdW1UdepT8GCxXlDg&sysid=1)
---
No other organization does as many programs - or as deeply thorough work - to preserve and honor our veterans’ legacies like the American Veterans Center. The many important programs of the American Veterans Center include:
* **The Annual Veterans Conference in Washington, D.C.,** where I was honored to speak on a panel of fellow veterans and share our hard-won lessons with the students and military cadets in attendance.

* **The powerful oral history and video documentary project.** These videos are recorded at _no cost_ to veterans; in fact, AVC usually sends their video team to veterans’ homes and, after the production is complete, gives veterans and their families a keepsake copy.

* **The National Memorial Day Parade** , which AVC brought back to its full glory after it hadn’t been held for many decades. Today, it’s the largest Memorial Day commemoration in the country, and thousands of servicemen and women, from World War II to active-duty forces, march in it.

But the American Veterans Center is only able to offer these programs with the generous support of patriotic Americans like you. [**That’s why I hope you’ll make your most generous, tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more to help support the American Veterans Center today.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84448%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f3furSTyVcZ%2fJpUu%2fVPrRg&sysid=1)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84447%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9pNK5x6mQBM%2fzM7HcyAZrQ&sysid=1)
---
I didn’t tell the story of my World War II experience for 65 years. I didn’t even watch movies about the military - I just couldn’t. But once I returned to Bastogne and met men and women who remembered the war, everything changed. **Sharing my experience as a World War II veteran - at AVC’s Annual Conference, in AVC’s video documentary, at special events, and in my own memoir - changed my life tremendously and for the better.** Now you have the opportunity to help veterans like me share their stories and know that their legacies will be recorded, preserved, and honored - today and in future generations. [**Please make your most generous gift to the American Veterans Center right now.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84449%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fz5gYGp%2fCfzRZHz2mzQeig&sysid=1) Thank you,
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84445%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zRVNtMdW1UdepT8GCxXlDg&sysid=1)
---
Vince Speranza World War II Veteran For the American Veterans Center
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84447%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9pNK5x6mQBM%2fzM7HcyAZrQ&sysid=1)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6423%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=p3aR0iwb0DGeDSF%2f9m6yCA&sysid=1)

name: American Action News
subject: Sign the Petition - No Taxpayer Funding for Abortion!
body:
Did you know there is a specific legislative provision ensuring that your federal tax dollars do not fund abortions?
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zovpqqlffjfsto6bog5eugkbeqn300g4nccou56o_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge2oj4cth2bs) | |
---
Dear Fellow American,

Did you know there is a specific legislative provision ensuring that your federal tax dollars do not fund abortions?

Since 1976, the Hyde Amendment has protected American taxpayers from paying for abortions. Throughout its history, the Hyde Amendment has received widespread bipartisan support from both Congress and the White House. But if President Biden, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-Calif.), Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.), and their pro-abortion allies in Congress have their way, this critically important provision could be undone.

[**Please, right now, sign this No Taxpayer Funding of Abortion emergency petition to House Speaker Nancy Pelosi and Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2026chj8q76kb5cev5i2q4ceegm2mi13kljr4to_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge2oj4cth2bs)
[**Sign the No Taxpayer Funding of Abortion petition**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvkodhp6rp34efhn1uf1duu9puqr5t8n76fu9bmg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge2oj4cth2bs)
The pro-abortion lobby is hard at work trying to roll back the Hyde Amendment, as well as the many pro-life victories achieved during the Trump administration, including:
* The Protecting Life in Global Health Assistance (PLGHA) policy, which blocked funding for international organizations that perform or promote abortion;
* A Title X rule change that closed an abortion funding loophole by ensuring financial and physical separation between family planning clinics and abortion facilities;
* An executive order that reinforced existing protections for children born prematurely, with disabilities, or in medical distress, including infants who survive abortion; and
* A conscience exemption from the Obamacare “contraceptive mandate” for organizations with moral or religious objections to purchasing insurance that includes coverage of contraceptives and abortion-causing drugs.

According to a January 2021 Marist poll, 58% of Americans oppose taxpayer funding of abortion. But unless you and I — and many thousands of other Americans who value life — speak up now, the Pelosi-led House and Schumer-led Senate are very likely to ignore the will of the people and act against our values and the lives of the unborn -- especially as a "lame-duck" session of Congress looms on the horizon!

[**You and I must take a stand NOW to preserve pro-life policy and ensure the Hyde Amendment remains intact for future generations.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7ja25oq4aljpicv0ohq2gbobmd7ageseghgsmog_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge2oj4cth2bs)

President Biden’s proposed federal budget for this year removed the Hyde Amendment—following through on a campaign promise made by every Democratic presidential candidate in 2020. We must act now to demand that our tax dollars NOT fund abortions.

Family Research Council Action has been working feverishly to defeat the pro-abortion special interests and their allies in Congress.

We’ve been working with pro-life legislators in Congress to help secure the passage of important legislation, and we’ve been working at the state level all across America to protect life as well.

With Democrats in control of Congress for another two months, innocent unborn lives are at risk in America like never before.

If you and I remain silent, innocent children will tragically die.

[**Please help us fight back against President Joe Biden, Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and their pro-abortion allies today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrktbl0l2hnoit83a303gnfd2rsijdr5mppgseag_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge2oj4cth2bs)
[**Sign the No Taxpayer Funding of Abortion petition**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj2ht4h2go20ft8g7ggs4n4l862u40tq4uup0c7o_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge2oj4cth2bs)
Thank you, and God bless!

For America,

Lt. Gen. (Ret.) William G. Boykin
Executive Vice President
Family Research Council Action
|
---
**FRC Action**
801 G Street NW, Washington, D.C. 20001

Family Research Council Action (FRC Action) operates as a social welfare organization organized under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to FRC Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. Your contribution will be used in support of the general mission of FRC Action. clean_body: Did you know there is a specific legislative provision ensuring that your federal tax dollars do not fund abortions? | | Dear Fellow American, Did you know there is a specific legislative provision ensuring that your federal tax dollars do not fund abortions? Since 1976, the Hyde Amendment has protected American taxpayers from paying for abortions. Throughout its history, the Hyde Amendment has received widespread bipartisan support from both Congress and the White House. But if President Biden, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-Calif.), Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.), and their pro-abortion allies in Congress have their way, this critically important provision could be undone. The pro-abortion lobby is hard at work trying to roll back the Hyde Amendment, as well as the many pro-life victories achieved during the Trump administration, including: The Protecting Life in Global Health Assistance (PLGHA) policy, which blocked funding for international organizations that perform or promote abortion; A Title X rule change that closed an abortion funding loophole by ensuring financial and physical separation between family planning clinics and abortion facilities; An executive order that reinforced existing protections for children born prematurely, with disabilities, or in medical distress, including infants who survive abortion; and A conscience exemption from the Obamacare “contraceptive mandate” for organizations with moral or religious objections to purchasing insurance that includes coverage of contraceptives and abortion-causing drugs. According to a January 2021 Marist poll, 58% of Americans oppose taxpayer funding of abortion. But unless you and I — and many thousands of other Americans who value life — speak up now, the Pelosi-led House and Schumer-led Senate are very likely to ignore the will of the people and act against our values and the lives of the unborn -- especially as a "lame-duck" session of Congress looms on the horizon! President Biden’s proposed federal budget for this year removed the Hyde Amendment—following through on a campaign promise made by every Democratic presidential candidate in 2020. We must act now to demand that our tax dollars NOT fund abortions. Family Research Council Action has been working feverishly to defeat the pro-abortion special interests and their allies in Congress. We’ve been working with pro-life legislators in Congress to help secure the passage of important legislation, and we’ve been working at the state level all across America to protect life as well. With Democrats in control of Congress for another two months, innocent unborn lives are at risk in America like never before. If you and I remain silent, innocent children will tragically die. Thank you, and God bless! For America, Lt. Gen. (Ret.) William G. Boykin Executive Vice President Family Research Council Action | FRC Action 801 G Street NW, Washington, D.C. 20001 Family Research Council Action (FRC Action) operates as a social welfare organization organized under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to FRC Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. Your contribution will be used in support of the general mission of FRC Action. FRC Action does not accept contributions designated or earmarked for the purpose of influencing an election. name: Deroy Murdock
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlomi545ffgqd8t7aj33n7fj4go1p00a7a1n9q0o_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge2oj4cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlc5g8u78i3e5g0e80titlahqoqoi63asfr0mlhg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge2oj4cth2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7pd8hhrr02tck3mtmrc8qhgmubd2lrr7472fvrg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge2oj4cth2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---

---

name: Mark Meckler, COS Action
subject: Sign the National Convention of States Petition!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Convention of States Action
body:
I urge you, right this second, to sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States to save America.
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkain52i39a4dg7ticbgeofk1b0curg2abvdtbhg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge2oj4cth2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, [**I urge you, right this second, to sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States to save America**.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zba628iifm0n7sp6ata36vkcbe13n67ilk8u54k0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge2oj4cth2bs) An army of conservative heroes including **_Mark Levin, Ben Shapiro, Sean Hannity,_** and** _Lt. Col. Allen West_** have joined our movement to call for an Article V Convention of States. [**Just click here to add your name to this national petition. And then PLEASE forward this email to every single person you know.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1t86ju1m2jmonu3gtqpm46j2nutsu0gov3n1mj8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge2oj4cth2bs)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6u6pqpeup6dk5tct04k67jisv7mjs8vjsd40vf0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge2oj4cth2bs)
---
Our nation is spiraling out of control. Debt threatens to cripple our economy. Federal spending has never been higher -- nor has our deficit. And the politicians in Washington won't do anything to save us. _In fact, most of them are part of the problem!_ A Convention of States is our only hope. You see, our Founding Fathers were brilliant men. They left an emergency clause in the Constitution in case the federal government got too big and out-of-control. **Article V of the Constitution allows the states to bypass Congress and the President to call a Convention of States to propose amendments to our Constitution that will rein in the federal government.** Well, conservative leaders all across the country -- along with over **_FIVE MILLION_** grassroots patriots -- believe it is time to invoke Article V and call a Convention of States for the express, _limited_ purpose of imposing fiscal restraints and term limits on Congress and limiting the power, scope, and jurisdiction of the federal government. And I hope you do, too. With the socialists in control in Washington, it's time to take action before it's too late! It's time for "We the People" to use the most powerful weapon in our arsenal - the Constitution - to fight back against Washington's overreach. [**Please sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States right now, and please ask everyone you know to do the same.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd95vale8ajv8snjbqlcki3bshuo8fm32n1hcmlo_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge2oj4cth2bs) Here at Convention of States Action, we are working overtime to convince the required 34 state legislatures to call for an Article V convention to place limits on the power and jurisdiction of the federal government. **We have already passed the COS Resolution through the state legislatures in 19 states, including four since the start of this year alone -- bringing us over __HALFWAY__ to calling a Convention of States and taking the power back from the "ruling class" in Washington!** This year alone, the Resolution has passed out of committee in Massachusetts, Pennsylvania, Iowa, and Kansas -- paving the way for the next round of states to pass! With dozens of states currently considering the COS Resolution, _NOW_ is our window of opportunity to double down and secure the needed victories to cross the finish line! We have a citizen activist army operating in all 50 states, working tirelessly to urge their state legislators to act in accordance with the will of the people and demand that they pass this critically important Resolution. **A Convention of States is our only chance to pass important and long overdue measures like a balanced budget amendment, term limits on Congress and the D.C. Swamp, and limits on the scope and jurisdiction of the federal government.** The politicians in Washington wouldn't dare limit their own power. Therefore, we the people need to do it! But in order for that to happen, we need millions and millions of patriotic Americans like you to sign this important national petition. We need to show the members of the state legislatures that the American people are ready for a constitutional solution as big as our nation's problems, an Article V Convention of States. [**Simply click here to sign and we’ll deliver it directly to your state legislators, free of charge. This is our best chance to save America from an out-of-control federal government.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn8qkm9nkj5kmh2571qhh393ebuvn1vs0pkici70_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge2oj4cth2bs) Washington won't fix itself. The federal government is too big, and the politicians are too invested in its growth. We the people must take control through our state legislatures. [**Please join the fight to call a Convention of States. Sign the petition today, and urge every freedom-loving American to do the same.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zksbpk0gbvbmpcrecrdahm5il9g5csr5vrroprno_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge2oj4cth2bs)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbvgpukrp97vfr8lpgp7oeqb0ji6omhdqaghib1o_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge2oj4cth2bs)
---
Thank you, and may God bless America! For America, Mark Meckler President Convention of States Action
---
Paid for by Convention of States Action
---
5850 San Felipe
Suite 580A
Houston, TX 77057
---

name: Lt. Gen. (Ret.) William G. Boykin, FRC Action
subject: Protect Women’s Sports: Sign the Petition Now!
body:
There is a war on women taking place in this country right at this moment. For decades, women have fought for their right to
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgmfdhbneahc3m316u1tgs1cit4r3fqj3g4h3edg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge6o31c1h2bs)
---
|
---
Dear Friends, **There is a war on women taking place in this country right at this moment.** For decades, women have fought for their right to equal opportunities in academics and athletics. But in its push to radically redefine the previously undisputed definitions of “man” and “woman,” the Left is depriving women of some of their hard-won civil rights gains. Thanks to the current anti-scientific gender identity movement that the far Left is forcing onto our society, biological male athletes who self-identify as women are being allowed to compete in women’s athletic competitions. In one prominent example, the NCAA has allowed a biological male swimmer—now going by the name Lia Thomas—to compete in women’s competitions, outracing all the biological female competitors at the NCAA women’s 500-yard freestyle national championship meet. Far from being the only case of females being bumped off victor podiums by biological males, the Lia Thomas story shines a light on a disturbing cultural trend increasingly permeating women’s sports. You and I both know that sex is an immutable biological reality. We must uphold the scientific and biblical meaning of the words “man” and “woman.” In doing so, we will protect female athletes from the injustice of being completely driven out of their sports by biological males. Friends, if you agree that biological males should stay out of women’s sports**,****[show your support for women athletes by signing the NATIONAL PETITION right now—there is no time to waste.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znvorh5j22396350luhp1quv39t8kljfjhi2o1sg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge6o31c1h2bs) **
---
[**Sign to Keep Males out of Women’s Sports**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg96lcj9jmg140s0vnssb2ndaon5as270cb6mn3o_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge6o31c1h2bs)
---
| | By allowing biological males to dominate women’s athletic competitions, the NCAA has perpetrated an attack on women’s and girls’ athletic opportunities. This grave injustice is wildly unpopular amongst rational members of society... _yet_ most people are too afraid to speak out against it out of fear of extreme social criticism or political backlash. **One collegiate female athlete said that Thomas’ participation in women** ’**s swimming has completely ruined the integrity of the sport, and she finds it disappointing to know that the NCAA lacks the courage to do the right thing.** Title IX prohibits any school that receives federal funding from discriminating on the basis of sex. But instead of ensuring equal treatment of the sexes in all areas—including athletics—some schools are allowing athletes to compete based on what gender they self-identify with. Such a policy undermines the purpose of Title IX. **More importantly, it undermines the American way of life and the principles we stand for—we can't allow it to continue. ** [**Click here to sign the National Petition to STOP BIOLOGICAL MALES FROM COMPETING IN WOMEN’S SPORTS.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlmaeivaaqdcfutdn9uvjl15chpl06vuffj9sob0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge6o31c1h2bs)
---
[**Sign to Keep Males out of Women’s Sports**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zteb9upnrmtfdfe96mq5k1o031emoskf115j2s18_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge6o31c1h2bs)
---
It’s unlikely that the NCAA has enough sense or courage to admit the harm they have created given that our universities have been overrun by “woke” administrators. So we must make our voices heard. _By signing this petition right away, you will be doing your part as an American citizen to encourage policymakers to take action and protect women_ ’ _s rights._ We must fight this radical ideological attack against God and human nature. We must work to protect women’s rights in sports and society and fight to preserve the scientific and biblical definitions of the sexes. **That** ’**s why FRC Action started this petition—to protect young girls and women and continue providing family-centered policy for all branches of government.** [**Add your signature to the rapidly growing list of faithful supporters now. Please sign Family Research Council Action** ’**s national petition right away to block men from competing in female sports.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmngegae4ef7fi1co1sou9o922ulmhh3lj12mt1g_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge6o31c1h2bs)
---
[**Sign to Keep Males out of Women’s Sports**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zas3kdhhljepet78rlkkkmgvhck5tf5m1jspoc4o_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge6o31c1h2bs)
---
Thank you, and God bless! For America, Lt. Gen. (Ret.) William G. BoykinExecutive Vice PresidentFamily Research Council Action
---
** _P.S._** President Biden recently spoke in favor of the transgender movement and publicly encouraged more young people to permanently alter their bodies with puberty-blocking drugs, cross-sex hormones, and reassignment surgeries. [**_Please sign the petition right away to help stop this extremely harmful and disturbing trend from progressing any further. _**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbgi3muos57jirr1jkonng6js3mt8trvjqvtehk0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge6o31c1h2bs)

clean_body: There is a war on women taking place in this country right at this moment. For decades, women have fought for their right to | | | | Dear Friends, There is a war on women taking place in this country right at this moment. For decades, women have fought for their right to equal opportunities in academics and athletics. But in its push to radically redefine the previously undisputed definitions of “man” and “woman,” the Left is depriving women of some of their hard-won civil rights gains. Thanks to the current anti-scientific gender identity movement that the far Left is forcing onto our society, biological male athletes who self-identify as women are being allowed to compete in women’s athletic competitions. In one prominent example, the NCAA has allowed a biological male swimmer—now going by the name Lia Thomas—to compete in women’s competitions, outracing all the biological female competitors at the NCAA women’s 500-yard freestyle national championship meet. Far from being the only case of females being bumped off victor podiums by biological males, the Lia Thomas story shines a light on a disturbing cultural trend increasingly permeating women’s sports. You and I both know that sex is an immutable biological reality. We must uphold the scientific and biblical meaning of the words “man” and “woman.” In doing so, we will protect female athletes from the injustice of being completely driven out of their sports by biological males. Friends, if you agree that biological males should stay out of women’s sports, | | By allowing biological males to dominate women’s athletic competitions, the NCAA has perpetrated an attack on women’s and girls’ athletic opportunities. This grave injustice is wildly unpopular amongst rational members of society... yet most people are too afraid to speak out against it out of fear of extreme social criticism or political backlash. One collegiate female athlete said that Thomas’ participation in women ’s swimming has completely ruined the integrity of the sport, and she finds it disappointing to know that the NCAA lacks the courage to do the right thing. Title IX prohibits any school that receives federal funding from discriminating on the basis of sex. But instead of ensuring equal treatment of the sexes in all areas—including athletics—some schools are allowing athletes to compete based on what gender they self-identify with. Such a policy undermines the purpose of Title IX. More importantly, it undermines the American way of life and the principles we stand for—we can't allow it to continue. It’s unlikely that the NCAA has enough sense or courage to admit the harm they have created given that our universities have been overrun by “woke” administrators. So we must make our voices heard. By signing this petition right away, you will be doing your part as an American citizen to encourage policymakers to take action and protect women ’ s rights. We must fight this radical ideological attack against God and human nature. We must work to protect women’s rights in sports and society and fight to preserve the scientific and biblical definitions of the sexes. That ’s why FRC Action started this petition—to protect young girls and women and continue providing family-centered policy for all branches of government. Thank you, and God bless! For America, Lt. Gen. (Ret.) William G. BoykinExecutive Vice PresidentFamily Research Council Action P.S. body:

[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/63503370576D657358467A44596A49584F4A5A4C75496D6E58527177546F6E5A446536353467474C7A652F6878586245706D4F6B697761427370374F566C4A51/editor_images/Untitled%20%2811%29.png] [https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/63503370576D657358467A44596A49584F4A5A4C75496D6E58527177546F6E5A446536353467474C7A652F6878586245706D4F6B697761427370374F566C4A51/editor_images/Untitled%20%2810%29.png]
Team NPP has returned from a successful trip down to Savannah, Georgia last weekend to get out the vote for the upcoming U.S. Senate runoff election on December 6th. Our strong team of 10 organizers knocked on more than 2,000 doors in just 4 days!
We’d love to come be back for our third leg to support the run-off but we need your support. Help us return to the peach state to help our allies The New Georgia Project [https://newgeorgiaproject.org/] continue their door knocking campaign to get out the vote for Rapheal Warnock and get that 51st vote in the United States Senate.
