body:
With a new Republican majority in the US House, we finally have a chance to do something that Congress should have done years ago ... | | | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62008912:6VrU-2GNN:m:1:3317145305:5BBD6E27E5AE1B1894DAC20A34EFD5C4:r)
---
| | Peter,

With a new Republican majority in the US House, we finally have a chance to do something that Congress should have done years ago - hold Anthony Fauci accountable for the mess he made during the COVID-19 pandemic.

Democrats ran cover for Fauci for years on end, pretending that he bore no responsibility for closing schools and businesses. **But as everybody knows, livelihoods, careers, and educations were destroyed on the basis of Fauci 's "science." **
---
| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62008912:6VrU-2GNN:m:1:3317145305:5BBD6E27E5AE1B1894DAC20A34EFD5C4:r)
---
| **America deserves to know what Anthony Fauci knew, when he knew it, and what exactly he was doing behind closed doors before, during and after COVID. **

**The only way for that to happen is with a full Congressional investigation.**

Democrats are going to do everything they can to protect the legacy of their hero, so we need all the support we can to hold Fauci responsible for his actions. [**_Will you donate today to make sure we can finally hold Anthony Fauci accountable?_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62008912:6VrU-2GNN:m:1:3317145305:5BBD6E27E5AE1B1894DAC20A34EFD5C4:r)

body:
Peter,

Look at one the more innovative ways we're turning up the heat on Raphael Warnock during this runoff:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62008880:JVgR-2GfN:m:1:3331703221:7ABB960330CEC407F017C4AA154CB6E4:r)
This digital mobile billboard has allowed us to follow Senator Warnock's campaign - wherever he is holding an event - and push back against the half-truths and false attacks he is peddling to Georgia voters.

To win this race, we want to take this mobile billboard on the road, hitting highways across the state and big events like this weekend's SEC Championship football game in Atlanta. **The price tag on renting this digital advertising mobile is $5,400 for a 12-hour day.**

**[Peter, will you help us raise $27,000 to rent the billboard truck for the next 4 days through Election Night?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62008880:JVgR-2GfN:m:1:3331703221:7ABB960330CEC407F017C4AA154CB6E4:r)**

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: I Don't Totally Blame Kanye...
body:
Lately, Kanye West aka Ye has been making all kinds of headlines for all the wrong reasons while dragging the name of Christ through mess. Yesterday,
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9063.1.cf1b2987a4266fbd9e74a9a323eb6b4d)
---
Lately, **Kanye West** aka _Ye_ has been making all kinds of headlines for all the wrong reasons while dragging the name of Christ through mess. Yesterday, **Kanye** went on the **Alex Jones** show and made several dumbfounding statements such as praising **Adolf Hitler** while then quoting Scripture and having a Bible directly in front of him as a prop. It would be easy to write **Kanye** off and blame him for his very DISTORTED view of Christianity that he has and is out promoting through his different platforms, but **I have a different perspective**... When **Kanye** began embracing his newfound faith in Christ, many prominent Christian leaders _paraded_ him around and began promoting him before the Body of Christ. He was brought before the Church of America and endorsed by many American Church leaders very **prematurely**. **Paul** says in 1 Timothy 3:6: _"A church leader must not be a new believer, because he might become proud, and the devil would cause him to fall."_ I believe that a tremendous disservice was done to **Kanye** from leaders within the Church who capitalized on his popularity instead of discipling him, which he is in desperate need of. This issue with **Kanye** is not isolated to just him though, but it exposes a larger problem within the Church of America. **The larger issue is that we have a TON of converts but very FEW disciples.** Right now, Biblical ILLITERACY is at an _all-time high_ in America. Fewer than half of all adults can name the four Gospel writers, while 82% of Americans believe that _"God helps those who help themselves"_ is a Bible verse. In a recent **LifeWay Research** study, the Bible reading habits among church attendees was shocking:
\- 19% read the Bible everyday
\- 26% read the Bible a few times per week
\- 14% read the Bible once a week
\- 22% read the Bible once a month
\- 18% read the Bible rarely or never In general, American Christians have a poor foundation in the Word of God. This is a major problem and is the reason why I decided to launch [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9064.1.c28cb32512fde93106bfdf9c0952724b). Currently, we are finishing up our first semester at [SBC](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9065.1.88ed97b7c85ceaf30ec26c3e539eaf14) and it has been tremendous. Our students are receiving a solid foundation. I want to encourage you to consider [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9066.1.c5773545dea4398e773e0388b91180f7) as a means for you to grow in your faith and go from a convert to a true disciple. Registration for the Spring semester is now open. You can attend online or in-person. The cost is very inexpensive: $300 per semester. For more information visit [www.sheridan.church/biblecollege](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9067.1.c94d87fad764de4f76e054007bb4e104) Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9068.1.de4c28a0653bf22c35a6cfa2e2d206f9), [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9069.1.fda212bfbd5f132406a200c2671c615a), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9070.1.6b18f054e9528d542255e1c2368f59b7), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9071.1.0b6c4ca11fa6e8d08ebebdac87c4efc3), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9072.1.df21e1017d6218ef1532b34ce8953463) & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9073.1.1ad2b1bc0a57f2c8d9a8ea47aa53e208)). [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9074.1.6532206bd00df34d367aed4651259e87)
---
---
## You Need To Be Apart Of This
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9075.1.521794970782e9fa4349fc3a29ecf6e8)
---
[Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9076.1.f3d8f9047b93ab0642b200ea27e4238d) is a 1 year intensive program consisting of 12 courses divided between 2 semesters. Classes are offered in-person & online.
_"Study to show yourself approved to God, a worker who does not need to be ashamed, rightly dividing the word of truth"_ \- **2 Timothy 2:15**
Enrolling in [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9077.1.09e344ec4bc393c65e191a76b0820b99) is not something you will regret. We have intentionally made tuition VERY inexpensive: $300 per semester.
**Fall Semester** :
\- Old Testament Introduction
\- New Testament Introduction
\- Theology of Worship
\- Church History 1
\- Faith & Prayer
\- Spiritual Growth
**Spring Semester** :
\- Christian Theology
\- Pauline Epistles
\- Apologetics
\- Church History 2
\- Leadership & Ethics
\- Evangelism & Outreach
Classes for the Spring 2023 Semester begin January 17. Enroll today at [www.sheridan.church/biblecollege](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9078.1.c1ce29f29b785fbd779def71878a5420)
| | [ Sheridan Bible College ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9079.1.4dd44d5f45d02881c0eb81b301d15197)
---
---
## The Power Of God
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9080.1.fb166cf606138f9cb48fffe075a124bb)
---
Recently at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9081.1.7837edaacddcf61f2d0824e54dde99f2), I preached on the Power of God which is the **Holy Spirit**.
Check out this sermon at: [https://youtu.be/RDEi4UX4MAE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9082.1.724150cfeade2b0cacad8a196a56209b)
Also, I have started a new series on Wednesday nights at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9083.1.39be5f3aa2f7ee10a6c69c7dd06154db) over the **Book of Revelation**.
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9084.1.cb47ae11bfbc193f0c68d28253023971)
---
We are taking our time through the **Book of Revelation** by going verse by verse.
Watch Pt. 1 here: [https://youtu.be/oPfmX_Aus-M?t=2](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9085.1.b0c06059562d42e81a00091f2c1de5ff)
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15504173.9086.1.d86575ed543ceab15d7ca61eb8b4aa02)

Yesterday, Kanye went on the Alex Jones show and made several dumbfounding statements such as praising Adolf Hitler while then quoting Scripture and having a Bible directly in front of him as a prop. It would be easy to write Kanye off and blame him for his very DISTORTED view of Christianity that he has and is out promoting through his different platforms, but I have a different perspective... When Kanye began embracing his newfound faith in Christ, many prominent Christian leaders paraded him around and began promoting him before the Body of Christ. He was brought before the Church of America and endorsed by many American Church leaders very prematurely. Paul says in 1 Timothy 3:6: "A church leader must not be a new believer, because he might become proud, and the devil would cause him to fall." I believe that a tremendous disservice was done to Kanye from leaders within the Church who capitalized on his popularity instead of discipling him, which he is in desperate need of. This issue with Kanye is not isolated to just him though, but it exposes a larger problem within the Church of America. The larger issue is that we have a TON of converts but very FEW disciples. Right now, Biblical ILLITERACY is at an all-time high in America. Fewer than half of all adults can name the four Gospel writers, while 82% of Americans believe that "God helps those who help themselves" is a Bible verse. In a recent LifeWay Research study, the Bible reading habits among church attendees was shocking: \- 19% read the Bible everyday \- 26% read the Bible a few times per week \- 14% read the Bible once a week \- 22% read the Bible once a month \- 18% read the Bible rarely or never In general, American Christians have a poor foundation in the Word of God. This is a major problem and is the reason why I decided to launch . Currently, we are finishing up our first semester at and it has been tremendous. Our students are receiving a solid foundation. I want to encourage you to consider as a means for you to grow in your faith and go from a convert to a true disciple. Registration for the Spring semester is now open. You can attend online or in-person. The cost is very inexpensive: $300 per semester. For more information visit Thank you, Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on , , , , & ). You Need To Be Apart Of This | is a 1 year intensive program consisting of 12 courses divided between 2 semesters. Classes are offered in-person & online. "Study to show yourself approved to God, a worker who does not need to be ashamed, rightly dividing the word of truth" \- 2 Timothy 2:15 Enrolling in is not something you will regret. We have intentionally made tuition VERY inexpensive: $300 per semester. Fall Semester : \- Old Testament Introduction \- New Testament Introduction \- Theology of Worship \- Church History 1 \- Faith & Prayer \- Spiritual Growth Spring Semester : \- Christian Theology \- Pauline Epistles \- Apologetics \- Church History 2 \- Leadership & Ethics \- Evangelism & Outreach Classes for the Spring 2023 Semester begin January 17. Peter: Conservative star Herschel Walker and woke, socialist Senator Raphael Warnock are locked in a runoff election in Georgia.
After two years of grueling campaigning, Herschel has to keep fighting. _**And so do we!**_
**[Please contribute to Herschel Walker's campaign!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62009163:68dMK2GN_:m:1:3331421248:5C9E77AEBF3A04A05823EEA9AB6AB5BB:r)**
The Georgia Senate runoff election will be on December 6, so we don't have much time. The entire Democrat Party, the media, and woke corporations will be pouring money and propaganda into this race.
Herschel Walker doesn't have Wall Street, Silicon Valley, and the Swamp. His campaign can only rely on two things now: _**conservative principles and us.**_
The marathon of the 2022 elections is now a sprint for Georgia.
Herschel Walker is ready for this fight. He is giving everything he's got to save America from another two years of anti-American corruption in Washington. What is it worth... ▶︎ To fight inflation?
▶︎ To drill more oil and natural gas?
▶︎ To protect our daughters from woke extremists?
▶︎ To rescue our classrooms from racist indoctrination?
▶︎ To secure our border?
▶︎ To clean up our streets?
**[Please chip in to Herschel Walker's campaign to build a conservative Senate.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62009163:68dMK2GN_:m:1:3331421248:5C9E77AEBF3A04A05823EEA9AB6AB5BB:r)**
We need principled fighters in the Senate, not more spineless and feckless RINOs. Together, we can help send Herschel Walker to Washington to fight for our values.
Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to support strong candidates. Sincerely,
---

Mary Vought Executive Director Senate Conservatives Fund

Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007667:657tK2GHN:m:1:3360412034:E041E9A464D1DBBDFE858304BD50642A:r)**

subject: I’m asking for your immediate help.
body:

Volunteers across Arizona are making sure that our voice is heard and our ballots are counted, but the fact is many Republican ballots may be invalid.

I’m asking for your immediate help.

[**With one contribution of $5, $10, or $35, I can reach every corner of the state and make sure that Republicans know that their ballot may NOT have been counted.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41410%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Hd%2fL1NcMwC9xrqIATvxRzg&sysid=1)

body:
Peter,

Look at one the more innovative ways we're turning up the heat on Raphael Warnock during this runoff:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62008916:627OK2GdN:m:1:3253819041:BA9D3A377D1A4E8F70FC981614C9FE28:r)

To win this race, we want to take this mobile billboard on the road, hitting highways across the state and big events like this weekend's SEC Championship football game in Atlanta. **The price tag on renting this digital advertising mobile is $5,400 for a 12-hour day.**

**[Peter, will you help us raise $27,000 to rent the billboard truck for the next 4 days through Election Night?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62008916:627OK2GdN:m:1:3253819041:BA9D3A377D1A4E8F70FC981614C9FE28:r)**

Team Herschel

name: R. Warnock
subject: Georgians are heading to the polls, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend – I'm fired up!
Early voting ends **TODAY** for our runoff election here in Georgia. Our team is on the ground right now in these final days – knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help us keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority.
But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling over **$50 MILLION** into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads and elect Trump's handpicked candidate, Herschel Walker.
**I'm worried that if we don't fight back ASAP, we could get outspent and drowned out right as voters head to the polls.**
**That's why we set an ambitious $2 million fundraising goal – so we have the resources we need to spread our pro-Georgia message to voters in this final stretch and win.** But with time running out before this critical deadline, we're not on track to reach our goal.
**So, I'm personally asking:[Will you split $5 or more right now between me and Jacky Rosen to help us hit our critical fundraising goal, reach more voters, and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55428112/381658517/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2263-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzRjZGE5ZC00OTcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-SiA2KrSNtJSCH6y6u9E_jB1hddcPfO2ukLvl8P5yTw=)**

Peter: Our battleground race just shifted into new territory, and I urgently need folks like you by my side to keep up the fight. **Here's why:**
* FIRST, right-wing super PACs flooded tens of millions of dollars into Georgia to help my opponent, Herschel Walker, win.

* BUT THEN, our people-powered movement fought back against this unprecedented spending and forced our race into a runoff election.

* **NOW, Georgians are casting their ballots and we need _all hands on deck_ to pull ahead and keep Georgia blue. We're looking for 538 more folks to give before our crucial 11:59 p.m. deadline, but time is running out, and we're falling short.**

**So much is at stake, Peter. We got to this point without taking a cent from corporate PACs, and I'm determined to continue this fight the grassroots way. That's why I'm counting on you to pitch in whatever you can at this critical moment.

name: Lt. Gen. Jack Bergman, USMC (ret)
subject: The Pentagon lied to our faces!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bergman for Congress**
body:
Just take a look at what they've turned our military into!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62009157:JGpud2GwN:m:1:3331703221:982BCBACEBBA57DB464B851D4841EB2E:r "Headline") Peter: Biden's Department of Defense just got caught lying and we have the proof. The DoD has been spending taxpayer dollars promoting Critical Race Theory and Gender Identity to our soldiers! Never mind the ongoing threats from China and Russia... the Pentagon's been more worried about telling white soldiers how evil and oppressive they are! This must stop immediately! We need real warriors, not WOKE warriors! **[Help me keep our Armed Forces focused on military readiness instead of CRT. Donate today and stop Biden's woke social experiment!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62009157:JGpud2GwN:m:1:3331703221:982BCBACEBBA57DB464B851D4841EB2E:r "Help me keep our Armed Forces focused on military readiness instead
of CRT. Donate $25, $50, or $100 today and stop Biden’s woke social experiment!")** Let me be blunt, Biden and the Left have declared WAR against our military and it's a disgrace! They don't want a battle-ready military; they want Woke warriors to promote their socialist propaganda! Just take a look at what they've turned our military into!
* A Biden Military leader tweeting that they're tired of "White folx."
* Tax dollars spent on transgender reassignment surgery.
* Cadets at our service academies are taught CRT.
* Even the Special Forces are required to come up with a Diversity and Inclusion Strategic Plan!

After spending over 40 years in the United States Marine Corps (Oorah), watching brave American men and women risk their lives for our great nation, I refuse to let Biden turn our military into an international laughingstock! **[Will you join me in the fight to keep our military ready to defend our nation? Chip in TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62009157:JGpud2GwN:m:1:3331703221:982BCBACEBBA57DB464B851D4841EB2E:r "Will you join me in the fight to keep our military ready to defend
our nation? Chip in $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY!")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62009157:JGpud2GwN:m:1:3331703221:982BCBACEBBA57DB464B851D4841EB2E:r "Headline")I'm not fighting this battle for me. I'm fighting it for the next generation of Americans. The oath I took as a Marine is something I take very seriously, and even though I'm no longer in uniform, those principles guide my every decision. That's why I'm 100% committed to stopping these Woke warriors from destroying our U.S. military. **[Chip in a donation to fight against Biden, and every other Leftist hell-bent on destroying our military readiness.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62009157:JGpud2GwN:m:1:3331703221:982BCBACEBBA57DB464B851D4841EB2E:r "Chip in a $50 donation to fight against Biden, and every other
Leftist hell-bent on destroying our military readiness.")** The brave men and women in uniform deserve better. We're constantly facing serious threats from those who seek to do us harm, but our enemies will have no reason to fear us if our military prioritizes CRT over military readiness. It's time to fight back. It's time to equip our military with the right equipment and training, not funding for transgender surgeries and Woke politics! **[If you agree, then join the Bergman Brigade TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62009157:JGpud2GwN:m:1:3331703221:982BCBACEBBA57DB464B851D4841EB2E:r "If you agree, then join the Bergman Brigade TODAY!")** God Bless America,

Rep. Jack Bergman (MI-1)
Lt. General, U.S.M.C. (ret.) P.S. I don't care if our Service Members are white, black, or green. We should only care if they're willing to fight to defend our country. **[Donate any amount you can afford so we can remove the Woke politics from our military ranks and leave it for the leftist politicians!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62009157:JGpud2GwN:m:1:3331703221:982BCBACEBBA57DB464B851D4841EB2E:r "Donate $50, $100, or any amount you can afford so we can remove
the Woke politics from our military ranks and leave it for the leftist politicians!")**
---
| **Paid for by Bergman for Congress**
---

Hi, friend, Rev. Warnock here – I'm feeling good, and I hope you are, too.
Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign – and now, Georgians are voting in our critical runoff election.
Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State – and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue.
**But right now, we’re falling about $15,000 short of our daily fundraising goal – and it’s important we close this gap before midnight.** The GOP has already poured more than $52 million into Georgia to try to buy this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this.

name: Your America
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6424%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=BkX%2bj%2bDlld4iq1NhsD7qig&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84441%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xAlEcWpyGPIo3fMEkYD%2f%2bw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84442%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9kCM2yuN7MPuOBE%2fa0z2HA&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. name: Seth Dillon, Babylon Bee
subject: The Bee has been released
body:
But as you and I both know, the radical Left has no sense of humor.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zj5t9ef2s1re9dsfhpv9r8kr8avld22rgq896bqo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sr2m5rj1ddnm4p35dbgslgr4dr2eprj0tpgmoojcd3nc9rjasj66pq30ob6cdg6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32d5l6jjreob6e4qb6p9nm2qmash1k8gn48n24hhm6p74s3ie6p37c8iv0)
| | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zcpjbksreo56ejqqcib3nbt8a2ed0v7esqq7ab50_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge9or4cth2bs)
---
|
---
Fellow American, **_It's official: The Babylon Bee has been released from Twitter jail._** [**_And to celebrate, we want to offer YOU_ 20 PERCENT OFF _a Babylon Bee membership when you use the promo code FREED at checkout!_**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zk6pm9116tfrb5fvj5c2f7vh657a2e1br8r5p62o_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge9or4cth2bs)
---
[Get Your Membership Now >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zsc2k8qjk3tj233s36tij8c5pflp9rocs65rpfh0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge9or4cth2bs)
---
At long last, Elon Musk took the helm and restored sanity to one of the world's biggest communications platforms. For context, we were locked out of our account earlier this year after (satirically) naming Admiral Rachel Levine, an openly transgender member of the Biden administration, our "Man of the Year.”
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6ht4kunlnmj3vadcmc8cr7ig3oup6umgja5pu20_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge9or4cth2bs)
---
Twitter's woke censors decided that this joke violated their "hateful conduct” policy and told us we could only resume use of the platform if we deleted the “offending" tweet. **We refused to bend the knee to the woke mob, so they left us locked out.** At the time, we were pretty sure that we'd never see the inside of the Twitterverse again. But then, in the most pleasant of surprises, a new, pro-free speech owner took the helm, and our fortunes took a considerable turn for the better. Needless to say, we're grateful to Elon Musk for doing the right thing and restoring free speech to Twitter. But more than anything, we're grateful to the thousands of loyal subscribers who sustained us through this difficult season. [**I'm sending you this email today because I want to invite you to become one of them. If you care at all about protecting your right to free speech online, I hope you'll use the promo code FREED, get 20 PERCENT OFF your Babylon Bee subscription, and help us become "cancel-proof" before the woke mob launches their next attack.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zsdcm3g6inr66frq9ju3nauvq07b9nh3sdjfu2lo_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge9or4cth2bs)
---
[Support the Bee - Become a Member](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zgbpm2euogjj5colugshbkspvmv76sgaso74ig7o_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge9or4cth2bs)
---
And I assure you -- it won't be long before that happens. Left-wing radicals at the Big Tech companies **_HATE_** the Bee because our satirical takedowns of their woke nonsense are their kryptonite. All day, every day, we expose the absurdity underlying their worldview through the wonderfully pleasant prism of satirical humor. **But as you and I both know, the radical Left has no sense of humor. They can't abide being mocked, so they silence voices like ours that dare to point out the truth.** Earlier this year, we were canceled without warning by our email vendor, and we went for weeks without being able to send or receive email. Then, we were locked out of TikTok for the crime of posting satire. We have been smeared by _The New York Times_ , "fact checked" (seriously!) by the left-wing site _Snopes_ , suspended by Facebook, and much more. It’s just a matter of time before the next woke platform decides that they can't handle our satirical content and locks us out permanently. And when that happens, we can't count on a free speech-loving billionaire to bail us out. We got lucky this time, but as the old saying goes, luck isn't a strategy. [**No -- our strategy for remaining cancel-proof hinges on an ever-growing base of free speech-loving, free-thinking friends just like you. I hope you'll help us continue the fight by becoming a subscriber right now.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zlv6bqncdpcvrniuhuuh7rjespgemvr3t7t2j9do_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge9or4cth2bs) [**And don't forget to use the promo code FREED for your 20 PERCENT OFF dicsount!**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zu8781c38g7cfp675rsimej7f8nucmd02i2usps8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge9or4cth2bs)
---
[Support the Bee - Become a Member](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5e9cf7lhn652ht5jailrd3v91cu64djfpgeprk8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge9or4cth2bs)
---
If they can cancel The Babylon Bee for satire, they can cancel you for far less. That’s why we're on the front lines every day, fighting to defend our right to speak out about what's right, what's wrong, and (especially) what's flat-out ridiculous. But we can't do it alone. [**Please stand with us today, and together, we can bring turn back the tide of woke censorship.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z890e4qh9tu89ug2tvhlknu3nevj60kvjhggrqmg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge9or4cth2bs)
---
[Support the Bee - Become a Member](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zro0p9imimuo0qc82fim85on6i7i5baor903lhh8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sjge9or4cth2bs)
---
| | Thank you, Seth Dillon CEO

name: Bob Casey
subject: Thank you for all that you've done this year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
We wouldn't be here without you. Thank you. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55436777/381693824/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmIzMzYyYy01NjcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oNGeQmQyOs_Mmpo-X10SVqR5Xb-1Dolmr18nSE6RMGQ=&emci=fb73d738-e370-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=efb3362c-5672-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=8943725) Peter,

Just two days ago, we reached our first end-of-month fundraising goal since Election Day thanks to the support of people like you.

Thank you for continuing to be a part of this team.

Next Tuesday's runoff in Georgia will finally bring the 2022 election cycle to a close, but it won't be the end of our work together.

We won our Democratic Senate majority in 2020 and defended it again this year because we kept on building momentum after winning this seat in 2018. And now, we're preparing to do it all over again. That's why it's so important that we reach goals like the one we set for November.

With your help, I know we can keep moving our Nation forward.

I'm truly thankful for all that you do,

Bob

P.S. If you missed your chance to donate in November, now is the perfect time to help us kick-off our year-end fundraising drive. [**Chip in now to help prepare for what's next.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55436778/381693852/647130792?refcode=em22_221202_eomthx_fndd_gq_act___bc_ettx&source=em22_221202_eomthx_fndd_gq_act___bc_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221202_eomthx_fndd_gq_act___bc_ettx&utm_medium=email&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmIzMzYyYy01NjcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oNGeQmQyOs_Mmpo-X10SVqR5Xb-1Dolmr18nSE6RMGQ=)

name: Nikki Haley
subject: We’re calling an audible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
The Left is running the same play AGAIN
|

---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62010436:6ZnOH2GNG:m:1:3331703221:F4B52A891ED70FD554372A17E2B042D2:r)
---

Hey Peter, this is Nikki Haley. Republicans have taken back the House and nearly took control of the Senate. But there's still one race left in 2022: Herschel Walker's runoff election in Georgia. It's 4th, and goal from the one-yard-line, and Herschel Walker has the ball. We need you up there blocking for him to get him into the end zone.

---
| | | [GET HERSCHEL INTO THE END ZONE: FLIP THIS SEAT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62010436:6ZnOH2GNG:m:1:3331703221:F4B52A891ED70FD554372A17E2B042D2:r)
---

The Georgia runoff is less than one week away, and the Left is already lining up its best players to defend against our conservative rush. \- Chuck Schumer
\- Bernie Sanders
\- AOC
\- President Biden They have all already put the full weight of their political machine behind Raphael Warnock, asking their wealthy donors from LA to New York for support. And their top supporters have heeded the call.

We're already behind, and we have just days to make up ground and get out the vote. The Left is already counting on a victory.

Can we count on you to stop them?

---
| | | [GET HERSCHEL INTO THE END ZONE: FLIP THIS SEAT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62010436:6ZnOH2GNG:m:1:3331703221:F4B52A891ED70FD554372A17E2B042D2:r)
---

My very best,
Nikki Haley

name: Joe Walsh via Blue Amp Action
subject: Though I'm no longer in the good graces of the Republican Party, I still have friends and sources over there. They think they're gonna win because of all the money Mitch McConnell has dumped into the race. We can't let that happen.
body:
democracy is on the line
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T27e7ac3e-eab3-4189-ad9e-2ef68d7dd0a2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8456033b-ba3c-4865-b3fc-97ac58310085/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, | _**This Republican is here to tell you that you have to support Senator Raphael Warnock if we want our democracy to survive. I am not being hyperbolic. **_ [**_Will you join me by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Senator Warnock, so he can hold onto his seat next week and we can hold onto our democracy?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ae00e68-b107-4550-9642-1007ba60d025/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Though I'm no longer in the good graces of the Republican Party, I still have friends and sources over there. They think they're gonna win because of all the money Mitch McConnell has dumped into the race. We can't let that happen._** As you probably know, I was once part of the problem. I was a Tea Party Republican who made the mistake of thinking outrage was why I was in Washington._ Once I saw I helped pave a path to electing someone as morally and emotionally unfit as Donald Trump, I knew I had to change._ **_That's why I'm supporting Senator Warnock, a good and decent man who will fight to protect our democracy._**
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Help Raphael Warnock save our democracy**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2679d048-9c18-4fff-bdd3-0751177ab5df/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_Look, I'll be honest with you, donations have been down the past few days. I get it, we're all tired after a long election cycle. But Mitch McConnell isn't tired. He's throwing $50 million into Georgia to buy another seat, and if we're gonna stop him we must support Senator Warnock with all we've got this last week._** I _f a former Tea Party Republican can donate to Warnock, everyone can pitch in for this final effort to ensure we have the votes in the Senate to strengthen our democracy. _ [**_So will you join me by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Senator Warnock, so he can hold onto his seat next week and we can hold onto our democracy?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9c90f6f3-6929-4ae6-8f03-2e1d59016747/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your determination to keep our republic. **Former GOP Congressman, and presidential candidate, Joe Walsh**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Raphael Warnock for Senate**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d525cc8-f9f2-42c5-a2fa-eef954647636/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/joewalshforwarnock2-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0c9b3d12-0f33-44e8-aa39-492e96fdfbf7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: please, don’t scroll away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend – I’ll keep this short:
Early voting is underway in our Senate race in Georgia. With just a few days to defend my seat, Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me.
That's why Donald Trump has visited our state multiple times to rally the GOP base for my opponent, Herschel Walker – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent millions smearing me with attack ads.
I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I'm fully counting on your grassroots support to power our movement to victory. We’ve done this once before, and I know we can do it again.
So please, friend, will you split $20 between me and Serve America – or as much as you can spare today – to help me defeat Herschel Walker and win in Georgia? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock]
Thank you for all that you do. None of this would be possible without you.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock]

name: Steve Scalise (Majority Leader-elect)
subject: Help me help you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
**Hi Friend -- It 's Majority Leader-elect Steve Scalise.** I'm looking for critical feedback before the next session of Congress begins and you're someone I know I can trust.
[******Will you take just 2 minutes of your time to answer my brand new Majority Leader Survey?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=19528528c41246bc8a3f8ee65fa9e2f5&_e=Io-ngxrW9qAatjQx4nZvTne3zF2DzzQOp8jdVXupNJRW7lU_avDnQj6VCIP5Dfdop3fZTg9BT9T5UbNTH3fmGhtyHmODkfUSZTzmUbE2m-SyLFo3Kdu1-1VV0OF03eA6VqLUDb2uZLCG4-lC5JukvN6tMop5qwZT9BRQdXEZ_ok5d7Zk78pHBLgySeAEJhigTUlfQBH1i6ShkTS6GodBVIiliy8fZB3BjXQcBzfvMKsvmfwFEtR6_MkXcQectSRCDAeZ_003J2l0zBiMoNrk3crcgf70CXvx8p1FH3JLEr1TgFVxSJ2aHKn5hnfzIBKC1sWIL5RHkma086WCtW2P_rTawIwFZgYDbGaE3_jNG5Wm5Qx4xEjND1o3SB9nhFa4tNhz4t9cHOrJvvUSdzIvDQxlJufI-95YqOA7G7-hZtCpHdcuH7A2WOpfh85flzxmCe5jOLXXv4hCeCuRNFnqRsAgNucc8yHuBgaiewGVDFc%3D)
**Here 's some of the things I need advice on:**
_Should a Republican Congress focus MORE or LESS on stopping Critical Race Theory in Schools?_
_Should a Republican Congress COMPLETE the Southern Border Wall?_
******[COMPLETE THE MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY NOW ->](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=19528528c41246bc8a3f8ee65fa9e2f5&_e=Io-ngxrW9qAatjQx4nZvTne3zF2DzzQOp8jdVXupNJRW7lU_avDnQj6VCIP5Dfdop3fZTg9BT9T5UbNTH3fmGhtyHmODkfUSZTzmUbE2m-SyLFo3Kdu1-1VV0OF03eA6VqLUDb2uZLCG4-lC5JukvN6tMop5qwZT9BRQdXEZ_ok5d7Zk78pHBLgySeAEJhigTUlfQBH1i6ShkTS6GodBVIiliy8fZB3BjXQcBzfvMKsvmfwFEtR6_MkXcQectSRCDAeZ_003J2l0zBiMoNrk3crcgf70CXvx8p1FH3JLEr1TgFVxSJ2aHKn5hnfzIBKCrtA8ub4_AJiN1DEq7UzjCqY_1HxdZTSfP4zahAWdkI1HnpvQMiko-e_NzQridbBNt5etNOyRAkUDftbU1cYoAM5ecmb0ecw3p3sALY9krf3-Ac2WCwSs3lN9Bv5vAQ5qCte-3LQVVreW3qlJqrS57RTWxu-hF7gidJFmBAFyP2A%3D)**

**President Obama and I just stepped off the rally stage here in Georgia.** It's an honor to have him by our side at this pivotal moment. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55439098/381703231/80330231?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221202_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmVmNGE2NC01YzcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f8Md14MOIzIv8y_2P92BlThzxGmgiB5oUC8OEBxd0TQ=) If you didn't get a chance to join our rally, here's what you need to know: **In 4 days, we're going to win this runoff election and keep Georgia blue.** But here’s the thing: Republicans know this, and they’re afraid. We narrowly led Herschel Walker in the general election – so now the GOP is flooding this race with more than $58 million to help Walker take the lead in these final days. They won’t hold back, and neither can we. name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Americans are doers.
body:
That's why you'll read this email.

The thing about Texans is that we're not ones to sit back, bitch, moan,
and complain about problems...

**We're doers**... which means we

**actually**

**take action** and

**do something** about it.

And I believe the same for

**real** Americans.

And in this Matrix we live in today, we need more Texans

**like us** to step up and help people unplug from it and wake up.

What does the movie, The Matrix, have to do with what's going on in
America today?

I'll get to that.

**But first...**

The Constitution clearly puts a restriction on the federal government,
not the citizen.

Using crisis and threats to our national security as an excuse,
legislation has been introduced by our government in the name of
"public safety," resulting in our liberties being stripped from us,
little by little, over time.

And now, the establishment & globalist elite have created their own
version of "The Matrix."

**Liberty has become an illusion** and we now live in an elaborate
simulation that is keeping the American people enslaved to the machine.

It has

**cost** us trillions of dollars and

**brainwashed** many Americans into electing people into office that
continue to violate the oath they took when they were elected.

We've replaced the word "liberty" with "freedom," and have
forgotten that they are not the same.

Freedom is internal while liberty is external - it's the state of
being free within society from oppressive restrictions imposed by
authority on one's way of life, behavior, or political & religious
views.

Our founding fathers understood this, and it's why they believed we
were endowed by our Creator with certain unalienable Rights... among
which are life,

****LIBERTY****, and the pursuit of happiness.

And it is of my humble opinion that my current Congressman, Rep. Dan
Crenshaw, has unfortunately become part of the problem.

Like many others, I had high hopes for Crenshaw and it pains me to even
think someone who served our country has abandoned their oath.

But on multiple occasions, Dan Crenshaw has complained about inflation
and acted as if he cared... however, he voted to pass a $1.5 Trillion
Omnibus funding Joe Biden's vaccine mandates right before voting to
send $40 Billion to Ukraine.

Kind if hypocritical, isn't it?

It's

**frustrating** to see someone who served as a Navy Seal be named a
Young Global Leader by Klaus Schwab and the World Economic Forum back in
2019.

**As a fifth-generation Texan**, it's

**frustrating** to have watched people like Dan Crenshaw remain silent
in 2020 as bureaucrats and big government tyrants mandated masks, shut
down businesses, and destroyed family incomes.

**And as an American**, it's

**frustrating** to know that the 2020 election was stolen only to have
my representative, Dan Crenshaw, be on record stating that he believes
Biden legitimately won.

So if

**you're like me** and

**you're a doer** who is sick and tired of the smoke and mirrors and
the gaslighting...

If

**you're frustrated** because you feel like your voice isn't being
heard and you're fed up with so-called "Republicans" voting away
your liberty and money...

Then I humbly ask for your support in helping me run against Dan the
upcoming 2024 Primaries by becoming a paid supporter on Locals... if you
haven't already.

My goal is 500 - 1000 paid supporters subscribed for $10 per month.

Only paid supporters will be able to access exclusive premium content
and take full advantage of what it is we're building together there.

But also... becoming a paid support will help ensure I earn enough in
the private sector to be able to focus full time on campaigning to
unseat Dan Crenshaw once and for all.

As an America First Constitutionalist, I will stand up to the globalist
agenda, fight to keep the government out of your life, and will be your
voice in Washington.

clean_body: That's why you'll read this email. The thing about Texans is that we're not ones to sit back, bitch, moan, and complain about problems... We're doers... which means we actually take action and do something about it. And I believe the same for real Americans. And in this Matrix we live in today, we need more Texans like us to step up and help people unplug from it and wake up. What does the movie, The Matrix, have to do with what's going on in America today? I'll get to that. But first... The Constitution clearly puts a restriction on the federal government, not the citizen. Using crisis and threats to our national security as an excuse, legislation has been introduced by our government in the name of "public safety," resulting in our liberties being stripped from us, little by little, over time. And now, the establishment & globalist elite have created their own version of "The Matrix." Liberty has become an illusion and we now live in an elaborate simulation that is keeping the American people enslaved to the machine. It has cost us trillions of dollars and brainwashed many Americans into electing people into office that continue to violate the oath they took when they were elected. We've replaced the word "liberty" with "freedom," and have forgotten that they are not the same. Freedom is internal while liberty is external - it's the state of being free within society from oppressive restrictions imposed by authority on one's way of life, behavior, or political & religious views. Our founding fathers understood this, and it's why they believed we were endowed by our Creator with certain unalienable Rights... among which are life, **LIBERTY, and the pursuit of happiness. And it is of my humble opinion that my current Congressman, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, has unfortunately become part of the problem. Like many others, I had high hopes for Crenshaw and it pains me to even think someone who served our country has abandoned their oath. But on multiple occasions, Dan Crenshaw has complained about inflation and acted as if he cared... however, he voted to pass a $1.5 Trillion Omnibus funding Joe Biden's vaccine mandates right before voting to send $40 Billion to Ukraine. Kind if hypocritical, isn't it? It's frustrating to see someone who served as a Navy Seal be named a Young Global Leader by Klaus Schwab and the World Economic Forum back in 2019. As a fifth-generation Texan, it's frustrating to have watched people like Dan Crenshaw remain silent in 2020 as bureaucrats and big government tyrants mandated masks, shut down businesses, and destroyed family incomes. And as an American, it's frustrating to know that the 2020 election was stolen only to have my representative, Dan Crenshaw, be on record stating that he believes Biden legitimately won. So if you're like me and you're a doer who is sick and tired of the smoke and mirrors and the gaslighting... If you're frustrated because you feel like your voice isn't being heard and you're fed up with so-called "Republicans" voting away your liberty and money... Then I humbly ask for your support in helping me run against Dan the upcoming 2024 Primaries by becoming a paid supporter on Locals... if you haven't already. My goal is 500 - 1000 paid supporters subscribed for $10 per month. Only paid supporters will be able to access exclusive premium content and take full advantage of what it is we're building together there. But also... becoming a paid support will help ensure I earn enough in the private sector to be able to focus full time on campaigning to unseat Dan Crenshaw once and for all. As an America First Constitutionalist, I will stand up to the globalist agenda, fight to keep the government out of your life, and will be your voice in Washington. If the button below doesn't work, click here instead: <> TAP IN TODAY <> For Liberty, GETTR <> Gab <> * Truth Social <> Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: VP Mike Pence
subject: America is a Pro-Life Country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Advancing American Freedom
body:
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62010466:6aTzD2GqN:m:1:3317145305:504D56C1F1014FF6D3F7CB422B7B5142:r)
---

**We 're in the thick of it.**
Thanks to the Supreme Court justices appointed during the Trump-Pence administration, the overturning of Roe v. Wade gave the country a new beginning for life. We can't squander our opportunity to make new gains in our laws and in our culture.

_**[First, we must defund Planned Parenthood.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62010466:6aTzD2GqN:m:1:3317145305:504D56C1F1014FF6D3F7CB422B7B5142:r "First, we must defund Planned Parenthood.")**_ The Trump-Pence Administration completely disqualified Planned Parenthood and __all of our country 's abortion providers__ from receiving federal funding for family planning programs that padded the budgets of abortion facilities and subsidized the killing of unborn children.

President Biden struck down this rule, and we must work to reinstate it alongside the Mexico City Policy that barred the U.S. funding of abortions abroad.

---
| | [CONTINUE THE FIGHT FOR LIFE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62010466:6aTzD2GqN:m:1:3317145305:504D56C1F1014FF6D3F7CB422B7B5142:r)
---

_**[Secondly, we must work to create a culture that views all life as the precious gift from God that it is.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62010466:6aTzD2GqN:m:1:3317145305:504D56C1F1014FF6D3F7CB422B7B5142:r "Secondly, we must
work to create a culture that views all life as the precious gift from God that it is.")**_ We must not only protect the religious freedom and conscience rights of those who defend life in our communities, but we must come alongside women in crisis pregnancies, and support the newborn with equal vigor.

These are the challenges that I'll be articulating all across this country, to leaders in cities large and small. If we come up with principles and compassion for the unborn, for newborns, for mothers with unexpected pregnancies, we can win the cause of life in America.

_**I hope you accept the call to continue fighting to protect the unborn and spreading the culture of life in America by donating to our mission today.**_

For Freedom,

Vice President Mike Pence
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62010466:6aTzD2GqN:m:1:3317145305:504D56C1F1014FF6D3F7CB422B7B5142:r)
---

---

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: I have some bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz
body:
Dear Peter:

I have some bad news.

We came up short of our $20,000 end-of-month goal.

**But I've extended the deadline until tonight because it's critical the MAGA movement sends a message to the swamp.**

**[Will you chip in a contribution to help me reach my goal before the extended deadline runs out](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61214471:WS7gVmDNV:m:1:2365227053:A44E32926BA495B70C4EE1CE68E1D04F:r)?** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61214471:WS7gVmDNV:m:1:2365227053:A44E32926BA495B70C4EE1CE68E1D04F:r) [**HELP MATT GATEZ FIGHT BACK
CHIP IN TODAY**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61214471:WS7gVmDNV:m:1:2365227053:A44E32926BA495B70C4EE1CE68E1D04F:r) **The new GOP majority takes power in just over one month.**

I'm a proud Donald Trump Republican who ran for Congress to drain the swamp.

And I will not stand for business as usual.

_That's why I proposed three simple rules for the new Congress_ :
---
• BAN lobbyists and federal PACs from funneling millions in swamp money to members of Congress. • OUTLAW members of Congress from trading stocks. Nancy Pelosi amassed a fortune during her time in Congress, and she was either the greatest stock picker of all time or feathered her own next with corrupt insider dealing. • LIMIT bills to one subject. No more funding the Green New Deal and hiring 87,000 new IRS agents in legislation written to supposedly combat the inflation crisis.
**Right now, the regime and the corrupt establishment are writing off the MAGA movement.**

The cheerleaders for the pre-Trump status quo of endless wars, open borders, and the revolving door of K Street lobbyists think now is the time for a comeback.

I need your help to slam that door shut.

But to do that, I need America First conservatives to deliver a show of strength.

And that means hitting our $20,000 goal.

**I've extended the deadline to midnight tonight.**

I'm willing to lead the fight in the next Congress to finish Donald Trump's work and drain the swamp.

However, I can't do that without showing the swamp alligators that I have a MAGA army standing behind me.

**[So please, chip in your most generous contribution before time runs out](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61214471:WS7gVmDNV:m:1:2365227053:A44E32926BA495B70C4EE1CE68E1D04F:r).** [**HELP DRAIN THE SWAMP
CHIP IN TODAY**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61214471:WS7gVmDNV:m:1:2365227053:A44E32926BA495B70C4EE1CE68E1D04F:r) [** CHIP IN $10 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61214471:WS7gVmDNV:m:1:2365227053:A44E32926BA495B70C4EE1CE68E1D04F:r) [** CHIP IN $25 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61214471:WS7gVmDNV:m:1:2365227053:A44E32926BA495B70C4EE1CE68E1D04F:r) [** CHIP IN $50 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61214471:WS7gVmDNV:m:1:2365227053:A44E32926BA495B70C4EE1CE68E1D04F:r) [** CHIP IN $100 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61214471:WS7gVmDNV:m:1:2365227053:A44E32926BA495B70C4EE1CE68E1D04F:r) [** CHIP IN NOW >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61214471:WS7gVmDNV:m:1:2365227053:A44E32926BA495B70C4EE1CE68E1D04F:r) Matt Gaetz
Congresman (R-FL)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61214471:WS7gVmDNV:m:1:2365227053:A44E32926BA495B70C4EE1CE68E1D04F:r)

name: Team BWC
subject: What are your expectations?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55440659/381708850/1328194270?refcode=BWC_EM_SV_120DO_20221202_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2M3NWU3Yy02MDcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyBNw_7n9djmMzJIomMTlr0ZaCo0IcGc7t-7isk-jB4=&emci=108c10af-bb71-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=27c75e7c-6072-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=30096098) | Bonnie is so excited to be working with the new and bold leadership of the House Democratic Caucus in 2023!

As Bonnie sets her agenda and we look toward the year to come it’s more important than ever for us to hear directly from New Jerseyans so we know which issues matter most to you.

_**[So that’s why we’re coming directly to our biggest supporters like you. Will you take one minute to tell us which issues you want us to focus on in the coming year? subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:

| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a3b161b79c441a991736f1bfdcb56bf&_e=zUWfF-A-uuU0ulmvFZYOE78gnO6OaJe_cVWP7jTUyMbtx89dB0W1JDUBQsN1PDdyHo20IdOXC83itrwJHNEMMCgPxItLVBg-H9XzKKaxF0KawQRRxWWU6Q3Z5j78hBjrehy0gUYl5nopsGOCbty6z0bWpKCuoJS5vLCbaO0Eh-j15r9mww7IbDFPUKDEcQdEm8v_7gKOLbOJ1KIN2Jw7II9soCZNRsHjr91K-s8E0YcSxywik7cqLQUHuvYWjNoR50E35Q8nbM-E6uEzzR9dmKL00pL16tG21VaS6kSnWGA46D1N5kCcNNQP40KTCLOM) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a3b161b79c441a991736f1bfdcb56bf&_e=zUWfF-A-uuU0ulmvFZYOE78gnO6OaJe_cVWP7jTUyMbtx89dB0W1JDUBQsN1PDdyHo20IdOXC83itrwJHNEMMCgPxItLVBg-H9XzKKaxF0KawQRRxWWU6Q3Z5j78hBjrehy0gUYl5nopsGOCbty6z0bWpKCuoJS5vLCbaO0Eh-gHaTIRqqYEYP8Qvfews5c26WPunMNjKeomne7Y2cLpN-j5a_vKTFNVYbGJ1OEJj-YxIfmKKSMrgNCPXgaIFDx6VTj0s73wH1iGP9LmGg30-CJ6mb20YxbVGlyHtkbDRKaMuOzGMOomoPRd2irOtXhR)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on. I won't allow it.

I'm Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a3b161b79c441a991736f1bfdcb56bf&_e=zUWfF-A-uuU0ulmvFZYOE78gnO6OaJe_cVWP7jTUyMbtx89dB0W1JDUBQsN1PDdyHo20IdOXC83itrwJHNEMMCgPxItLVBg-H9XzKKaxF0KawQRRxWWU6Q3Z5j78hBjrehy0gUYl5nopsGOCbty6z0bWpKCuoJS5vLCbaO0Eh-iqZN4_A3t9Z0wd-ubqFbosr2UYjksbSpR0mk0c5yMFNvCgJDKIxWmC5Oq-2-V-VbVd8JoZjh0zlFZBZIA7zg9tiJaOfU-PddfuEDJO5WfCidcWqdXnSkGU8FST1s3IgZAMRT8c_Oh3BiVnkghO9ppe)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I'm heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a3b161b79c441a991736f1bfdcb56bf&_e=zUWfF-A-uuU0ulmvFZYOE78gnO6OaJe_cVWP7jTUyMbtx89dB0W1JDUBQsN1PDdyHo20IdOXC83itrwJHNEMMCgPxItLVBg-H9XzKKaxF0KawQRRxWWU6Q3Z5j78hBjrehy0gUYl5nopsGOCbty6z0bWpKCuoJS5vLCbaO0Eh-gVuSy8TPDJGItgx-pDM8_D8k2iqJ3qMV_DMz6-nIVSpPJKQ4g1JROtUR-WVALkkgSx8r6-o2yblO56snqyQhp1IuT-eXsfgrTByLyvf2xbwhm6FvzaTkAxd7VWOmbXBss5DGNY3uwTePNBWmRWSsIE)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn't commit.

[But there's something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch's critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a3b161b79c441a991736f1bfdcb56bf&_e=zUWfF-A-uuU0ulmvFZYOE78gnO6OaJe_cVWP7jTUyMbtx89dB0W1JDUBQsN1PDdyHo20IdOXC83itrwJHNEMMCgPxItLVBg-H9XzKKaxF0KawQRRxWWU6Q3Z5j78hBjrehy0gUYl5nopsGOCbty6z0bWpKCuoJS5vLCbaO0Eh-j0QFSSpxMw5nim3pz1XDBsfVGslOcnKhd8N1Yd1X9OSf3ut7z26Wf_xrdiaHuzsF3L-f2mv1coO6mgRIzOpJ5rINr9x4XztpkDG9bBRqDtkPW972CHfFVYqQsWRap2vd3gHWrAfkWUPY-s1kiQ5GY_)
---

name: Casey Given
subject: VIDEO messages inside for you
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011779:6twwi2GNC:m:1:3253819041:17EAB8A4291F92638CBEB662A6362016:r)
Hello Peter,

I'm on a mission to tell 100,000 high school students about the horrors of authoritarian socialism.

We've already gone to several high schools this semester, and it's been a huge success.

This is a subject that students don't learn about in the classroom.

These stories are more powerful than any movie or book could portray.

That's why I've set a goal to raise $50,000 before the end of the year to send our speakers to 50 schools.

[_**Peter, I am humbly asking you to help reach this goal with a gift of any amount. Click here to send your support >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011779:6twwi2GNC:m:1:3253819041:17EAB8A4291F92638CBEB662A6362016:r)

I want to share a little bit of what students will be hearing from our speakers, so I've included a video message from Grace Jo, Frances Hui, and Daniel Di Martino.

**GRACE JO**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011779:6twwi2GNC:m:1:3253819041:17EAB8A4291F92638CBEB662A6362016:r)

Grace was born in North Korea, where she almost starved to death as a child.

There, most of her family die of starvation, including her father, who was also tortured in jail because he left the country to find food for his family. One of Grace's older sisters went missing in China while she was searching for food to bring back. She was probably sold into human trafficking.

Grace, her mother, and one sister tried to escape North Korea many times but were repatriated, imprisoned, and tortured.

In 2006, when Pastor Philip Buck bribed North Korean agents, Grace and her two remaining family members finally escaped. **Grace moved to America in 2008 and became one of 370 refugees from North Korea.**

[_**Help Grace and our other speakers share their experiences with more high school students this year. Click here to send a gift to the Dissident Project today >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011779:6twwi2GNC:m:1:3253819041:17EAB8A4291F92638CBEB662A6362016:r)

**FRANCES HUI**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011780:6twwi2GNC:m:1:3253819041:17EAB8A4291F92638CBEB662A6362016:r)

**Frances Hui is the first Hong Kong activist to receive political asylum in America. **

At the early age of 13, Hui started her involvement in Hong Kong's social movements. She was a former standing committee member of Scholarism and a campaigner for multiple pro-democracy candidates in Hong Kong.

Hui's column, _" I am from Hong Kong, not China,"_ was featured by many international media outlets and was a widespread piece across the globe.

Currently based in the US, she heads the organization, We The Hongkongers, as the director dedicated to promoting and strengthening the culture and identity of Hongkongers abroad.

[_**If you share our mission of educating high school students on the dangers of communism, can you send a gift of any amount? Click here to send your support >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011780:6twwi2GNC:m:1:3253819041:17EAB8A4291F92638CBEB662A6362016:r)

**DANIEL DI MARTINO**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011781:6twwi2GNC:m:1:3253819041:17EAB8A4291F92638CBEB662A6362016:r)

**Daniel Di Martino is the founder of the Dissident Project.**

Born and raised in Venezuela, Di Martino experienced the terrible consequences of socialism firsthand. His family lost everything as hyperinflation made money worthless.

After leaving Venezuela for the United States in 2016, he dedicated himself to explaining how socialism destroyed his homeland, advocating for freedom, and stopping this ideology from ever being implemented in America and elsewhere.

Daniel has appeared dozens of times on national TV channels such as Fox News and CNN, written for the USA Today, National Review, and other news outlets, and regularly speaks at college campuses and events all over the country.

**Our speakers remind high school students that authoritarian socialism isn 't a thing of the past. Each of them has lived through it! **

I hope you can see the importance of the Dissident Project, Peter.

That's why we're raising $50,000 to send our speakers to 50 schools and connect with students. **Click below to send your gift. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011782:6twwi2GNC:m:1:3253819041:17EAB8A4291F92638CBEB662A6362016:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011783:6twwi2GNC:m:1:3253819041:17EAB8A4291F92638CBEB662A6362016:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011784:6twwi2GNC:m:1:3253819041:17EAB8A4291F92638CBEB662A6362016:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011785:6twwi2GNC:m:1:3253819041:17EAB8A4291F92638CBEB662A6362016:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011786:6twwi2GNC:m:1:3253819041:17EAB8A4291F92638CBEB662A6362016:r)

Thank you,

Casey Given

clean_body: Hello Peter, I'm on a mission to tell 100,000 high school students about the horrors of authoritarian socialism. We've already gone to several high schools this semester, and it's been a huge success. This is a subject that students don't learn about in the classroom. These stories are more powerful than any movie or book could portray. That's why I've set a goal to raise $50,000 before the end of the year to send our speakers to 50 schools. I want to share a little bit of what students will be hearing from our speakers, so I've included a video message from Grace Jo, Frances Hui, and Daniel Di Martino. GRACE JO Grace was born in North Korea, where she almost starved to death as a child. There, most of her family die of starvation, including her father, who was also tortured in jail because he left the country to find food for his family. One of Grace's older sisters went missing in China while she was searching for food to bring back. She was probably sold into human trafficking. Grace, her mother, and one sister tried to escape North Korea many times but were repatriated, imprisoned, and tortured. In 2006, when Pastor Philip Buck bribed North Korean agents, Grace and her two remaining family members finally escaped. Grace moved to America in 2008 and became one of 370 refugees from North Korea. FRANCES HUI Frances Hui is the first Hong Kong activist to receive political asylum in America. At the early age of 13, Hui started her involvement in Hong Kong's social movements. She was a former standing committee member of Scholarism and a campaigner for multiple pro-democracy candidates in Hong Kong. Hui's column, " I am from Hong Kong, not China," was featured by many international media outlets and was a widespread piece across the globe. Currently based in the US, she heads the organization, We The Hongkongers, as the director dedicated to promoting and strengthening the culture and identity of Hongkongers abroad. DANIEL DI MARTINO Daniel Di Martino is the founder of the Dissident Project. Born and raised in Venezuela, Di Martino experienced the terrible consequences of socialism firsthand. His family lost everything as hyperinflation made money worthless. After leaving Venezuela for the United States in 2016, he dedicated himself to explaining how socialism destroyed his homeland, advocating for freedom, and stopping this ideology from ever being implemented in America and elsewhere. Daniel has appeared dozens of times on national TV channels such as Fox News and CNN, written for the USA Today, National Review, and other news outlets, and regularly speaks at college campuses and events all over the country. Our speakers remind high school students that authoritarian socialism isn 't a thing of the past. Each of them has lived through it! I hope you can see the importance of the Dissident Project, Peter. That's why we're raising $50,000 to send our speakers to 50 schools and connect with students. Click below to send your gift. Thank you, Casey Given The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. name: Richard Walker
subject: A sickness in medical schools
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011789:J4Bni2GN-:m:1:3331421248:58158A94E085D11BC670C5AC7B489D8E:r)

Hello Peter,

Trust in the medical field is flatlining.

The doctor-patient relationship has become weak due to these underlying symptoms:
1. Government control over the medical sector is increasing, making it harder for doctors to be independent.

2. Medical schools are turning into woke, social just activist training camps.

3. Big pharma and large hospital conglomerates crush smaller practices that can't afford to keep up with increased regulations. Most doctors are becoming employees of administrators who only care about the bottom line instead of patients' best interests.

Let me introduce myself. I am Richard Walker, Executive Director at the Benjamin Rush Institute (BRI).

**The Benjamin Rush Institute is the cure for the doctor-patient relationship. **

We're fighting to help medical students overcome the push toward socialized, government-controlled healthcare. Our medical school chapters host meaningful, engaging, educational events like debates, panel discussions, movie screenings, journal clubs, and more.

**That 's why I've set a goal to raise $10,000 to help BRI reach the next generation of medical students.** [_**Can I count on you to donate today to support our student chapters? Click here to send your urgent gift >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011789:J4Bni2GN-:m:1:3331421248:58158A94E085D11BC670C5AC7B489D8E:r)

**Be honest:_Do you trust the new, young doctors that graduate from medical school today?_**

Most medical students today rarely receive instruction about healthcare policy. If they do, however, the focus overwhelmingly promotes a government-mandated insurance company approach to healthcare.

_They rarely -- if ever -- encounter a voice promoting free enterprise and the sanctity of the patient-doctor relationship._

**BRI fills the gap in schools where free enterprise healthcare policy discussions are under-represented or even entirely absent.**

BRI's Chapters give medical students a place to learn how a free enterprise healthcare policy can deliver affordable, quality medical care to their patients.

But _we count on people like you_ to help establish and support our medical school chapters.

[_**If your answer to the question above was _" no" _or _" I'm not sure,"_ then I hope you will show your support with a gift of any amount today >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011789:J4Bni2GN-:m:1:3331421248:58158A94E085D11BC670C5AC7B489D8E:r)

BRI's mission is to protect the doctor-patient relationship as the primary means of delivering quality medical care and rely on free enterprise -- _not bureaucratic dictates_ -- to encourage life-saving innovation and reduce costs.

**We believe the best way to deliver affordable, quality medical care is through _a free enterprise, limited government system_. **

The members of our chapters are future doctors who want to promote healthcare freedom and preserve the sanctity of a direct patient-doctor relationship.

**But without your urgent donation, their voices may be drowned out and disappear from medical school campuses.**

Please help me empower the next generation of medical students. **Click below to give a gift today.**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011790:J4Bni2GN-:m:1:3331421248:58158A94E085D11BC670C5AC7B489D8E:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>> **_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011791:J4Bni2GN-:m:1:3331421248:58158A94E085D11BC670C5AC7B489D8E:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011792:J4Bni2GN-:m:1:3331421248:58158A94E085D11BC670C5AC7B489D8E:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011793:J4Bni2GN-:m:1:3331421248:58158A94E085D11BC670C5AC7B489D8E:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011794:J4Bni2GN-:m:1:3331421248:58158A94E085D11BC670C5AC7B489D8E:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011795:J4Bni2GN-:m:1:3331421248:58158A94E085D11BC670C5AC7B489D8E:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011796:J4Bni2GN-:m:1:3331421248:58158A94E085D11BC670C5AC7B489D8E:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62011789:J4Bni2GN-:m:1:3331421248:58158A94E085D11BC670C5AC7B489D8E:r)

Thank you,

Richard W. Walker
Executive Director
Benjamin Rush Institute
