subject: Marriage Equality Bill Passes Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Senators Warner and Kaine have brought us one step closer to preserving and expanding LGBTQ civil rights.

|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55443023/381718249/-1925813607?refcode=dpva-em-221202-rfma&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmZmM2U4ZS02NTcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hpoeXciRMJ-g_rrEAUt3uuw_35k49YgjBoyCbsRWS9c=) Derek, Virginia is for lovers – and Senators Warner and Kaine made history this past week as the Senate took the first steps towards enshrining in federal law the right of all Americans to marry who they love. The Respect for Marriage Act ensures that all states must recognize marriages between same-sex couples, protecting LGBTQ rights against any potential assaults from the GOP-led Supreme Court. The fight to protect the rights of our LGBTQ neighbors is far from over – but Democrats like Senators Warner and Kaine are stepping up to protect these rights. **[Can we count on you to chip in and help continue the hard, necessary work to preserve these critical civil rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55443024/381718250/-1925813607?refcode=dpva-em-221202-rfma&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmZmM2U4ZS02NTcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hpoeXciRMJ-g_rrEAUt3uuw_35k49YgjBoyCbsRWS9c=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Senators Warner and Kaine have brought us one step closer to preserving and expanding LGBTQ civil rights. | = Derek, Virginia is for lovers – and Senators Warner and Kaine made history this past week as the Senate took the first steps towards enshrining in federal law the right of all Americans to marry who they love. The Respect for Marriage Act ensures that all states must recognize marriages between same-sex couples, protecting LGBTQ rights against any potential assaults from the GOP-led Supreme Court. The fight to protect the rights of our LGBTQ neighbors is far from over – but Democrats like Senators Warner and Kaine are stepping up to protect these rights. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ********=****** ******=****** ******=****** ******=****** This week’s victory in the Senate reminds us how much still needs to be done to protect every American’s right to marry who they love, but it’s the first step towards preserving and expanding LGBTQ civil rights. = VADEMS =****** =******** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. | | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---

name: Vince Speranza, American Veterans Center
subject: I fought at the Battle of the Bulge
body:
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be6d9b62a30247e28172a13d910bcc57&_e=nFJ9-bJJZ2dncHp0ELk5MowWbwX2CaLiC4ZxITxTzDXP_TT-bOzoTorWbDdbE4X_7uRYKaTBVaqK5ajfxYu_AtmvROrj4MDDiq1KK-KaUUz-d_Tex4Jv9ofMoV5fXD6idZI4TyugpArr_Xt_NIdpGy33lWt0w443R2RC1nfvzdoK99L9r5PVu5pQzOmgW8alYzRNaI8VcwyIyeXgls9-8O3titYHiLCn_9pw8YLzlGQqixK0Snec4nGE2yL3_A1cQAElKPYF1C41K1Ba1lfM7Vluo5s1ukAbu_b1qcbqFUo%3D)
---
Fellow American, I was a 19-year-old machine gunner at the Battle of the Bulge in World War II. _And I didn 't talk about my Army service for more than 65 years after that._ **But my life changed forever when, as an 85-year-old, I returned to Bastogne, Belgium to pay my respects to my fallen comrades.** On my first day, a local man hugged me and thanked me for my service. Then he took my daughter and me to the area that my division - the 101st Airborne, also known as the "Screaming Eagles" - had held. I even identified the _exact_ location of my foxhole.
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be6d9b62a30247e28172a13d910bcc57&_e=nFJ9-bJJZ2dncHp0ELk5MowWbwX2CaLiC4ZxITxTzDXP_TT-bOzoTorWbDdbE4X_7uRYKaTBVaqK5ajfxYu_AtmvROrj4MDDiq1KK-KaUUz-d_Tex4Jv9ofMoV5fXD6idZI4TyugpArr_Xt_NIdpG-DNQHRBOOKZ8oyCA-btl7vX6J3MT5clbW_IHbuFrwytTTFrKRR1qN-mVzpRIo0ehxZYlMarSGVU0FvbM27qE4PgpbqVipgfe3wvZ_g_y8oPTefk4o2BiFr_c93tEd8LHa0IlWqz2snY0sdYQJo4TlE%3D)
---
_Above: My friends at the American Veterans Center released a video documentary about my World War II service in July 2021._
---
Today, I've shared my story with thousands of Americans, and my 56-minute video documentary with the American Veterans Center (AVC) has been seen nearly 1 million times online. **So when my friends at the American Veterans Center told me they were launching an urgent campaign to honor even more veterans ' legacies, I knew that I had to act.** I know how powerful - and critically important - the American Veterans Center's work is to honor servicemen and women like me. [**Can I count on you to help AVC continue their important mission with your generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be6d9b62a30247e28172a13d910bcc57&_e=nFJ9-bJJZ2dncHp0ELk5MowWbwX2CaLiC4ZxITxTzDXP_TT-bOzoTorWbDdbE4X_7uRYKaTBVaqK5ajfxYu_AtmvROrj4MDDiq1KK-KaUUz-d_Tex4Jv9ofMoV5fXD6idZI4TyugpArr_Xt_NIdpGzqdClVTgQ5mK0FzYq1hE5HhDKw-zSBdc9-4uXdblsydFzDXFDcPqcQOs6D2lv11Yd190b7Ns9Uc75fLNmPVXOX0TKd0PEG5Pjv72UKtOkYafk-9B7-lIcVI1AmOesy2354GoT5CHbJwnixvf0NYDFI%3D)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be6d9b62a30247e28172a13d910bcc57&_e=nFJ9-bJJZ2dncHp0ELk5MowWbwX2CaLiC4ZxITxTzDXP_TT-bOzoTorWbDdbE4X_7uRYKaTBVaqK5ajfxYu_AtmvROrj4MDDiq1KK-KaUUz-d_Tex4Jv9ofMoV5fXD6idZI4TyugpArr_Xt_NIdpG2_XWkdHufyPhZHeBsjsAL7nEHyt96p6mBgUDETTKT6YSDCFKeIyeBQ8G1Daf_1xcjacii2PzPaXvFyJ3rkktcTmFceUpGfOCnF3XHe9UTJPMro1qfeyKKoe_8iwUuRJ0vfxUzGyOHeN2vdGJE6fFj0%3D)
---
**When I visited Bastogne for the first time since the Battle of the Bulge, I was stunned to learn that I had become a local legend.** More than 65 years ago, I'd brought back beer for wounded soldiers in my unit - and, since there were few taverns open and no glasses to be found, I'd poured it all into my helmet. I told this story to a few locals on my trip to Bastogne ... and I couldn't believe it when they led me to a bar that served "Airborne Beer" in honor of the event. **I never imagined that a Belgian beer would be part of my legacy, but thanks to American Veterans Center supporters like you, it 's now part of our shared American history, too.**
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be6d9b62a30247e28172a13d910bcc57&_e=nFJ9-bJJZ2dncHp0ELk5MowWbwX2CaLiC4ZxITxTzDXP_TT-bOzoTorWbDdbE4X_7uRYKaTBVaqK5ajfxYu_AtmvROrj4MDDiq1KK-KaUUz-d_Tex4Jv9ofMoV5fXD6idZI4TyugpArr_Xt_NIdpGwQOXjf0nTUj66GVkjc77-rUlvIYQ6wT5mjblnBhFfZbJDVYYOWvxERbwCNQG9_KC1-LvVG77caMDdAdhaQtlV_1PoevE57o8XRRqMZ4qj0ziwqQUrM_oFWr8ekaJinlreGLn-ekiU1DV4dH2hd1JLo%3D)
---
No other organization does as many programs - or as deeply thorough work - to preserve and honor our veterans' legacies like the American Veterans Center. The many important programs of the American Veterans Center include:
* **The Annual Veterans Conference in Washington, D.C.,** where I was honored to speak on a panel of fellow veterans and share our hard-won lessons with the students and military cadets in attendance.

* **The powerful oral history and video documentary project.** These videos are recorded at _no cost_ to veterans; in fact, AVC usually sends their video team to veterans' homes and, after the production is complete, gives veterans and their families a keepsake copy.

* **The National Memorial Day Parade** , which AVC brought back to its full glory after it hadn't been held for many decades. Today, it's the largest Memorial Day commemoration in the country, and thousands of servicemen and women, from World War II to active-duty forces, march in it.

But the American Veterans Center is only able to offer these programs with the generous support of patriotic Americans like you. [**That 's why I hope you'll make your most generous, tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more to help support the American Veterans Center today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be6d9b62a30247e28172a13d910bcc57&_e=nFJ9-bJJZ2dncHp0ELk5MowWbwX2CaLiC4ZxITxTzDXP_TT-bOzoTorWbDdbE4X_7uRYKaTBVaqK5ajfxYu_AtmvROrj4MDDiq1KK-KaUUz-d_Tex4Jv9ofMoV5fXD6idZI4TyugpArr_Xt_NIdpG19w_5W215Z3U8IV7FPUd8H88ZfNYEwi4IK9j2iQa3oCf2qLilQjx7qZcj66tEslg-A8yAEdze2pyWhCb-N20n6QskpDu0ejbwzpHjh8uAxTGSbm4ZBxhMz9T3GxpiDrW9adzZFMu0LjuX5h8too8MI%3D)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be6d9b62a30247e28172a13d910bcc57&_e=nFJ9-bJJZ2dncHp0ELk5MowWbwX2CaLiC4ZxITxTzDXP_TT-bOzoTorWbDdbE4X_7uRYKaTBVaqK5ajfxYu_AtmvROrj4MDDiq1KK-KaUUz-d_Tex4Jv9ofMoV5fXD6idZI4TyugpArr_Xt_NIdpG7L5Oht9P0yaRd0GpNsrBxS-LvKAEdPl2oG1o2BSZSWcZDzUqYY5WAYCrSV-yM2RfjFoOSnW3TqG3K2PvByrFgxOXCcnZWp6XReK2zByT-YRt0LWpUTSCCTOHEBS7VJrk5yihBiS7ivDQ_-qHfHD-yM%3D)
---
I didn't tell the story of my World War II experience for 65 years. I didn't even watch movies about the military - I just couldn't. But once I returned to Bastogne and met men and women who remembered the war, everything changed. **Sharing my experience as a World War II veteran - at AVC's Annual Conference, in AVC's video documentary, at special events, and in my own memoir - changed my life tremendously and for the better.** Now you have the opportunity to help veterans like me share their stories and know that their legacies will be recorded, preserved, and honored - today and in future generations. [**Please make your most generous gift to the American Veterans Center right now.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be6d9b62a30247e28172a13d910bcc57&_e=nFJ9-bJJZ2dncHp0ELk5MowWbwX2CaLiC4ZxITxTzDXP_TT-bOzoTorWbDdbE4X_7uRYKaTBVaqK5ajfxYu_AtmvROrj4MDDiq1KK-KaUUz-d_Tex4Jv9ofMoV5fXD6idZI4TyugpArr_Xt_NIdpGwHFE_Gn83R4YpFvzyFSrpEF1FkjJZQlSWp10K58UBQwzkHyaUz5zQVQrp19zQ-oew_qI1H68ylylWEDraOvheEXJ9oAubqjXYFkttXcPFlqeCxwj_vQBvLOyTV2g70P-chhn5YbPcNuu1BudA15s5U%3D) Thank you,

body:
While Election Day might not have been the knockout we needed, I’m here to tell you... [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7598%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=aXqa8o0LsM0JOrxrOBeJHg&sysid=1)
| |
---
| | Friend, it’s Rand Paul.
The fight for liberty **ISN’T** over. With Herschel Walker and Raphael Warnock of Georgia moving into a runoff on December 6th, _**we have 1 final chance to narrow Democrat control of the Senate.**_ And _everything_ hinges on winning this critical seat. With most Democrat seats up for grabs in 2024, we need to win every seat possible NOW to help us take control of the Senate. This next election is the last opportunity for me to lead a committee to investigate the origins of COVID because Democrats refuse to. It’s the last opportunity for someone to _finally_ hold Dr. Fauci accountable for all the lies and destruction he inflicted on the American people. If you want a conservative senator like me leading those efforts in the U.S. Senate, then I need **YOUR SUPPORT. ** **The _Protect Freedom PAC_ is working in Georgia to ensure that Herschel Walker is victorious on December 6th.** [**Friend, with liberty on the line and the fate of our country hanging in the balance, will rush a critical victory donation now to send Walker to Victory?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77240%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XUWkkugvQpsuLs8TJ%2b6KnA&sysid=1)

| | We wanted to send you a quick (but important) update from our team here in Georgia → It’s full steam ahead in the Peach State as voting is underway in the U.S. Senate Runoff Election. This election will determine more than the balance of power in the Senate — it’s a key moment in the fight to expand voting rights and ballot access in future elections. **And voting rights advocates from across the country understand the weight of this moment. We’re blown away that donations have been flooding in to support our critical work:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55443528/381720390/147276702?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221202_f_f_ty_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTc3MDA1Ny02NzcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7DSCvV6d-Lj8FRm0ZOnohqjsEM5ShrrFvhbDsbC5AJ8=) Thank you. clean_body: Thank you for being in this fight. | | | We wanted to send you a quick (but important) update from our team here in Georgia → It’s full steam ahead in the Peach State as voting is underway in the U.S. Senate Runoff Election. This election will determine more than the balance of power in the Senate — it’s a key moment in the fight to expand voting rights and ballot access in future elections. And voting rights advocates from across the country understand the weight of this moment. We’re blown away that donations have been flooding in to support our critical work: = Thank you. It’s because of supporters like you that we’re able to continue scaling up and powering our voter protection efforts in the final days of this race — but there’s still more work to do. During this Runoff Election, Fair Fight remains committed to combating voter suppression. It’s crucial that we do everything possible to elect voting rights champions to represent us — and to ensure anti-voter, anti-democracy politicians stay far away from office. = | = = = = = Let’s keep empowering young and Black and brown voters to show up in record numbers to the polls. Let’s continue working to elect pro-democracy, pro-voter candidates like Senator Raphael Warnock. And let’s keep defending the freedom to vote in elections to come. Thank you for everything, The Fair Fight Team | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2022 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. | | Derek, In the days since the election, I have been reflecting on what it means that Democrats held our majority in the Senate. I want to share a couple thoughts with you and hope you’ll take a moment to hear me out. First off, we need to recognize what an incredible achievement this represents. The grassroots of the Democratic Party came together, working together to defy the odds in a way not seen since the days of JFK. That’s how long it’s been since Democrats did so well in a midterm as tough as this, and it’s worth celebrating. Here’s what’s on my mind now. The truth is, a 50-50 Senate is just not enough. We need to expand our majority by helping Raphael Warnock win his crucial runoff next week. _[**In a moment, I am going to ask you to help Rev. Warnock out, but first I want to give you a few reasons why it is so important.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55443696/381720830/-104791541?refcode=mw_em_221202_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGYzMGFhNi02NzcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z-M9JsA7QdAI7Uyx8BnFqJXv4R8I6IhAElRvOz5Tp5U=)_ 1\. The first reason is time. Under Senate rules, a 50-vote majority requires a power-sharing agreement with Republicans that will slow the Senate down dramatically. A 51-vote majority means clear Democratic control, with the ability to fast-track legislation and nominees. It means more progress and less of a chance that a setback, whether a sick Senator or a cancelled flight, grinds our work to a halt. We need Rev. Warnock in the Senate for that to happen. 2\. We can still make progress, even under closely divided government. With a narrow Senate majority and the House on the knife’s edge of GOP control, I’ll acknowledge how tough things will be over the next two years. But I believe in Democrats’ ability to lead despite these challenges. Over the past few years, we have kept the government running and avoided disastrous shutdowns. And I’m proud to have passed important bills on infrastructure, COVID relief, climate change, inflation reduction, and more – largely through bipartisan efforts. We can and must try to solve our nation’s challenges, and a 51-vote majority gives us more leverage to lead on important legislation. 3\. Another reason we need 51 votes is the courts. The _Dobbs_ decision was a painful reminder of how critical it is that we appoint federal judges at every level who will put the rule of law over a partisan agenda. Without Rev. Warnock and a 51-vote majority, judicial nominations will take longer and be much harder to push through. 4\. Candidly, the 2024 Senate map is going to be even tougher. Winning the Georgia runoff is a down payment on our chances at holding the majority for years to come. 5\. Finally, there’s Raphael Warnock himself. We’ve been hearing pundits talk about how “candidate quality” mattered this cycle, and Rev. Warnock is case in point. In just his first two years, he has emerged as a champion for voting rights and democracy, while proving he can win tough elections in a conservative state. We need leaders of his caliber in the Senate now more than ever. _[**This is what’s at stake, Derek. Rev. Warnock needs our help to win this runoff and expand our Democratic majority. If you haven’t donated yet this cycle, now is the time. It is truly that important. Can I count on you?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55443697/381720831/-104791541?refcode=mw_em_221202_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGYzMGFhNi02NzcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z-M9JsA7QdAI7Uyx8BnFqJXv4R8I6IhAElRvOz5Tp5U=)_ [**I need your help to tell the people of Arizona, and America, the TRUTH.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvdv1d9cv2uf9b87s3buhbjcc3pvdlioqdvndatg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1g64o32c5h2bs)

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007729:JkbqW2GNg:m:1:3370555685:01344053A122D2603C6D1AD73A8B66E6:r)**

But McConnell's plan has a vulnerability, like the Death Star's thermal exhaust port that allowed my alter ego to destroy it._ **_That vulnerability is you.[Sen. Warnock works for you--the people--he doesn't take corporate PAC money. If you dig deep these last few days of the campaign, we can re-elect him](https://default.salsalabs.org/T00eaba04-3ecf-42f7-95ed-4222dcc54bf0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9),_ and you'll have surely destroyed a Death Star as I did.**

| _Here are the key numbers to know:_ **4 days** How long we have til the runoff to defend Sen. Warnock's seat.
**7 million.** The number of registered voters across Georgia Sen. Warnock must reach with his people-powered message. **$50,000.** How much Senator Warnock's needs to raise before midnight to ramp up voter mobilization down the final stretch. **$58,000,000.** How much GOP donors are throwing behind electing Herschel Walker. [**_Will you join me--a Skywalker always looking beyond the stars to a brighter future--by giving $10, $25 or whatever you can_ _so we win this crucial race and deny Mitch McConnell the slightest shred of power in the next Senate?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T242e480b-fca5-4d22-a776-8efab797e876/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. —

| | | Peter,

**The Senate and our nation are on the line.**

In the Georgia runoff election, **Republican Herschel Walker** is facing an almost overwhelming blue wall of Democrat dark money.

Chuck Schumer, Joe Biden, and the Democrats are one seat away from finishing their plan to destroy the Constitution and radically transform America.

_**[Will you help Republicans stand with Herschel Walker and SAVE our country? 1300% MATCHING IS LIVE if you rush a donation today>>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62012198:JrF0W2GUN:m:1:3253819041:F65F9E2A338A6682172FDACDB4F3D8AD:r "Will you help

name: Senator Raphael Warnock
subject: just a cup of coffee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Friend, what if I told you that you could help us win our critical race here in Georgia for the price of a cup of coffee?
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55426531/381652098/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5236-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTg1M2IzZC00MTcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5X8eRAwZodUXZttZD2kxsSWh-tQgaeD7eFnFiBoANHU=) Friend, what if I told you that you could help us win our critical race here in Georgia for the price of a cup of coffee? It's true!

Georgia is now the key to expanding Senate control, and with all signs pointing to a tight race, we're running out of time to raise the funds we need to power this campaign to victory.

**[When you donate $5 today (the price of just a cup of coffee), every dollar will go directly toward reaching as many voters as we possibly can in this crucial final stretch. Please, can you chip in now to keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55426532/381652099/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5236-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTg1M2IzZC00MTcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5X8eRAwZodUXZttZD2kxsSWh-tQgaeD7eFnFiBoANHU=)**
Here's the deal: GOP donors are pouring well over $58 million into Walker's campaign to turn Georgia red. Even before we were officially in a runoff election, _NBC News_ reported that this is the most expensive race in the entire country.
Unlike Walker, I'm running this campaign without a cent from corporate PACs. That's because I'm in this race to represent everyday folks, not corporations and megadonors. **But that means I can't fight back against this flood of GOP spending, pull ahead, and win in the next 4 days without grassroots supporters like you, chipping in $5 at a time.**
**[Please, friend, can I count on you to give just $5 today – or whatever you would spend at your next trip to the coffee shop – to help me reach more voters, win in Georgia, and expand the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55426533/381652100/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5236-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTg1M2IzZC00MTcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5X8eRAwZodUXZttZD2kxsSWh-tQgaeD7eFnFiBoANHU=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55426534/381652101/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5236-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTg1M2IzZC00MTcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5X8eRAwZodUXZttZD2kxsSWh-tQgaeD7eFnFiBoANHU=)

Thank you so much. Your support means so much.

– Rev. Warnock

name: National Rifle Association
subject: The Second Amendment is at risk in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
Help us defend our freedoms | The eyes of our nation are on Georgia. Every seat in the Senate is of critical importance...
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62012369:J7eQ72GcN:m:1:3331703221:123D9BE7C2AC9B66E987E7C905C711A9:r)

Peter,

**The eyes of our nation are on Georgia.**

Every seat in the Senate is of critical importance; the fate of the Second Amendment could come down to _just one vote._

We all know what Joe Biden and his Democrat cronies will do if they go unchecked. **They won't stop until every lawfully owned firearm is banned, registered, confiscated, and destroyed.** With everyone's attention on Georgia, we need to do everything in our power to help **save the Second Amendment** for the great people of that state. _That's why we're calling on you, Peter, to chip in TODAY._

Let's be clear: **We NEED to save the Second Amendment from gun grabber Joe Biden and his Senate puppets.** There's simply no other way to put it.
**[SAVE THE SECOND AMENDMENT»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62012369:J7eQ72GcN:m:1:3331703221:123D9BE7C2AC9B66E987E7C905C711A9:r)**
_Democrats have been raising historic amounts of money to prop up their anti-gun agenda, and we need to match their efforts. The NRA is committed to fighting for YOU to preserve your constitutional right to bear arms. But we can't do it alone._

_**That's why we need YOU, Peter, to chip in TODAY to bolster our efforts during these difficult times.**_

**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT TODAY to stand up to the Biden Democrats and DEFEND YOUR FREEDOMS.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62012369:J7eQ72GcN:m:1:3331703221:123D9BE7C2AC9B66E987E7C905C711A9:r)**

**[DONOR FILE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62012369:J7eQ72GcN:m:1:3331703221:123D9BE7C2AC9B66E987E7C905C711A9:r)**
**SUPPORTER:****Peter**
**CONTRIBUTION STATUS:****PENDING**
**DEADLINE: IMMEDIATELY**

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62012369:J7eQ72GcN:m:1:3331703221:123D9BE7C2AC9B66E987E7C905C711A9:r)**

For over 150 years, the NRA has been **America's strongest advocate** for our sacred right to keep and bear arms. We've made immeasurable progress in our fight, but with Joe Biden in the White House, our most trying days are still ahead. _That's why we NEED to band together NOW and fight back against the Left's insane agenda._

_We must unite as one movement to save the Second Amendment. You are an imperative part of this, Peter._ _**We need all hands on deck.**_

**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT TODAY to help us fight to preserve our freedoms.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62012369:J7eQ72GcN:m:1:3331703221:123D9BE7C2AC9B66E987E7C905C711A9:r)**

Thank you,

The National Rifle Association

body:
We need your help
| | | This is Kati with the DSCC.

At this very moment, Democrats _across America_ are mobilizing to re-elect Senator Raphael Warnock. It’s _crucial_ that we get out the vote in Georgia ahead of next week’s runoff election because we know the margin will be _razor-thin!_

This is going to take the whole country -- **but right now we're short of volunteers in Pennsylvania. Unless supporters like you come through and help make these calls, we’re looking at a MUCH tougher path to victory.**

**[Please, this is our last chance to expand our Senate majority, and Georgia voters only have until TUESDAY to cast their ballots! Will you join our virtual phone bank to make sure EVERY Georgia Democrat turns out to vote?](https://go.dscc.org/go/11368?t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221202-Kati-GAPhoneCallsRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221202-Kati-GAPhoneCallsRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9102%2E9716520%2E4vBVHH)**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Being honest with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
America can’t handle this loss
|
---
| | | | | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6lh2fc7alupi2ecmt9vbn4uog33i30qgm57lldg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1g62p74c5h2bs)
---
| |
Friend, it's Herschel Walker. I know you're busy, so I'll be quick.

It's official. Nikki Haley was right--Georgia is the TOUGHEST race in the country.

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Election Day, our Senate race is headed to a RUNOFF election on Tuesday, December 6.**

**Once again, it all comes down to Georgia.**

Two years ago, Democrats beat Republicans in Georgia, but we're not going to let history repeat itself.

If far-Left Democrat Raphael Warnock wins this race again, there will be dire consequences for Georgia and our country. He's weak on crime, reckless with our tax dollars, and a threat to our values.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff...and we're quickly running out of time.

My opponent is the #1 fundraising senator in America, _**[so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztjsvosib6vqiv3ruqeh58lk8rt887vt6ttf2540_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1g62p74c5h2bs "so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.")**_
---
| | | | | [HELP ME WIN THIS RACE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zia8l21sfkl1njqimhlu0n06dr3upruur5rd0640_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1g62p74c5h2bs)
---
| | | | [EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION OF $10](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7nn719u0k5u1m397ikuaapknc5db6tnqthbp6i8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1g62p74c5h2bs)
---
| | [EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION OF $20](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcujp29liqq2l56kkipm6eqj3v1rkspe8trvgjto_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1g62p74c5h2bs)
---
| | | [EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION OF $30](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zah9dslmmnvpg7no4340bqkrh1v6etaeo22ilk8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1g62p74c5h2bs)
---
| | | Democrats are already salivating about the liberal policies Raphael Warnock will help them pass in a Democrat-led Senate.

You and I must work together to stop this from happening. The path to victory is clear. The question is, will you help me get that victory, Friend?

I know you are a patriot who is willing to go the extra mile, _**[so can I count on you IMMEDIATELY?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpa8u9olqv0u8mc3jgtis5etttjr8kag8nuqgd8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1g62p74c5h2bs "so can I count on you IMMEDIATELY?")**_
---
|
---
| | | [HELP ME WIN THIS RACE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq0qrhk0r7tijsrll6ldg9dgskhjnjcpdbihgbl0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1g62p74c5h2bs)
---
To victory,

Herschel Walker
U.S. Senate Candidate

name: Brian Kemp
subject: Keep our momentum going
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
Thank you | We won because hard working Americans want their streets safe, they want good paying jobs, and quality education for their children.
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fde59f06dbe948b39624805e1fc4dedc&_e=vp2OhfOy1ghyg0s09x-QMClMpFzlULYluEaGLKn9DqgyY8CuyEfWpRXGY5GXAobKpPQKG4n--pf9ldcijwmnr0ys9ltZnHxS3e_EvhhS4KFxxbB21DbSqVFTwXKzJrCFdEPVw1F1ODTaSvk-WLy1X2ioiWQ3bO-duznJdYP6OD83XxQPaH9NSxx8G_VhY_JswucVmw7GJvnKTRhEHxtztru7obf75VQ9ezTiPJI5_Tc7Ox59aTl3ylHA5ZHxRrryvf5SyXzETjQC8eO_zWxKG5TOzrYWEuY1V6ILmcUIE2AcycFPYj1iiYOSFJNIhA5eCl3bDPLcT5FgepP862kWqsW9z4oXaN0qCDr6vIKEdaShwTqTottZs_rP6aWN1t6Lor7fz7pVN7iPZMBFKeiYNCNmMsonxJVDbVS-NEg-83eb2S7PvQoXfXdq3pZ74iyazZrT0f7rBxvMBOXzdEwf7Iphei8dhmAC-ULBNvb1lT-Khz_-1sRz8NeOZ2iYo7kH77roYWGVRIasSUou0mpxMA%3D%3D)

Friend,

body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| | Dear Friend,Populism is nothing new to world history. While it can be easy to think about American politics as being divided between the Left and the Right, the reality is much different. What we’ve really been seeing is two sets of populist backlash against both the Democrat and Republican establishment.
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| | And believe it or not, these tensions actually trace their roots back to Roman times.

That’s why I’m sending you this email today.

I want to make sure you get a free copy of one of our popular eBooks: **[Dueling Populisms by Victor Davis Hanson](http://trk.readactnews.)**.

Hanson is a Hoover Senior Fellow and world-renowned historian, and I think you’ll get a lot out of his insights. Inside this important eBook, you’ll learn more about:
* What we can expect from a political climate ruled by movements that rebel against both the establishment—and each other.
* The important parallels between these ancient movements and their modern counterparts in both progressive and conservative populism.
* What lies ahead for America as we revive these ancient tensions in our culture.

You can get your free copy of Dueling Populisms using this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/dueling-populisms-signup/](http://trk.readactnews.)**.

And please feel free to share this with your family and friends. It’s important that we recall the voices of experience and apply them to contemporary conflicts and challenges.

You can use this link to get access to your free eBook right now.
Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | Online DevelopmentHoover Institution | Stanford University
---

body:
The results in states with fair maps vs. gerrymandered states where democracy is still at risk.
|
---

Friend -- As the final midterm election ballots are counted, the impact of our movement for fair maps is undeniable.

Because of the presence of more fair maps, voters were able to have their voices truly heard.

**[Will you help AOTL continue working toward a stronger democracy and fairer maps?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55450681/381738655/-1585539253?refcode=20221202_AOTL_P_EHH_eom1resend_ActivesNDxOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyZGZkY2NmLTc5NzItZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vW4YpdATw5eHuBosSOdezyrSScSDVrHsfM1Ks3GmQAE=)**
[DONATE $25 ONE TIME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55450682/381738656/-1585539253?amount=25&refcode=20221202_AOTL_P_EHH_eom1resend_ActivesNDxOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyZGZkY2NmLTc5NzItZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vW4YpdATw5eHuBosSOdezyrSScSDVrHsfM1Ks3GmQAE=)
---
This election proved that when voters cast their ballots on the fairer maps, the results can break through conventional midterm election trends that stood strong for decades.

Beyond that, we saw voters double down on protecting and strengthening democracy. Voters in Arizona rejected a stricter voter ID law. Voters in Connecticut approved early voting. Voters in places like Arkansas rejected attempts to make it harder to pass ballot initiatives. Voters in Michigan approved a constitutional amendment to protect the fundamental right to vote and expand access to voting.

**[We need to keep up this momentum. Chip in to show your commitment to building a democracy that works for the people.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55450683/381738657/-1585539253?refcode=20221202_AOTL_P_EHH_eom1resend_ActivesNDxOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyZGZkY2NmLTc5NzItZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vW4YpdATw5eHuBosSOdezyrSScSDVrHsfM1Ks3GmQAE=)**

[DONATE $250](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55450688/381738662/-1585539253?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20221202_AOTL_P_EHH_eom1resend_ActivesNDxOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyZGZkY2NmLTc5NzItZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vW4YpdATw5eHuBosSOdezyrSScSDVrHsfM1Ks3GmQAE=) | [Another Amount](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55450689/381738663/-1585539253?refcode=20221202_AOTL_P_EHH_eom1resend_ActivesNDxOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyZGZkY2NmLTc5NzItZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vW4YpdATw5eHuBosSOdezyrSScSDVrHsfM1Ks3GmQAE=)
In more than a dozen states, election deniers were on the ballot for key positions like governor or secretary of state. In every one of those races called so far, voters rejected these dangerous candidates. And our nation is better for it.

Voters want fair elections and a voice in the process. Plain and simple.

But while the impact of fair maps is undeniable -- states with fair maps stand in stark contrast with gerrymandered states like Florida, Georgia, Wisconsin, Ohio and Texas where democracy remains at risk.

Voters in these states want fair elections too. But as long as gerrymandered state legislatures call the shots, they will continue to stack the deck against voters in their states -- using unconstitutional maps and extreme voter suppression tactics to ensure their reelection. We need to break this cycle.

**[Fighting for fair maps helped save our democracy. But this is not a one and done effort. Chip in to support All OnThe Line.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55450690/381738664/-1585539253?refcode=20221202_AOTL_P_EHH_eom1resend_ActivesNDxOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyZGZkY2NmLTc5NzItZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vW4YpdATw5eHuBosSOdezyrSScSDVrHsfM1Ks3GmQAE=)**

\-- A.G. Holder

clean_body: The results in states with fair maps vs. gerrymandered states where democracy is still at risk. | Friend -- As the final midterm election ballots are counted, the impact of our movement for fair maps is undeniable. Because of the presence of more fair maps, voters were able to have their voices truly heard. = = This election proved that when voters cast their ballots on the fairer maps, the results can break through conventional midterm election trends that stood strong for decades. Beyond that, we saw voters double down on protecting and strengthening democracy. Voters in Arizona rejected a stricter voter ID law. Voters in Connecticut approved early voting. Voters in places like Arkansas rejected attempts to make it harder to pass ballot initiatives. Voters in Michigan approved a constitutional amendment to protect the fundamental right to vote and expand access to voting. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = In more than a dozen states, election deniers were on the ballot for key positions like governor or secretary of state. In every one of those races called so far, voters rejected these dangerous candidates. And our nation is better for it. Voters want fair elections and a voice in the process. Plain and simple. But while the impact of fair maps is undeniable -- states with fair maps stand in stark contrast with gerrymandered states like Florida, Georgia, Wisconsin, Ohio and Texas where democracy remains at risk. Voters in these states want fair elections too. But as long as gerrymandered state legislatures call the shots, they will continue to stack the deck against voters in their states -- using unconstitutional maps and extreme voter suppression tactics to ensure their reelection. We need to break this cycle. = \-- A.G. Holder All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. We've been emailing a lot about the Georgia Runoff Election to re-elect Rev. Warnock and defeat Trump puppet Herschel Walker.
We’re sorry if you’re feeling overwhelmed. Because it’s a lot. We know that.
But we’re just 4 SHORT DAYS from Election Day. And there's so much to do.
Luckily, Brad Raffensperger lost his attempt to BLOCK early voting.
But now, Warnock is being drowned in the airwaves by Trump and McConnell’s Dark Money PACs. That’s why we are counting on donations from our digital grassroots team.
The harsh reality is: Warnock had a slim lead in the 2022 election: – just 35,000 votes ahead. But polls are showing his runoff is in a DEAD-HEAT. If he’s elected, we’ll ELIMINATE Joe Manchin’s power-hold on the Senate. So we’re giving this everything we have. We MUST raise $10,000 for his campaign to fight back and get voters to the polls. But our deadline is coming up fast! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-dec22-warnock?refcode=EM_FR_120222_B1_WARNOCK_30AC_rs&amount=5]

Peter,

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

name: Giffords
subject: Sign on to show your support for child access prevention and safe storage laws
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
If you agree that we must keep guns out of the hands of kids and teenagers, add your name to our petition today
#

Friends -
Here’s the unfortunate truth: gun violence has risen to THE leading cause of death for kids and teenagers. More than half of all gun owners store guns unsafely, and 4.6 million minors in the US live in homes with at least one loaded, unlocked firearm.
This is why Giffords supports child access prevention and safe storage laws. Data from a 2019 study suggests that even modest increases in the number of American homes safely storing firearms could prevent almost one third of youth gun deaths due to suicide and unintentional firearm injury.
[**Will you sign our petition today to say you support child access prevention and safe storage laws to reduce the ability for young people to access and utilize firearms?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_safestorage_dec22/?source=em221202-1-15&refcode2=2801.3935704.ZuAyib&akid=2801%2E3935704%2EZuAyib)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_safestorage_dec22/?source=em221202-1-15&refcode2=2801.3935704.ZuAyib&akid=2801%2E3935704%2EZuAyib)**
Young adults have an elevated risk of engaging in violent behaviors. For example, there is data to suggest that although 18-20 year olds make up just 4% of the US population, they account for 17% of known homicide offenders. Additionally, between 2011 and 2020 there was an alarming 61% increase in firearm suicides involving minors.
When kids and teens have access to firearms, it poses a danger to themselves, the members of their household, and our communities at large. Easily accessible firearms can be used in school shootings, youth suicides, and accidental shootings in the home.
[**If you agree that we must keep firearms out of the hands of kids and teenagers, add your name today to show you support child access prevention and safe storage laws.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_safestorage_dec22/?source=em221202-1-15&refcode2=2801.3935704.ZuAyib&akid=2801%2E3935704%2EZuAyib)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_safestorage_dec22/?source=em221202-1-15&refcode2=2801.3935704.ZuAyib&akid=2801%2E3935704%2EZuAyib)**
Thank you for using your voice,
The team at Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=2801%2E3935704%2EZuAyib) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: Is this really the outcome you want?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I’m asking you to dig deep. Every other Senate race has now been decided, so it’s going to come down to Georgia.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z05pl85jl3uf3o1fd6g86bsnu7dv3f3e50j4u0do_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t30cgqn4o9l6upradj16uoeapb669jr0s9ic8qr4cdlmgqj2c70s4om6o5j6doefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p70phkcipm1ptimdj31c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhmeo30chi64pj4c8iv0)
|
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zetl8insstp7v7nf371epot5oa1nf0hbcancqh70_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1i68oj6chh2bs)

It's time for some honest talk, Fellow American.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden 's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth $10, $25, $35, or even $500 to you?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z2cl60r4pbkjhmh0aot9co4m479jngfsrdnqt8e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1i68oj6chh2bs)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 5 days.
[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT ->**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zeul5qhunmf3pa00fiu2vnnpg6d6qlcg1mn87rq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1i68oj6chh2bs)
**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th - but only with your help, Fellow American.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z15f804dp04jafhi99evd1dolu35j76gpvlrbls8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1i68oj6chh2bs)**

I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity.

From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. **[Send Herschel whatever you can right now.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zati7d8h6g4qsfo1n123lga65j0ka0ru2260kb4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1i68oj6chh2bs)**

Thank you,

Marco Rubio
United States Senator

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zf0srrm21rqmnc32hdfdi6k47qecsco46gn786d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1i68oj6chh2bs)

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zh7q33n0fv3bqc691elodp2ia86md7m9i7vvdnp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1i68oj6chh2bs) [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zogk452sov8k3fnl10ci05qh0mtqmhimbvcedkr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1i68oj6chh2bs) [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zbj6na3nlrsc61ug8u6n3bbuevv9ka416dhl8gng_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1i68oj6chh2bs) [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6r8igoqooefbkimsj330i9vqsaa8vasiqv40uh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1i68oj6chh2bs)

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I was just on stage with President Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20221202-8152-header&t=1&akid=8152%2E434096%2EDA8kqD)
**Derek, President Obama and I just stepped off the rally stage here in Georgia last night.** It's an honor to have him by our side at this pivotal moment.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221202-1?amount=5&refcode=em20221202-8152&refcode2=8152_434096_DA8kqD&akid=8152%2E434096%2EDA8kqD)
If you didn't get a chance to join our rally, here's what you need to know: **In 4 days, we're going to win this runoff election and keep Georgia blue.**
But here’s the thing: Republicans know this, and they’re afraid. We narrowly led Herschel Walker in the general election -- so now the GOP is flooding this race with more than $58 million to help Walker take the lead in these final days.
They won’t hold back, and neither can we. That’s why I urgently need your support to help hit our critical goal before midnight tonight.
**Derek, I’m asking:[Will you please split $5 -- or whatever you can between me and John Fetterman -- so we can win in Georgia and expand our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221202-1?refcode=em20221202-8152&amount=5&refcode2=8152_434096_DA8kqD&akid=8152%2E434096%2EDA8kqD)**
**[Donate $5 Now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221202-1?amount=5&refcode=em20221202-8152&refcode2=8152_434096_DA8kqD&akid=8152%2E434096%2EDA8kqD)**
Thank you so much for all you do, Derek.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
---|---|---
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8152%2E434096%2EDA8kqD)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8152%2E434096%2EDA8kqD)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Derek, I’m asking: Thank you so much for all you do, Derek. – Rev. Raphael Warnock | | ---|---|--- Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

clean_body: Democrats could expand our Senate majority to 51 seats -- but we need the support of this grassroots team to get it done. | | Derek, four days. That’s all the time that remains before Senator Raphael Warnock’s runoff election in Georgia, There’s so much at stake on Tuesday. As it stands, we have a 50-50 split in the United States Senate. If we can reelect Senator Warnock, Democrats could expand our Senate majority to 51 seats \-- but we need the support of this grassroots team to get it done. Senator Warnock needs your support before this critical runoff, and grassroots donations will make a powerful impact. If you can, Derek, split a $10 donation between Senator Warnock's campaign and the DNC today. Winning this runoff in Georgia is important not only for the Democratic majority in the Senate, but for what it represents. Senator Warnock is a champion for working families in Georgia and across the country. We must keep him in the Senate. Thank you, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States Kamala Harris: Derivative of Adam Schultz / Biden for President Photo. CC BY-NC-SA 2.0 When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. name: =?utf-8?Q?Russ=20Vought?=
subject: An event to remember.
body:
A gathering of conservatives ready to fight. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10113999?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
Friends,

Earlier this month I had the pleasure of joining conservative leaders, policy experts, activists, and members of Congress (who are ready to fight!) at a special event in Washington D.C. laying the groundwork for a conservative agenda in 2023 and beyond.

**It was energizing to be in a room full of committed America First patriots ready to go to battle with the woke progressive left.**

The event, appropriately titled, “ _What should the GOP do now?_ ” was jam-packed with policy ideas, tactics, and strategies for pursuing an America First agenda.
---
|
---
| **Highlights from the Event**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=4fb5c0c28a&e=17913c7d6d)
---

→ Rep. Chip Roy and myself detailing how Congress can truly have oversight of the corrupt Biden regime. **[****[VIDEO](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=e97e460224&e=17913c7d6d)]**

→ Rep. Dan Bishop and Julie Kelly of _American Greatness_ discussing taking on the weaponized deep state with a new “Church” style committee in Congress. **[****[VIDEO](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=e3db6cd081&e=17913c7d6d)]**

→ Rep. Bob Good, explaining how conservatives can defund the left's federal support.**[****[VIDEO](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=5f30aa757d&e=17913c7d6d)]**

→ CRA’s Jeff Clark offering practical solutions to dismantling the corrupt administrative state.**[****[VIDEO](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=41845dded2&e=17913c7d6d)]**

There is so much more I could tell you about the event, but I’ll do you one better and offer all of the panel sessions here:: [Full Video: What should the GOP do now?](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=ae21f36e05&e=17913c7d6d)
|
---
| **Photos from The Event**
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
| **A Special Thanks**

Thank you to all the panelists, attendees and our stellar co-hosts, The Claremont Institute for the American Way of Life, The Conservative Partnership Institute, The American Conservative, and Hillsdale College for hosting at their D.C. campus.

The future is bright if we’re willing to fight for it.
---
|
Sincerely,

Russ Vought
President
Citizens for Renewing America
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=6d147c9551&e=17913c7d6d)

name: Save the Senate
subject: Georgia’s crucial Senate runoff is next week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wqcJuDX2HRji8zceUQ74uMPyXwArFUhhEylhu27HuuFZPbUWWTdGH4838vBzdyazPkgGfSEI9dOrau8XGHCENJ6Je06YUb2AtP8-YN1Byq9GBTg8785gsbQ_ffAWduYcqcblV7ENyk761rgrRg8WUVv3J6OQeY0LbUQrWZlhlqBDyYju9fBp7NQkE0kQ_tLP8cIq3USqoSB-ql7d8VwtuLZDPE7zu--xb4c1fBML16DZKoLvGwam6IA1IC3RbV0VB5z-KZYQ9lR2uH56KVbaD2W5NdLMGkmBOKwdFSXi6XVPWFu3cHrtc4fnl4HTU3Vm9h4kGJL4pDIRBADstEPYfjUa6e-fVP_wxoSrCFPnz5ixkGw80qMwYa7MsNiGS9DaTKCQYxWh1XUnz_A0TXdX3u/3rn/sGhGVdBMTsiGLMMcW2he0w/h0/3NE-pxOGGxFWpL9k3JqvXg3QZtflz6jo3-pDMittYcc)
Peter, We had a pretty successful midterms, but there’s one more big race to win. Georgia’s Senate seat is still up for grabs as Raphael Warnock and Herschel Walker face off in a runoff next Tuesday. Even though we’ve already won the Senate, 51 seats in the Senate versus 50 is actually a big difference: while a 50-50 Senate allows Vice President Harris to break ties in Democrats’ favor, it’s not actually full control of the Senate. If Warnock wins, Democrats can run the Senate without a negotiated power sharing agreement with Mitch McConnell, which has slowed down legislation and nominations. It will give Democrats outright majorities instead of 50-50 splits on each committee, and it will also give Democrats full subpoena power. Not to mention, having another *real* Democrat will vastly reduce the individual power of obstructionists Sinema and Manchin (who are often not on the same page with each other. In other words, we’ll only need to pick off one of them instead of both of them to get anything done). ******[A Democratic victory in Georgia could mean all the difference heading into a tough 2024 election cycle. Chip in now with a donation split between our PAC and Senator Warnock’s campaign clean_body: | | | Peter, We had a pretty successful midterms, but there’s one more big race to win. Georgia’s Senate seat is still up for grabs as Raphael Warnock and Herschel Walker face off in a runoff next Tuesday. Even though we’ve already won the Senate, 51 seats in the Senate versus 50 is actually a big difference: while a 50-50 Senate allows Vice President Harris to break ties in Democrats’ favor, it’s not actually full control of the Senate. If Warnock wins, Democrats can run the Senate without a negotiated power sharing agreement with Mitch McConnell, which has slowed down legislation and nominations. It will give Democrats outright majorities instead of 50-50 splits on each committee, and it will also give Democrats full subpoena power. Not to mention, having another real Democrat will vastly reduce the individual power of obstructionists Sinema and Manchin (who are often not on the same page with each other. In other words, we’ll only need to pick off one of them instead of both of them to get anything done). **** Thanks so much for all your help, -Save the Senate | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Peter — I just wanted to send you a quick thank you.

**Thanks to you, we reached our November fundraising goal! This is so important to our campaign. So thank you.**

I’m doing everything I can to support our progressive agenda in Congress. I’ve fought for a shorter workweek, stronger LGBTQ+ rights, and critical veteran care.

I’ve helped secure some of President Biden’s most important priorities from COVID relief to infrastructure to inflation and climate change.

And it wouldn't be possible without you,** so thank you for being in this fight with me.**

Mark Takano

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: December 2, 2022 - Bi-Weekly Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate
body:
| | |
---
| | **December 2, 2022**
---
| | **Delegate Greenhalgh Attends the City of Virginia Beach's Legislative Agenda Meeting**
---
| |
---
| | The City of Virginia Beach held its annual legislative agenda meeting last week. As part of the Virginia Beach delegation, Delegate Greenhalgh was able to attend the meeting to hear about the city's 2023 legislative priorities. Delegate Greenhalgh is proud to partner with the city to improve the lives of Virginia Beach residents and her constituents through her work at the General Assembly.
---
| | |
---
| | **Fairness in Women's Sports Act Filed for the 2023 Legislative Session**
---
| |
---
| | Delegate Greenhalgh introduced Virginia House Bill 1387 for the 2023 Legislative Session. The purpose of the bill is to protect girls/women from being forced to compete against biological males. Young women should be encouraged to achieve their full potential and enjoy the many benefits of competition, which was the purpose of Title IX. Delegate Greenhalgh's bill does the following:
* Applies to athletic teams and sports sponsored by public K-12 schools and institutions of higher education.
* Makes no change to the medical requirements or existing medical forms. Sports physicals have long been required for participation in sports and already require designation of male or female.
* Designates athletic teams or sports sponsored by a public school into one 3 categories which allows a place for every student to be able to participate:
1\. For "males," "men," or "boys"
2\. For "females," "women," or "girls"
3\. For "coed" or "mixed” (open to males/boys and females/girls)
* Specifically provides that women can compete against men if they choose to do so, but men cannot compete in the female category

When young women realize they have no chance of winning against biological males, they simply won’t participate. Girls are in danger of injury when competing against biological males, which occurred as recently as last month. This bill aims to prevent these outcomes.

---
| | |
---
| | **The Greenhalgh Report - Non-COVID Death and Illness During the Pandemic**
---
| |
---
| | Months of hard work and advocacy have culminated in the release of a preliminary study done by the Virginia Department of Health at the request of Delegate Greenhalgh. [Click here](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/c90e4c6cecae7c48/1387545b70fc0139c3d6b838967d376c/37923) to read a statement from Delegate Greenhalgh and view the results of the study.
---
| | |
---
| | **The Small Business Commission Endorses Delegate Greenhalgh's Bill**
---
| |
---
| | This week Delegate Greenhalgh presented a bill to her colleagues on the Small Business Commission. clean_body: | | | | | December 2, 2022 | | Delegate Greenhalgh Attends the City of Virginia Beach's Legislative Agenda Meeting | | | | The City of Virginia Beach held its annual legislative agenda meeting last week. As part of the Virginia Beach delegation, Delegate Greenhalgh was able to attend the meeting to hear about the city's 2023 legislative priorities. Delegate Greenhalgh is proud to partner with the city to improve the lives of Virginia Beach residents and her constituents through her work at the General Assembly. | | | | | Fairness in Women's Sports Act Filed for the 2023 Legislative Session | | | | Delegate Greenhalgh introduced Virginia House Bill 1387 for the 2023 Legislative Session. The purpose of the bill is to protect girls/women from being forced to compete against biological males. Young women should be encouraged to achieve their full potential and enjoy the many benefits of competition, which was the purpose of Title IX. Delegate Greenhalgh's bill does the following: Applies to athletic teams and sports sponsored by public K-12 schools and institutions of higher education. Makes no change to the medical requirements or existing medical forms. Sports physicals have long been required for participation in sports and already require designation of male or female. Designates athletic teams or sports sponsored by a public school into one 3 categories which allows a place for every student to be able to participate: 1\. For "males," "men," or "boys" 2\. For "females," "women," or "girls" 3\. For "coed" or "mixed” (open to males/boys and females/girls) Specifically provides that women can compete against men if they choose to do so, but men cannot compete in the female category When young women realize they have no chance of winning against biological males, they simply won’t participate. Girls are in danger of injury when competing against biological males, which occurred as recently as last month. This bill aims to prevent these outcomes. | | | | | The Greenhalgh Report - Non-COVID Death and Illness During the Pandemic | | | | Months of hard work and advocacy have culminated in the release of a preliminary study done by the Virginia Department of Health at the request of Delegate Greenhalgh. to read a statement from Delegate Greenhalgh and view the results of the study. | | | | | The Small Business Commission Endorses Delegate Greenhalgh's Bill | | | | This week Delegate Greenhalgh presented a bill to her colleagues on the Small Business Commission. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Giffords has been a leader in this fight, helping pass not just the national legislation, but guiding President Biden's many executive orders to fight gun violence and helping pass groundbreaking gun laws in states around the country. Yet, the gun violence of the past few weeks reminds us that as much as we've done, there is still so much left to do.
body:
Please, no more shootings
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4b09fddb-a7b6-453e-9353-437467697ddb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | _I am so damn tired of seeing places like Colorado Springs or Chesapeake, VA start to trend on social media as a sick, sinking feeling starts to form in the pit of my stomach. Followed by my clicking on a story only to have my worst fears realized--we've had our latest Newtown. Tucson. Santa Barbara. Parkland. Orlando. Dayton. El Paso. Tree of Life. Fort Hood. Mandalay Bay. The list is as endless as it is heartbreaking. _ **It. Must. Stop.** **_This past year, for the first time in 30 years, Congress acted on gun violence._ **No, we didn't come close to getting everything we need. Yet, that Republicans felt pressured into addressing long-term priorities of the gun violence prevention movement--including a national gun trafficking law and closing the "boyfriend" loophole, which had allowed many violent men to continue to legally purchase firearms--was still a huge step forward. _This happened largely because of _Giffords_. _Giffords_ was founded because of the terrible tragedy that befell then-Rep. Gabby Giffords, who while holding a town hall meeting in her Tucson, AZ district was shot through the head and nearly died._ **_[The tragedy led Gabby and her husband--recently re-elected Senator Mark Kelly--to devote their lives to solving the problem of out-of-control gun violence in America, and your support today can help them take this fight to the next level, for all of us _._](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1609f80-ea8a-4633-8c60-677ae78890fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_**
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Help Gabby Giffords’ fight for sound gun laws**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d2a8f72-d701-4c5f-84a5-aa2389a5d54f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | _Giffords has been a leader in this fight, helping pass not just the national legislation, but guiding President Biden's many executive orders to fight gun violence and helping pass groundbreaking gun laws in states around the country from California to Virginia, Vermont to New Mexico._ **_Yet, the gun violence of the past few weeks reminds us that as much as we've done, there is still so much left to do. We shouldn't have to live in a country where we worry when our kids leave for school in the morning or we look around for the nearest exits when we walk into a mall or movie theater. It is despicable, really._** _So while this issue is on our minds--knowing it's only a matter of time until the next one and the one after that_ , unless and until we have passed universal background checks, universal red flag laws, an assault weapons ban, a high capacity magazine ban and more--[_**would you please join us this holiday season in saying ENOUGH, and giving a donation of $10, $20 or whatever you can, to Giffords as this incredible organization fights to make the lives of our families safer?**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T41787379-48ce-421f-8f8b-6a377a143cfe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This holiday season let's all hope for a country free of the scourge of preventable gun violence.
---
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: End Preventable Gun Violence**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2de24240-0b00-4c27-8a69-5c3d50952dd5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good

513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T98f1c3e8-720c-477d-b879-6967d26acdf6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Herschel Walker
subject: our opponent is better funded
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|

---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007912:6G6wa2GNJ:m:1:3372576248:6CA42DC3EEFC30FEB824ACA98723D674:r)**

We only have a few hours left to pick up the pace. **[If every person reading this email right now would chip in, we'd easily hit our goal.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007912:6G6wa2GNJ:m:1:3372576248:6CA42DC3EEFC30FEB824ACA98723D674:r)**

**[So Peter, I'm personally asking you today to chip in to my campaign BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so that we win this critical runoff!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007912:6G6wa2GNJ:m:1:3372576248:6CA42DC3EEFC30FEB824ACA98723D674:r)**

Thank you,

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: I'm back in Georgia for Herschel
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
The Biden/Warnock agenda is unpopular here in Georgia, so they are campaigning in Massachusetts. |
---

Fellow American - I've been back in Georgia the last two days campaigning for Herschel Walker!

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61216428:WMw5hmDNb:m:1:877327319:44EF11AA654B3EEE3B5E4B85C7416625:r)
**Just a few hours ago, Joe Biden announced he was going to campaign for Raphael Warnock...in Massachusetts! That's right, President Biden is in Boston today drumming up support for Senator Warnock's campaign - in a state that's over 1,000 miles from Atlanta!**

**_You literally can't make this stuff up._**

President Biden is unpopular here in Georgia where the race is TIED, so the Warnock campaign sent Biden to Massachusetts where Democrats are hosting phonebanks and fundraisers for Senator Warnock.

Raphael Warnock has raised an astounding $153 MILLION from Democrats across the country because they know he's a reliable vote for their liberal agenda. _And they know sending Biden to Georgia could hurt their chances of getting a 51-49 Senate._

_**Again, you literally can't make this stuff up.**_

Conservatives must combat the cash flooding in from liberal states like Massachusetts and California if we want Herschel to win in 4 days. The race is TIED, but Herschel is being outraised 3 to 1!

Herschel needs more money to expand his Get-Out-The-Vote efforts IMMEDIATELY, [**so we need to help him NOW!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61216428:WMw5hmDNb:m:1:877327319:44EF11AA654B3EEE3B5E4B85C7416625:r)

[**Please, Fellow American, if you can, chip in $5 or $10 to help Herschel close the fundraising gap in the final hours of this campaign.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61216428:WMw5hmDNb:m:1:877327319:44EF11AA654B3EEE3B5E4B85C7416625:r)

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61216428:WMw5hmDNb:m:1:877327319:44EF11AA654B3EEE3B5E4B85C7416625:r)

Lindsey Graham

He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.
