name: NHGOP Chairman Stepanek and Vice Chair Tucker
subject: NHGOP Chairman and Vice Chairwoman on NHGOP Leadership Positions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
NationBuilder
For Immediate Release:

| |
---
| | | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:**
December 2, 2022
---
| | **CONTACT:
** Mackenzie Rohde Mackenzie@nhrsc.com 201-270-8574
---
**Concord, NH** \- _NHGOP Chairman Stephen Stepanek and NHGOP Vice Chairwoman Pamela Tucker released the following statements in regard to their positions at the New Hampshire Republican Party:_
**NHGOP Chairman Stephen Stepanek's Statement:**
"It has been a privilege, honor, and pleasure to serve as Chairman of the New Hampshire Republican Party for the past four years. I learned a long time ago, in business, that a leader is only as good as those he surrounds himself with.
I would first like to thank my amazing Vice Chair Pamela Tucker. Her work in organizing and overseeing candidate recruitment was nothing short of amazing. She has also worked hard on setting up a women’s program to identify, train and mentor young woman who will be our next leaders.
A sincere thank you to Juliana Bergeron, our National Committee Woman, who worked closely with me as we fought to protect our First in the Nation primary as well as being at the forefront of putting together many of our successful fundraising events.
I would also like to acknowledge and thank Kate Day, who headed one of the key programs, that I promised I’d focus on when elected, and that is the building of a grass roots organization; the foundation of any strong party. Kate headed the project to create new town committees across the state. Thanks to Kate, today over 80% of the towns in NH that have their own Republican town committee or belong to a regional town committee.
At the start of my time as Chairman, my Executive Director Elliot Gault and my Communications Director Joe Sweeney did the work of six people and did it well. When Elliot moved onto the Governor’s office, Joe stepped up as ED and we brought on Maya Harvey as our Press Secretary. Maya proved to be an outstanding energetic person who held the capacity to light up any room she entered. Joe and Maya were such a good team that senator Morse recruited them to run his US Senate campaign.
Fortunately Elliot Gault stepped forward again as ED and we recruited Mackenzie Rohde from New Jersey as our Communications Director. We again struck gold in bringing Mackenzie on board who strongly took control of NHGOP's messaging that properly supported our platform.
My sincerest gratitude to all of you.
When I was elected four years ago, the NHGOP was and had been in serious financial condition for many years. I made two commitments that day. The first was to put the party on a firm financial footing with an established donor base. The second was to create a solid grass roots organization.
I am happy to say that with the help of many dedicated people, a few which I have mentioned, that my goal has been achieved.
Therefore, today I am announcing that I will not be seeking a third term as Chairman of the New Hampshire Republican Party."
**NHGOP Vice Chairwoman Pamela Tucker's Statement:**
"I have made the decision to not run for re-election for the NHGOP Vice Chair position for the next term. Moving on from the NHGOP as Vice Chair is a bittersweet feeling. I am looking forward to my next endeavor, but look back with a grateful heart for our team and all the experiences we’ve shared together. First and foremost, I’d like to thank my colleague and friend, NHGOP Chairman Stephen Stepanek, who led our team day in and day out, was a fundraising machine, and held the reins of making the NHGOP the successful organization it is today. I am grateful for what everyone has built together; the support we’ve shared for each other and the accomplishments and hardships that we’ve tackled as a team. Thank you to every member of the NHGOP staff and team for making my job as Vice Chair as smooth as possible. I graciously thank every supporter, activist, door-knocker, sign holder, and all those in between for making my time at the NHGOP a success! We did what we set out to do and then some, and as Vice Chair, that’s all I could ever ask for."
###

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://nhgop.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=3b759f8f09083dafc3b676ab7322a136&utm_source=nhgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stepane_tucker_step_tier_1&n=1). Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
Not Authorized by Any Candidate or Candidate's Committee
Steve Stepanek, Chairman
10 Water St | Concord, NH 03301

Peter, This election cycle was tough and Future Generations took on some of the biggest challenges in battleground states like Pennsylvania, Texas, and Florida. We had many incredible wins because of your continued support. **Tonight we celebrate two historic wins and we will get to hear from Congresswoman-Elect Jasmine Crockett and Congressman-Elect Maxwell Alejandro Frost!** I get chills writing this thinking about the journey that got us to this day. Jasmine Crockett was our first endorsement in Texas in 2020, when she first ran for State House in Texas against an establishment Democrat. With just $400 _(from small dollar donations)_ we mobilized an army of volunteers and we won the runoff by just 91 votes! Today Jasmine is wrapping up her second week of Freshman Orientation for U.S. Congress with Greg Casar, Summer Lee, and Maxwell Alejandro Frost. It was just over a year and a half that we met Maxwell -- we were his first endorsement because we could see the passion he possessed and we quickly organized to help the 1st Gen-Z member of Congress get elected! **[Will you join us tonight to celebrate TWO HISTORIC WINS?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDKiO1DRELVicSxRd4Mydk5lv_brem0pQS6_iSKjRa1jUPOklQQ4_Grm4_Mn75fm-D0YJ97LDWTLnu9GFshyEWaWlV_LUJLTpZGP8ulMOdOT5YeWtbOnTrHGXFdpPgQRxbjAJaj9JNxK9Q7Y5CnEuZjIOA6Z3kCq28wZ1_XRnRFO-SfPujT4pif9zVe4RQwhSTEC8SRUz9i4L_qdRTj5ZSNKFnvRsT5hF28e1Y7Hyb1kN92yIThqBeHGtKmt5PGNePR0TTlInjjL3J4wtSYjYhpSKpQJHB0LFveXHXKkiTsHuL0e5X7buLZtAMOXVmX7n7afU-E8JtgBG92hmTSnXw5s/3rn/L7gv6WFyRMy1FpgiWtCWzw/h1/zorm7DIyWGrot9PnHEqfSo3WzOHxkDe-wryq0D9WC6c)**

Tonight's event will be hosted by two incredible Gen-Z activists who like Maxwell Frost are already veteran organizers. Anish Mohanty is a digital organizer for progressive candidates at the federal, state, and local level across California and a Commissioner for Union City. Anish has worked with Future Generations as our Creative Director on campaigns like Ed Markey and Andy Levin. Chitra Calderon is an environmental activist and has been a fellow with Future Generations on multiple campaigns like Cori Bush, Jasmine Crockett, Andy Levin, and Greg Casar. I am moved by Gen-Z’s ability to reach and mobilize voters, and for stopping the so-called "Red Wave." This year alone we won big in Pennsylvania with John Fetterman and Summer Lee, Maxwell Frost in Florida, Jasmine Crockett and Greg Casar in Texas, Aisha Wahab in California, and we are one week away from electing Zo Qadri to Austin City Council! We must continue doing our part to support young organizers who are making the difference and electing a diverse group of young candidates! clean_body: Kick off your weekend with Jasmine and Maxwell to discuss plans for the new year! | | Peter, This election cycle was tough and Future Generations took on some of the biggest challenges in battleground states like Pennsylvania, Texas, and Florida. We had many incredible wins because of your continued support. Tonight we celebrate two historic wins and we will get to hear from Congresswoman-Elect Jasmine Crockett and Congressman-Elect Maxwell Alejandro Frost! I get chills writing this thinking about the journey that got us to this day. Jasmine Crockett was our first endorsement in Texas in 2020, when she first ran for State House in Texas against an establishment Democrat. With just $400 (from small dollar donations) we mobilized an army of volunteers and we won the runoff by just 91 votes! Today Jasmine is wrapping up her second week of Freshman Orientation for U.S. Congress with Greg Casar, Summer Lee, and Maxwell Alejandro Frost. It was just over a year and a half that we met Maxwell -- we were his first endorsement because we could see the passion he possessed and we quickly organized to help the 1st Gen-Z member of Congress get elected! | | | Tonight's event will be hosted by two incredible Gen-Z activists who like Maxwell Frost are already veteran organizers. Anish Mohanty is a digital organizer for progressive candidates at the federal, state, and local level across California and a Commissioner for Union City. Anish has worked with Future Generations as our Creative Director on campaigns like Ed Markey and Andy Levin. Chitra Calderon is an environmental activist and has been a fellow with Future Generations on multiple campaigns like Cori Bush, Jasmine Crockett, Andy Levin, and Greg Casar. I am moved by Gen-Z’s ability to reach and mobilize voters, and for stopping the so-called "Red Wave." This year alone we won big in Pennsylvania with John Fetterman and Summer Lee, Maxwell Frost in Florida, Jasmine Crockett and Greg Casar in Texas, Aisha Wahab in California, and we are one week away from electing Zo Qadri to Austin City Council! We must continue doing our part to support young organizers who are making the difference and electing a diverse group of young candidates! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. We drive ourselves against the odds to help our candidates fight in tough races across the country because we know that if people are given a real choice in who represents them, they will choose someone who will fight to secure their future today and for future generations. If I don't see you at tonight's event, I hope you will donate or sign up to volunteer! In solidarity, Roza Calderon Executive Director, Future Generations | | Future Generations is a youth-founded, youth-led movement guided by the Seventh Generations' philosophy of building a sustainable world for the next seven generations. We support, recruit, train, and endorse candidates who are committed to securing a just society and livable planet. In 2020 we helped re-elect GND champion Sen. Ed Markey and flipped crucial down-ballot seats across Texas. clean_body: | | If you want to see Raphael Warnock re-elected, then you're in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, President Obama and I shared the rally stage here in Georgia last night. It's an honor to have him by our side at this pivotal moment. If you didn't get a chance to join our rally, here's what you need to know: In 4 days, we're going to win this runoff election and keep Georgia blue. But here’s the thing: Republicans know this, and they’re afraid. We narrowly led Herschel Walker in the general election — so now the GOP is flooding this race with more than $58 million to help Walker take the lead in these final days. They won’t hold back, and neither can we. That’s why I urgently need your support to help hit our critical goal before midnight tonight. Peter, I’m asking: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Raphael Warnock and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thank you so much for all you do, Peter. — Rev. Raphael Warnock The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking:****[Will you split $25 or more right now between me and Haley Stevens to keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55439144/381703476/-203372755?refcode=EM_BS_STE_221202_FR_WarnockSplit_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2YyOTY3Ny01YzcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zt2s1oXIIpAJhs1Fnbd8kjIfI5bAqnvHOgYrGSjBAGg=)** GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million — and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. clean_body: | | = Folks, it’s official: our critical runoff Senate race is underway. With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. That's why I'm humbly asking:= GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million — and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red. I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win — but with national Republicans going all-in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks — but we're falling short, and I need your help. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for all that you do. – Rev. | Peter,

Last month, Democrats were able to STOP a “red wave” from materializing, and a lot of that had to do with Democratic gains in rural areas.
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55439244/381703933/1617204714?refcode=BLU-BRP-20221202-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmE1ZTU5Ny01YzcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ipgbT2nZdt0gHObPRWtd2SN9nkM6t3wDomnp1UVRv7Q=) **Democrats made midterm gains in rural areas. Can they keep them?**

Strong performances in states like Illinois, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, and Washington showed Democrats can sustain and win over rural areas, where Republicans have generally done well.
---
**I started BACKROADS PAC almost two years ago, when I felt that rural districts were being overlooked, even though I knew they could hold the key to stopping a Republican wave.**

This election proved we CAN win in rural areas, but we can’t stop our momentum now. The stakes are even higher in 2024, and with early investment, we can build on our successes.

subject: Release Trump’s tax returns (add your name)
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
## [Sign your name: Tell Congress to Make Trump's Tax Returns Public >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T574f42c8-3217-44d2-b05e-72ab67b13118/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6281c608-4fc9-4fe9-9844-63601667a98b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Every President since Nixon has released his taxes to the public – except Trump. But Congress FINALLY has Trump’s tax returns! [After the Supreme Court blocked Trump’s final challenge this week, the IRS handed them over.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T62481b26-3c43-465e-b54e-0fa4b0c7f38b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) With just a few weeks until Republicans take control of the House, Congressional investigators will have hardly any time to go through them. That’s why Congress should make Trump’s tax returns public while Democrats are still in control. Release them, and let the people see them — like they have for decades with every other president. Democrats should not let Republicans help Trump hide his crimes. [Tell Congress: "Make Trump's Tax Returns Public!" >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc23a50de-1a1c-4fe1-a397-7e921adf8038/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

**$5** – that's how much I'm asking you to donate today, friend.
Your $5 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and expand our Senate majority. And your support has never been more urgent.
Right now, I’m running neck and neck with my opponent, Herschel Walker. With only 4 days until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch.
**I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say your $5 could mean the difference between winning and losing this race. Please, friend: Will you split $5 now between me and Kirsten Gillibrand to fuel our people-powered movement to victory here in Georgia?**
**Here's a special link just for you:**[**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock_gfs**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55464819/381753843/1384586616?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3818-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTVhZjAxNC04NzcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QNuf0fxWPJT2CZChwXkYEUioj0gbYiu6cgtboU0ShIo=)

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Sign the Petition - No Taxpayer Funding for Abortion!
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6baa08e4a57a4ea4a2a05ab70b1c43f0&_e=_XIYyACSiJcS0GFPdg4uH5C_uj75VKvtKljmpaPyr6dHkgAVbDPIVkuhz5afW-sFEil0tawRJN2rp6HWzDiygk_8N59F28owZnV0bBMpue0Pk-EDceCtJ8UoeDERpGHck16UJamNSimwTUBjfOZ6sQro-j0mks6x88OzSDYjH-oqlMxBt3cpb5oDR90ViTBcTLAjbZYVuKKqlbOTeXSLwg%3D%3D) | |
---
Dear fellow American,
Did you know there is a specific legislative provision ensuring that your federal tax dollars do not fund abortions?

Since 1976, the Hyde Amendment has protected American taxpayers from paying for abortions. Throughout its history, the Hyde Amendment has received widespread bipartisan support from both Congress and the White House. But if President Biden, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-Calif.), Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.), and their pro-abortion allies in Congress have their way, this critically important provision could be undone.

[**Please, right now, sign this No Taxpayer Funding of Abortion emergency petition to House Speaker Nancy Pelosi and Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6baa08e4a57a4ea4a2a05ab70b1c43f0&_e=_XIYyACSiJcS0GFPdg4uH5C_uj75VKvtKljmpaPyr6dHkgAVbDPIVkuhz5afW-sFYoftLptvdzLmA-yetukChzXjYui_bNJTMegUe9ss8qYPCRz56watxnMDlQwArHYGaRZTACHS-R5WT8ui8uYjGcxt6bsw5VwxUnRuP_k-ejCdD-ngzxBwPqb4Fa5d-k11Rckwst0hofDMjnyx2AGoPQ%3D%3D)
[**Sign the No Taxpayer Funding of Abortion petition**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6baa08e4a57a4ea4a2a05ab70b1c43f0&_e=_XIYyACSiJcS0GFPdg4uH5C_uj75VKvtKljmpaPyr6dHkgAVbDPIVkuhz5afW-sF4mdh0E9P6YLawRj0Xo7sQsUs5wmj8A0835WgeAApzD6nIou0L0wKabROe_j052d2ZIFfwoinQUO__IGOmoKtAj2za_F28ruYYJljp4mvpI-3Ok9H2E4WIaheLqxbRFz4_tc4eE3SUnDZNtis0rZkcA%3D%3D)
The pro-abortion lobby is hard at work trying to roll back the Hyde Amendment, as well as the many pro-life victories achieved during the Trump administration, including:
* The Protecting Life in Global Health Assistance (PLGHA) policy, which blocked funding for international organizations that perform or promote abortion;
* A Title X rule change that closed an abortion funding loophole by ensuring financial and physical separation between family planning clinics and abortion facilities;
* An executive order that reinforced existing protections for children born prematurely, with disabilities, or in medical distress, including infants who survive abortion; and
* A conscience exemption from the Obamacare “contraceptive mandate” for organizations with moral or religious objections to purchasing insurance that includes coverage of contraceptives and abortion-causing drugs.

According to a January 2021 Marist poll, 58% of Americans oppose taxpayer funding of abortion. But unless you and I — and many thousands of other Americans who value life — speak up now, the Pelosi-led House and Schumer-led Senate are very likely to ignore the will of the people and act against our values and the lives of the unborn — especially as a "lame-duck" session of Congress looms on the horizon!

[**You and I must take a stand NOW to preserve pro-life policy and ensure the Hyde Amendment remains intact for future generations.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6baa08e4a57a4ea4a2a05ab70b1c43f0&_e=_XIYyACSiJcS0GFPdg4uH5C_uj75VKvtKljmpaPyr6dHkgAVbDPIVkuhz5afW-sFKsFHQqBGB_ytoy_GnXxQ0NnQKZEY-bEEHuXKC3ORZXlxwvUKVw5vwTvqAc_TL6RnRbXk8CCyT1VYQiIZ-jDRC36ynJcRNZ7bIv2Ba6OIG89sAw49k1N4tsi0MY2UPABp6uLQ9QGfTg9E_C2b2QD8Bw%3D%3D)

President Biden’s proposed federal budget for this year removed the Hyde Amendment—following through on a campaign promise made by every Democratic presidential candidate in 2020. We must act now to demand that our tax dollars NOT fund abortions.

Family Research Council Action has been working feverishly to defeat the pro-abortion special interests and their allies in Congress.

We’ve been working with pro-life legislators in Congress to help secure the passage of important legislation, and we’ve been working at the state level all across America to protect life as well.

With Democrats in control of Congress for another two months, innocent unborn lives are at risk in America like never before.

If you and I remain silent, innocent children will tragically die.

[**Please help us fight back against President Joe Biden, Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and their pro-abortion allies today.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6baa08e4a57a4ea4a2a05ab70b1c43f0&_e=_XIYyACSiJcS0GFPdg4uH5C_uj75VKvtKljmpaPyr6dHkgAVbDPIVkuhz5afW-sFcJL0oo8gO5C9eqnMIuAUdFJ9tUkHOE6_sl8IYUR5c9C5MV5f5YZ-U0OmjvqGrJQiM8sNACUwaq-nA2hEs-GKyT9UIIbm6npR-lNMZqHFzSYC1nJ1UM21JCR2JCt9gfrMP169Gra4GIG9WLN1YQYlnw%3D%3D)
[**Sign the No Taxpayer Funding of Abortion petition**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6baa08e4a57a4ea4a2a05ab70b1c43f0&_e=_XIYyACSiJcS0GFPdg4uH5C_uj75VKvtKljmpaPyr6dHkgAVbDPIVkuhz5afW-sFPfpgeA4PYnSGybLk32TwkJ_oxJFjAw_70m0p91MVeOPkcwwSpc9kMg2KGwy11v1dS-MkqdTRLRw_sQAoTg-8WGoeY1fldHuQGkCHOa2NMIIq3z4kDx69UgftZRZuPFQ7R7mUja-Dp_Gua87uE19Mng%3D%3D)
Thank you, and God bless!
For America,
Lt. Gen. (Ret.) William G. Boykin
Executive Vice President
Family Research Council Action
|
---
**FRC Action**
801 G Street NW, Washington, D.C. 20001

Family Research Council Action (FRC Action) operates as a social welfare organization organized under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to FRC Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. Your contribution will be used in support of the general mission of FRC Action. FRC Action does not accept contributions designated or earmarked for the purpose of influencing an election.

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

clean_body: | | Dear fellow American, Did you know there is a specific legislative provision ensuring that your federal tax dollars do not fund abortions? Since 1976, the Hyde Amendment has protected American taxpayers from paying for abortions. Throughout its history, the Hyde Amendment has received widespread bipartisan support from both Congress and the White House. But if President Biden, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-Calif.), Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.), and their pro-abortion allies in Congress have their way, this critically important provision could be undone. The pro-abortion lobby is hard at work trying to roll back the Hyde Amendment, as well as the many pro-life victories achieved during the Trump administration, including: The Protecting Life in Global Health Assistance (PLGHA) policy, which blocked funding for international organizations that perform or promote abortion; A Title X rule change that closed an abortion funding loophole by ensuring financial and physical separation between family planning clinics and abortion facilities; An executive order that reinforced existing protections for children born prematurely, with disabilities, or in medical distress, including infants who survive abortion; and A conscience exemption from the Obamacare “contraceptive mandate” for organizations with moral or religious objections to purchasing insurance that includes coverage of contraceptives and abortion-causing drugs. According to a January 2021 Marist poll, 58% of Americans oppose taxpayer funding of abortion. But unless you and I — and many thousands of other Americans who value life — speak up now, the Pelosi-led House and Schumer-led Senate are very likely to ignore the will of the people and act against our values and the lives of the unborn — especially as a "lame-duck" session of Congress looms on the horizon! President Biden’s proposed federal budget for this year removed the Hyde Amendment—following through on a campaign promise made by every Democratic presidential candidate in 2020. We must act now to demand that our tax dollars NOT fund abortions. Family Research Council Action has been working feverishly to defeat the pro-abortion special interests and their allies in Congress. We’ve been working with pro-life legislators in Congress to help secure the passage of important legislation, and we’ve been working at the state level all across America to protect life as well. With Democrats in control of Congress for another two months, innocent unborn lives are at risk in America like never before. If you and I remain silent, innocent children will tragically die. Thank you, and God bless! For America, Lt. Gen. (Ret.) William G. Boykin Executive Vice President Family Research Council Action | FRC Action 801 G Street NW, Washington, D.C. 20001 Family Research Council Action (FRC Action) operates as a social welfare organization organized under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to FRC Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. Your contribution will be used in support of the general mission of FRC Action. FRC Action does not accept contributions designated or earmarked for the purpose of influencing an election. Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

_Congratulations Crystal!_ This week, Crystal was awarded the Community Sentinel Award for Environmental Leadership by the FracTracker Alliance. As you know, Crystal has been continually out front mobilizing and advocating against MVP/MVP Southgate, and the Dirty Deal. The Dirty Deal fight is ramping up again as Manchin drafts a new version of the bill and threatens to attach it to other end-of-year must-pass legislation. Stand with Crystal and take action to block it. _This weekend!_ **12/3 and 12/4 Garden Days at Crystal and Jasons's** Local Garden Guardian Martin Jahn will be leading 2 Volunteer Work Days this weekend in Crystal and Jason’s garden. Volunteers will be winterizing beds and transplanting blueberry bushes. Bring your own lunch and water. If you have garden tools, please bring them along, especially hoes, forks, pickaxes and shovels. **Saturday Dec 3 10am-2pm** **Sunday Dec 4 10am-2pm** **5123 HWY 119, Mebane, NC** **12/3 Air Permit Denial Anniversary Celebration** 12/3 marks the 1-year anniversary of the Lambert Compressor Station air permit denial! It's a great time to read up on the unnecessary MVP Southgate Extension. _We also recommend you check out this recent[podcast on MVP](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/1XQbiUZqIgkFRQxQopJGKeqdhWuIqpW0eQhmA8EUWy96AmYjNiKoqZwskRAcAFiPmOYoQib2-VLBby8l-thjXYuT1waliaZFd1WfcT6UBCtdCovFeSMOLmvykxclxbjquxq0Isbr-bdiwoS-cMR81tjEtXwaPp6qYZxyo6ifB5XnR33YPqdejOBo-OpsN3a_gMc7w98S8XvOwQ3L8WyKqaXTLHIOn6K3XriMmjUzy9ERApH1lwAPn88Cauw6MO1vh-n_XPVN5Qr2Vlte5Gv0E8b00J6rROx9BZHvFs8B-EKuNcpQ3Txh9UGy2roggL8zSvlhty9yG7PB9IRwpmgmg_KGnE9KR5sp1SF_XhNs12LvqWMgCJnYav_-aX6JSu1GJNVnp6Kdy3kLEsgHHOxdUw/3rn/OqkjCct5RKyP_RVlN6y2Ig/h3/HT8kNyXhzZSuSkEW6p12ed6hkCOTewUMRzyHOdYLyug), featuring fearless POWHR organizer Crystal Mello. _

This week, Crystal was awarded the Community Sentinel Award for Environmental Leadership by the FracTracker Alliance. As you know, Crystal has been continually out front mobilizing and advocating against MVP/MVP Southgate, and the Dirty Deal. The Dirty Deal fight is ramping up again as Manchin drafts a new version of the bill and threatens to attach it to other end-of-year must-pass legislation. Stand with Crystal and take action to block it. This weekend! 12/3 and 12/4 Garden Days at Crystal and Jasons's Local Garden Guardian Martin Jahn will be leading 2 Volunteer Work Days this weekend in Crystal and Jason’s garden. Volunteers will be winterizing beds and transplanting blueberry bushes. Bring your own lunch and water. If you have garden tools, please bring them along, especially hoes, forks, pickaxes and shovels. Saturday Dec 3 10am-2pm Sunday Dec 4 10am-2pm 5123 HWY 119, Mebane, NC 12/3 Air Permit Denial Anniversary Celebration 12/3 marks the 1-year anniversary of the Lambert Compressor Station air permit denial! It's a great time to read up on the unnecessary MVP Southgate Extension. We also recommend you check out this recent, featuring fearless POWHR organizer Crystal Mello. | Join us Dec 16! | Bila:huk, 7 Directions of Service | | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from 7 Directions of Service, please .

name: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
subject: This is how deep we go.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, I wanted to
personally reach out and give you a behind the scenes look into everything
Justice Democrats did to recruit and support Summer Lee’s winning
campaign.

It all began in 2021, through statistical analysis we identified PA-12 as
a target district for us to recruit a progressive leader who could run
against the political establishment and win.

After talking to over 180 local leaders, organizers, union members, and
activists in Western Pennsylvania, it was clear that State Rep. Summer Lee
was by far the strongest leader and a truly grassroots candidate to run in
this district.

Then, we worked with Summer’s campaign for Congress from day one. We
supported her from launch through victory, helping her campaign create its
branding, media and policy preparations, and helped her secure major
endorsements from national progressives.

We supported Summer’s on the ground organizing and helped her fight off
over $10 million in outside spending against her from groups like AIPAC.
And with grassroots contributions from people like you, we raised over
$100,000 directly for her campaign.

Our team and volunteers boosted Summer’s field operations both during the
primary and general elections. Our volunteers helped her reach 131,000
total calls and 256,000 total text messages to voters in PA-12.

Our team with Congresswoman-elect Summer Lee

This is how deep we go with our candidates. No other organization in the
progressive arena recruits and supports candidates like we do. Now, Summer
Lee will make history in January when she’s sworn in and will be the first
Black woman to represent Pennsylvania in Congress.

But all of this work takes major resources especially when we have to
fight back against right-wing super PACs like AIPAC who will be relentless
in their future attacks against outspoken progressives like Summer.

And because our fundraising continues to decline, we need to see a major
increase in contributions immediately. Otherwise, we’ll have to make some
hard decisions about where to make budget cuts — which will mean pulling
back critical areas of support for our candidates.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122267?refcode=em20221202-26353&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26353%2E1203867%2E1Rf7U6 ]Peter, we
know how to win. We’ve been winning. But we’re at an inflection point as
an organization and we need your support now. So what do you say? Will you
contribute $3 (or more!) right now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122267?refcode=em20221202-26353&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26353%2E1203867%2E1Rf7U6 ]Contribute $3

Our work over the last five years has transformed Democratic politics as
we know it. We recruited and helped elect AOC, Jamaal Bowman, Cori Bush,
and now Summer Lee. Those progressive fighters, alongside every other
Justice Democrat in Congress, are pushing for policies that match the
scale of the crises we face.

To continue electing new fighters to join them in the Squad, where they’ll
fight for us, we need the resources to fund our operation. We completely
rely on grassroots support from people like you. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122267?refcode=em20221202-26353&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26353%2E1203867%2E1Rf7U6 ]So with our
fundraising declining, we’re coming directly to supporters like you to
chip in and help us make up the difference.

Whether you can donate today or not, I’m still so thankful for your
support. Remember, it’s because of you that Summer’s win was possible —
and we made history.

With gratitude,

Alexandra Rojas

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122267?refcode=em20221202-26353&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=26353%2E1203867%2E1Rf7U6 ]Contribute $3

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=26353%2E1203867%2E1Rf7U6 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=26353%2E1203867%2E1Rf7U6 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221202-26353-footer&t=1025&refcode2=26353_1203867_1Rf7U6&akid=26353%2E1203867%2E1Rf7U6

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=26353%2E1203867%2E1Rf7U6

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

[ ]Contribute $3 Our work over the last five years has transformed Democratic politics as we know it. We recruited and helped elect AOC, Jamaal Bowman, Cori Bush, and now Summer Lee. Those progressive fighters, alongside every other Justice Democrat in Congress, are pushing for policies that match the scale of the crises we face. To continue electing new fighters to join them in the Squad, where they’ll fight for us, we need the resources to fund our operation. We completely rely on grassroots support from people like you. [ ]So with our fundraising declining, we’re coming directly to supporters like you to chip in and help us make up the difference. Whether you can donate today or not, I’m still so thankful for your support. Remember, it’s because of you that Summer’s win was possible — and we made history. With gratitude, Alexandra Rojas [ ]Contribute $3 Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

clean_body: We need to send Sen. Warnock back to Washington to fight for us. = Election season isn’t quite done yet, Peter. National Democrats may have secured our majority in the U.S. Senate, but we have a chance to expand it by one more seat with a runoff election happening right here in Georgia. Reverend Raphael Warnock is in the fight of his political life against an extreme GOP candidate, Herschel Walker, and he needs everyone’s support to win once again. Our right to vote is not guaranteed, Peter. Here in Georgia, we face restrictive voting laws that make access to the ballot box difficult for so many. Even now, the Georgia GOP has shortened the amount of time before the runoff, making it more difficult to reach voters before the critical election. We have to recreate the 2021 runoff turnout with a whole month shaved off our schedule, and that’s not an easy task to accomplish. That’s why it’s important that everyone makes a plan to vote, Peter. Keeping each other accountable for making our voice heard is our best way to stop GOP extremism and expand our Democratic power in Georgia. Let's do this, Georgia House Democrats | The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is Georgia’s most diverse group of leaders working on the ground in Georgia every day to flip the State House and secure a blue Georgia. To create the change we need, we’ll need all the help we can get. Will you join the movement for a blue Georgia by donating today? = Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC Georgia House Democratic Caucus PO Box 18622 Atlanta, GA 31126 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| | | Patriot,

**Herschel Walker is 4 days away from Election Day and we are out of time.**
Herschel's been outraised every quarter, outspent every month and with Election Day so close my team and I have decided to launch an **[EMERGENCY ELECTION FUND WITH 2X MATCHING](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62012877:Jol7P2GLN:m:1:3299561967:66FCCA74A22862FCA07E623B336CED6C:r "EMERGENCY ELECTION FUND

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

| I've been meaning to cut back on emails to you, Peter - I'd hate to sound like Zelenskyy when he begs Washington for more billion-dollar checks - but this is important.
Our America First Movement faced the very first fundraising goal post-Election Day, and we fell short by just over $2K.
That would be a setback in ANY circumstance, Peter.
But it's ESPECIALLY bad when the Swamp Establishment is poring over our numbers looking for ANYTHING they can as a sign that support from Trump Republicans is slipping!

name: Herschel Walker
subject: our opponent is better funded
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|

---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007937:6DQ3P2GKN:m:1:3372944669:29A746E096112273880FCCE820FD61C3:r)**

[** Chip in before Midnight -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007937:6DQ3P2GKN:m:1:3372944669:29A746E096112273880FCCE820FD61C3:r)
We only have a few hours left to pick up the pace. **[If every person reading this email right now would chip in, we'd easily hit our goal.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007937:6DQ3P2GKN:m:1:3372944669:29A746E096112273880FCCE820FD61C3:r)**

**[So Peter, I'm personally asking you today to chip in to my campaign BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so that we win this critical runoff!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007937:6DQ3P2GKN:m:1:3372944669:29A746E096112273880FCCE820FD61C3:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007937:6DQ3P2GKN:m:1:3372944669:29A746E096112273880FCCE820FD61C3:r)

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I need you by my side, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
Folks: Our battleground race just shifted into new territory,
and I urgently need folks like you by my side to keep up the fight. Here's
why:

FIRST, right-wing super PACs flooded tens of millions of dollars into
Georgia to help my opponent, Herschel Walker, win.

BUT THEN, our people-powered movement fought back against this
unprecedented spending and forced our race into a runoff election.

NOW, we need all hands on deck to pull ahead and keep Georgia blue. We're
looking for 538 more folks to give before our crucial 11:59 p.m. deadline,
but time is running out, and we're falling short.

So much is at stake. We got to this point
without taking a cent from corporate PACs, and I'm determined to continue
this fight the grassroots way. That's why I'm counting on you to pitch in
whatever you can at this critical moment.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/31802?t=1008&amount=32&akid=6463%2E3611125%2EHtiPvn ]Please, will you rush a donation of $32 or more right now to split
between me and Tim Ryan so we can defeat Walker and keep Georgia blue?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/31802?t=1009&express_lane=true&amount=32&akid=6463%2E3611125%2EHtiPvn ]Donate $32 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/31802?t=1010&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=6463%2E3611125%2EHtiPvn ]Donate $50

Let's go win this.

—Rev. Warnock

name: Gallagher Foreign Policy HQ
subject: Your Monthly Foreign Policy Briefing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin
body:
Overview: countering the threat of TikTok, protests erupt in China, Biden greenlights Venezuelan oil... | | | [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=ae567bcc43ab4569bf2fb7ddd20f619f&_e=OzJHaZOsZOQx5xsw8ABHa2SMRbtHRyLOWID1P3K38FqFWrN6h8wSbJ2FH_7coBsMDKLpQ3t9qPD6z_86EiQe8r0jApwtGAfkirFm44BiqhTVWRENjhPpualsHio030HBa2RMAZRZU69X_7UJ8scx-VJBKO0jgfVDw1E7CGgN0f9Covtgq0gvLsZid51rggaQVOQz7p7nAcFeLjfpilRBWu4WxhDTGUSYbX49vJ6IZI3ixgN3V7Y1aXdE07f_0hML)
---
| | Peter, All eyes are on Washington as Republicans prepare to take back the majority in the House –– but Mike isn’t taking his focus off major events happening around the globe. Catch up on all Mike has been doing on the foreign policy front lately and _[**sign the petition**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=ae567bcc43ab4569bf2fb7ddd20f619f&_e=OzJHaZOsZOQx5xsw8ABHa2SMRbtHRyLOWID1P3K38FqFWrN6h8wSbJ2FH_7coBsMDKLpQ3t9qPD6z_86EiQe8l21j_7HN5wh0q8Nn-2TbbSLHeHoH_AT0OFiTdIfs2du-X0H0_qNTIHWeAfrFoPhl7ZEiR2FWO-ITn9QMyzh8SYi1bAlLCiKcsMiaGnLhqszLzLMnjJE5NItWZCCLYLZ-teB7lTUQ82cdtYzdrfUZ5Az0GZ2tWhdpMGFvqd5uxsV)_ to support Mike’s push to BAN TikTok over security concerns.
---
**Gallagher Proposes TikTok Ban**
---
| | [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=ae567bcc43ab4569bf2fb7ddd20f619f&_e=OzJHaZOsZOQx5xsw8ABHawnX7w4xUm1njYna9bDYeS4CrTNZfsCr4bZghATNwKjszDDX2G0SXXDUxGQhpLRvqPcqSFRRuKn02t14ez0xrlTWFurMqKs3O5-kE9W1iiKKnfrJck5gngx6yIkxUySs28R2SOKi-9ohSzf_GpsoEkZhslG6_nNuow3HybleN89PupLVAWHaCJM30zmSzMUcecdNPICIhfnwAAzsxwKMrCY6Enx5xDGk31wGj0mx6W3CvueqxjBGiI_QrvU5ev1BSqx7G2iOzPbiAKsV7eFHgj0Sl4-k4f9zCGq4kYlo3nnWkEt0kVHnqzld1SQDNJRLIFVdW-BU8kmN5b1sQfAWnJg%3D)
---
| | **Bottom Line:** _"__TikTok is digital fentanyl addicting our kids, and just like actual fentanyl, it ultimately goes back to the Chinese Communist Party. TikTok is owned by ByteDance. ByteDance is controlled by the CCP. That means the CCP can track your location, it can track your keystrokes, it can censor your news. Why would we give our foremost adversary that amount of power? We need to ban TikTok.”_
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION TO BAN TIKTOK**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=ae567bcc43ab4569bf2fb7ddd20f619f&_e=OzJHaZOsZOQx5xsw8ABHa2SMRbtHRyLOWID1P3K38FqFWrN6h8wSbJ2FH_7coBsMDKLpQ3t9qPD6z_86EiQe8iXDfeUNqKyjaDPgp8VNrYNXd149tcZl8fnFHRuNLFAnxoXOTe4iPV7AH-pO1bnn_nITfE2liC9wb_jlGtafDAS6oo0Oll1kNCVeXyzATEhkvXmfSNhwDFFxQHzAw7uTW6Vy1yte28gxUxYPRLIQ1rze6m-CYrB8v46IIZRNdCOe)
---
| | **Mike on China’s Anti-Lockdown Protests**
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=ae567bcc43ab4569bf2fb7ddd20f619f&_e=OzJHaZOsZOQx5xsw8ABHa6bFjyeSwQ-1ooSNvIWJxjvPDD0066x_U06mOiQd0yRUKVn3G1TxBVoLVlz14-AbaATN4eaHRM9sw6Gvm3XytPs2FsKy7UQSrj2LyOblH5vvKBIGX4Qvi0b4aUplr569nmmdT6LGOaPh1dqDarSmQJXAoGSndBjYJiXgkvVPbYhAjo3I_NQWloDFRe0TE71i9EA3onQPURzaKzJQ5QNghc9Z1ojSJGLVHJC-3q4S8Sl5TM6zhDby-gxECN3VSvqfwKe06Ch9cQs2R1wI2dXhDQM%3D)
---
**Bottom Line:** _"__As the CCP doubles down on oppression, we need to double down on freedom...We need to embrace American values as a self-evident contrast to the Orwellian oppression of the CCP. That’s how we win the ideological fight over the long term.”_
---
**Mike on Arming Taiwan Against China**
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=ae567bcc43ab4569bf2fb7ddd20f619f&_e=OzJHaZOsZOQx5xsw8ABHa6bFjyeSwQ-1ooSNvIWJxjvPDD0066x_U06mOiQd0yRUR86qU9oYgIHQ2wLo9KJMAUNRrF0I8KfjsT19ShoQdm1s2nPNZn0tiBSnVa2uoIrxt0JKrSKkFv3ABZcYjpae-JrE-Wgc24O0cqXLUvi4YPbPrrq9-3wPOL__qGbqGZSnNjtoRZm2wNZP-XWlBbHTML4DD1_XZ3b1CrRB4BrB60xLiHL4y24Wnxbd5ozMqXKfeDC3rQkucvnxZYR-WUrtlEeahjPcCx08hsEAgrVNR3I%3D)
---
**Bottom Line:** _"__The lesson of Ukraine is that you need to arm your partners and allies before the shooting starts. It gives you your best chance of actually avoiding war in the first place... we need to get to work now with a sense of urgency.”_
---
**Gallagher Tells Iran to Look in the Mirror**
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=ae567bcc43ab4569bf2fb7ddd20f619f&_e=OzJHaZOsZOQx5xsw8ABHa-dKYbW6SGsdz1xGkxuuoODqBf1okq1NH-BbEyCy10HegxIaeweKTej37-HQShx4Gcgz_aes9KxW7eJvcqnADlai7CPoDfrA3TAVpqtTWVAV6VPzeTE2v6nTDeqauqnuqy7qaUvSJQ5SgBVphCAx492EtOyX5-NMqUjGmwJnzC4qyervLvy4yA_aCQoAoqdCSMjUx5oZMpbZYg4ps2OUe74JE4OTl0bcXnFc4wZ9K3quPWspOzGtqrCmPaNBjk-HHTEmN7ox3HhVAggrjhM2rXA%3D)
---
**Bottom Line:** _"__Quite a lot of chutzpah for the world's leading state sponsor of terrorism to be criticizing us... even on our worst day, people would rather have the freedom that we enjoy in the United States of America than be subject to the dictators that we see in Tehran or Beijing.”_
---
**Biden Greenlights Venezuelan Oil After Sanctions**
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=ae567bcc43ab4569bf2fb7ddd20f619f&_e=OzJHaZOsZOQx5xsw8ABHa9TGaP7DCxfDkicowGL0RClDh5twQW4AjKxOobLQaCHt52BhW0jBA_tUFAwsRyp1FfawZ8C8QNrJQy09Dg2pa9Ryfd0hTpJkJwb6PU2wn1Oin_w9792tq2ZDkL4sEFGUNmbe2lot9CzqqSWOBxKFgUrHLugrGT1camCuChapPo2-l8YHQWgHXEFuHFxSyoS7bYa0fonnOLpSLYeKuD8TA5_W2m3i0gvJOhbrmAMv6YZl_5hWegYHN6vOIcOHyInrGow6oaW7TfAkRkmArFJ9khs%3D)
---
**Bottom Line:** _"The Treasury Department granted permission Saturday for oil giant Chevron to produce and export oil from Venezuela following the South American country’s decision to restart talks with opposition groups. The move could add supply to the global oil market, which may ease fuel prices and speed the declines in U.S. gasoline prices that have been a political burden for President Joe Biden since Russia invaded Ukraine in February.”_
---
**Thank you for reading this month’s edition of the Foreign Policy Newsletter –– we’ll be in touch soon as we monitor developing stories from around the globe.** –– Gallagher Foreign Policy HQ
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=ae567bcc43ab4569bf2fb7ddd20f619f&_e=OzJHaZOsZOQx5xsw8ABHa2SMRbtHRyLOWID1P3K38FqFWrN6h8wSbJ2FH_7coBsMRBSHTY3aUL1LkD4fIl5ntamjLnxqPy1SkHNWu9NQJoqemRIYKSv34ZGtXPRJhIFTcUpT3kRaa4_1bpMQalJMFFTRCBqfOUAxoZ3_DMxAriqJ-KL_3ZCp2PYW815Fhynb32w4MMULMACV4Ll3dgo6FPleCZKtcp2n-CUWv35zTkWJbPbYJE20vbX4ektGOxx1)
---
**_Mike joined the United States Marine Corps the day he graduated from college._** _He served seven years on active duty as a Human Intelligence/Counterintelligence Officer and Regional Affairs Officer for the Middle East and North Africa, earning the rank of Captain. clean_body: Overview: countering the threat of TikTok, protests erupt in China, Biden greenlights Venezuelan oil... | | | | | Peter, All eyes are on Washington as Republicans prepare to take back the majority in the House –– but Mike isn’t taking his focus off major events happening around the globe. Catch up on all Mike has been doing on the foreign policy front lately and to support Mike’s push to BAN TikTok over security concerns. Gallagher Proposes TikTok Ban | | | | Bottom Line: "TikTok is digital fentanyl addicting our kids, and just like actual fentanyl, it ultimately goes back to the Chinese Communist Party. TikTok is owned by ByteDance. ByteDance is controlled by the CCP. That means the CCP can track your location, it can track your keystrokes, it can censor your news. Why would we give our foremost adversary that amount of power? We need to ban TikTok.” | | Mike on China’s Anti-Lockdown Protests Bottom Line: "As the CCP doubles down on oppression, we need to double down on freedom...We need to embrace American values as a self-evident contrast to the Orwellian oppression of the CCP. That’s how we win the ideological fight over the long term.” Mike on Arming Taiwan Against China Bottom Line: "The lesson of Ukraine is that you need to arm your partners and allies before the shooting starts. It gives you your best chance of actually avoiding war in the first place... we need to get to work now with a sense of urgency.” Gallagher Tells Iran to Look in the Mirror Bottom Line: "Quite a lot of chutzpah for the world's leading state sponsor of terrorism to be criticizing us... even on our worst day, people would rather have the freedom that we enjoy in the United States of America than be subject to the dictators that we see in Tehran or Beijing.” Biden Greenlights Venezuelan Oil After Sanctions Bottom Line: "The Treasury Department granted permission Saturday for oil giant Chevron to produce and export oil from Venezuela following the South American country’s decision to restart talks with opposition groups. The move could add supply to the global oil market, which may ease fuel prices and speed the declines in U.S. gasoline prices that have been a political burden for President Joe Biden since Russia invaded Ukraine in February.” Thank you for reading this month’s edition of the Foreign Policy Newsletter –– we’ll be in touch soon as we monitor developing stories from around the globe. –– Gallagher Foreign Policy HQ Mike joined the United States Marine Corps the day he graduated from college. He served seven years on active duty as a Human Intelligence/Counterintelligence Officer and Regional Affairs Officer for the Middle East and North Africa, earning the rank of Captain. During his service he deployed twice to Iraq as a commander of intelligence teams. Since being elected to Congress, Mike has continued to fight for a stronger, more secure America by confronting Communist China, advocating for real border security, modernizing our military, and always putting America first in foreign affairs. Your support is essential to ensure that Mike can continue to fight for strong American leadership abroad –– | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin. | | P.O. She’ll keep fighting to stop price-gouging to lower costs for families and ensure our economy works for working people.
Thanks for being on Team Porter.

clean_body: Fossil fuel companies reported record profits. It’s no wonder prices are high. Katie has introduced legislation to stop corporate price gouging and hold corporations accountable, but it’s stalled in the Senate. She’ll keep fighting to stop price-gouging to lower costs for families and ensure our economy works for working people. Thanks for being on Team Porter. KPHQ Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress

clean_body: If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority. | Fellow American, Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today. Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American. Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff! If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Sent to Full Mag News subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Rev. Warnock
subject: I’m humbly asking for your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | It’s official: voting is underway in our critical runoff Senate race.

With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking:** **[Will you split $5 or more right now between me and the DSCC to keep Georgia blue and fight for every Senate seat?](https://go.dscc.org/go/5319?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20221202-RevWarnock-WarnockPositive-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20221202-RevWarnock-WarnockPositive-Pros-sl1&akid=8973%2E9716520%2EIzs8kh)**

GOP donors are flooding our race with over $122 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.

**I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans going _all-in_ to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks – but we're falling short, and I need your help.**

With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. That's why I'm humbly asking: GOP donors are flooding our race with over $122 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red. I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans going all-in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks – but we're falling short, and I need your help. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I'm counting on you, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
| | | Peter: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it.** **** My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 bothers and sisters and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. 's church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator. Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. **That’s why I have to ask:** ****[**Please, Peter, will you chip in $25 or more right now to split between me and United Rural Democrats so we can keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wpeWWXWAhRJzE70G7rtTN2jKnntBcq7U9_dPNfp8mIfFUlFGG503ABUxtq_kv8gzbxLtjhXOXVOiwuyF4Xi9JuPmd50OhhhfDXWFrqcq9bLhm6PgeSXoTP9Y08KLBtGpvLcy26-UerrN1mCGU33iBmofrB4CesdtJBFYzHBKllncCeucVeDP6NtZ0fJVXjk2XDP9gVUORzsULPDmlklLeA7Ux0dMW3U8jiV_HXghuOVyQdk4ISCSZnoa4tZ-jzsXM9lkJN2P60ZZvpS1tvf8oxnl_bEs_aU4LbxF89U-Z4LNsBJGc9wEqDG2prOwt6ze6HCmlQ-QGAM8n0QB6nkCk6rnz4X9TOPqHaMK5XVVxMyy6fIDqPv9XOGcxakP4hFdc/3rn/0PYuDCG2Tq-fTbkbdz8h2g/h0/myygrSVMY8a7OYBjsHnrmoxxcKKO-Vw39EKfNrp0uBg)**** **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wpeWWXWAhRJzE70G7rtTN2CQFHIJe2zYbannYxVW_8XRLBIvcAZRq30Gm6fKRb9iEGGgFpBiPoTH3RbmXUJVTdH93RDRPuQaHLfKHL5N_ypEjLBaG8E5ecsQBOQnaV4Ow1f6oXcy883CskZsQMbUaFagzseA4_LyIsi3LrHovtoKoYOD0IIXk-hBmaDW5vbua4GR3suQBgMhPeqSpXM0wCz6R_1sd7SI68DEz-RVppzoGseAFz8DZzFcFg8WPPOD0JJrYZjoMb3nNZcbZcYEqTKfP7yN4pLgk3KWsg5jMhB5pREiA9IS98Og-U6-bL6-pvUQoNuE_IcxH7N-lOUWU5bXNfF7HnNfwVaLRNxoFxiA/3rn/0PYuDCG2Tq-fTbkbdz8h2g/h1/kxEN4JK3rlxo0qC2s8ZYzt5jZ8lSjh-PeKpMExXv03k)** I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress. **They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. But unlike Walker, I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots folks like**** _you_****with me to win – now more than ever.** ******[So please, Peter, I'm personally asking: Will you split $25 or more between me and United Rural Democrats to become one of the 25,000 donors we need to kickstart our runoff campaign, defeat Herschel Walker, and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wpeWWXWAhRJzE70G7rtTN2jKnntBcq7U9_dPNfp8mIfFUlFGG503ABUxtq_kv8gzYTWJS7yhNv1FqF0JAsLSJQu3gpCrxIrhPPEaC9egnvfmTff9-JqklDXcJw_zlaarNSgHwK_kJ5JFlmEo4b5DrAdseIhVxCzfsz8J8ldThuBgZohru_WLv3Slq8AB92vjoyjsrY_fu3AzZ2e5UY-LyuRlHu9C-J3JTZbaYGXO5wgyNVnMrxfsvW-CjeVVsoXayCOXub4XyjXCwmJLOewk-RqDfVP_jjow8ROKPG31yAYXW1S1yB2d3IuW-UPChlRrANNlD5Rf4VcyxDTBvhOhbWZAsAz3WSC24RLkOzhcBbTy7GlTdCV77Oe899hzrkvts/3rn/0PYuDCG2Tq-fTbkbdz8h2g/h2/MiB9LI0VNm7kgvKkgfuv6AH9LBhR61Gtu7Cr2IDupGw)** Thank you, Reverend Warnock ****
---

United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. **Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?**

clean_body: | | | Peter: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it. ** My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 bothers and sisters and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. 's church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator. Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. That’s why I have to ask: I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress. They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. But unlike Walker, I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots folks like** youwith me to win – now more than ever. **** Thank you, Reverend Warnock ** United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

subject: last night on stage with President Obama

**Friend, last night, President Obama and I shared a rally stage.** It's an honor to have him by our side at this pivotal moment.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55443505/381720044/-598064402?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5240-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGJkNDNmMS02NjcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e3Ns4LKwnoKY-IaHp2od0NbYWSpJ4sWQ4JDHlhhlApE=)
If you didn't get a chance to join our rally, here's what you need to know: **In four days, we're going to win this runoff election and keep Georgia blue.**
But here’s the thing: Republicans know this, and they’re afraid. We narrowly led Herschel Walker in the general election – so now the GOP is flooding this race with more than $58 million to help Walker take the lead in these final days.
They won’t hold back, and neither can we. That’s why I urgently need your support to help hit our critical midnight fundraising goal.
**Friend, I’m personally asking: [Will you please donate $5 – or whatever you can right now – so we can win in Georgia and expand our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55443506/381720045/-598064402?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5240-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGJkNDNmMS02NjcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e3Ns4LKwnoKY-IaHp2od0NbYWSpJ4sWQ4JDHlhhlApE=)**
Thank you so much for all you do, friend.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007952:6DMNM2GhN:m:1:3373497171:068D7CEF5D38251C78E037BE9F3A3E04:r)**

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: High hopes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55467389/381764399/685856095?refcode=fl_email_na_20221202thankyou_gv_od90ds_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzExNzQ5Mi05NTcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qh0Lsd0pXhcEuMSx_kzzJ3Ai3hi6Rbin6-HZmfVxm60=)
---
Hi friends, I wanted to take a moment to express my utmost gratitude for everything you’ve done to contribute to our people-powered movement and get us over the finish line last month. With your support, we built one of the strongest grassroots campaigns in one of the nation’s top ten House races, and _we won_ — flipping New Mexico’s 2nd congressional district from red to blue! That is an amazing feat, and it’s thanks to people like you. Now that you’ve made me your Congressman-elect, I’m fired up and focused on setting up our office, putting a team together, and preparing to serve you in Washington come January. I have high hopes and high aspirations, and I’m determined to be an effective, impactful leader who gets results for New Mexicans over these next two years. My number one priority? Bring good-paying jobs to New Mexico, raise workers’ wages, lower the cost of goods, and increase the quality of life for people in this district. This was a heated toss-up race, but I am here for a reason, and it is to represent the people of New Mexico. I will show up. I will support you. I will listen to you, and we can work together. Thank you for being on this journey with me as I make my way to Congress. Your continued support will power our movement forward as I work to make a positive difference for New Mexico. Viva NM-02! — Gabe | | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and immigrant and civil rights to Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico.

clean_body: | = Hi friends, I wanted to take a moment to express my utmost gratitude for everything you’ve done to contribute to our people-powered movement and get us over the finish line last month. With your support, we built one of the strongest grassroots campaigns in one of the nation’s top ten House races, and we won — flipping New Mexico’s 2nd congressional district from red to blue! That is an amazing feat, and it’s thanks to people like you. Now that you’ve made me your Congressman-elect, I’m fired up and focused on setting up our office, putting a team together, and preparing to serve you in Washington come January. I have high hopes and high aspirations, and I’m determined to be an effective, impactful leader who gets results for New Mexicans over these next two years. My number one priority? Bring good-paying jobs to New Mexico, raise workers’ wages, lower the cost of goods, and increase the quality of life for people in this district. This was a heated toss-up race, but I am here for a reason, and it is to represent the people of New Mexico. I will show up. I will support you. I will listen to you, and we can work together. Thank you for being on this journey with me as I make my way to Congress. Your continued support will power our movement forward as I work to make a positive difference for New Mexico. Viva NM-02! — Gabe | | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and immigrant and civil rights to Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Senator Steven Roberts files legislation to address kids with guns | | | |
---
| | |
# Capitol Report
December 2, 2022
---
|
---
|
---
**Sen. Steven Roberts files legislation to address kids with guns**
JEFFERSON CITY — State Sen. Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis, has pre-filed legislation that would make it an unlawful offense for a minor to possess a concealed firearm or handgun. The offense would be a Class A misdemeanor, but would not include a person under the age of 18 who possesses a concealable firearm or handgun at a shooting range or while under the supervision of a parent, guardian, or adult supervisor.

“Forty-three U.S. states have specific laws against possession by a minor and there is a federal provision prohibiting juveniles from possessing handguns that is enforceable in every U.S. state - except Missouri.” Sen. Roberts said. “The Missouri Legislature’s 2021 passage of the ‘Second Amendment Preservation Act’ means Missouri is the only state in the union to have zero checks on kids who are too young to drive possessing guns. This has tied up our police and made the citizens in our neighborhoods fearful. Fixing this problem makes our communities safer.”

Sen. Steven Roberts has stated that addressing gun violence must be a priority of the Missouri Legislature as lawmakers head into the 2023 Legislative Session.

|

| **Recreational marijuana becomes legal in Missouri on Dec. 8**
Starting Dec. 8, recreational use of marijuana by adults age 21 and over will be legal in Missouri. However, it could be a couple months before Missouri dispensaries will be able to sell marijuana to those who don’t have a medical marijuana card.

With 53.1 percent support, Missouri voters ratified Amendment 3 on Nov. 8 to legalize recreational marijuana for adults. New amendments to the state constitution take effect 30 days after the ratification vote. The approval of recreational marijuana came just four years after voters authorized medical marijuana in 2018 with 65.6 percent support.

Under Amendment 3, those already licensed to cultivate, manufacture or sell medical marijuana can apply to convert their licenses in to “comprehensive” licenses that also cover recreational marijuana. The Missouri Department of Health and Senior Services, which regulates the state’s marijuana industry, has up to 60 days to process conversion requests. As a result, the department must act no later than Feb. 6 on requests filed the first day Amendment 3 takes effect. However, the department has publicly stated it intends to process requests as quickly as possible, which could allow some dispensaries to begin selling recreational marijuana prior to Feb. 6.

Once adult recreational marijuana use and possession becomes generally legal, many restrictions will remain, including a ban on public consumption, with violations punishable by a maximum $100 civil fine. Possession or use by minors also will be subject to a $100 fine. Civil fines for possessing more than 3 ounces of marijuana will range from $250 for a first offense to $1,000 for a third or subsequent offense.
---
|
---
| **Governor appoints his lawyer as next state attorney general**
Gov. Mike Parson plans to appoint Andrew Bailey, a political novice who currently serves as the top attorney in the governor’s office, as Missouri’s next attorney general when incumbent Eric Schmitt steps down in January after being elected to the U.S. Senate last month. Parson announced his choice, which had been rumored for weeks, during a Nov. 23 news conference.

Bailey, 41, has worked as an attorney in Parson’s office since 2019, including the past year as the governor’s general counsel. Bailey graduated from the University of Missouri School of Law in 2012 after serving several years as a U.S. Army officer.

Bailey played a central role in Parson’s decision to falsely accuse a St. Louis Post-Dispatch reporter of criminal hacking in 2021 after the reporter discovered a flaw in a website maintained by Parson’s administration that publicly exposed the Social Security numbers of hundreds of thousands of Missouri teachers. Government records subsequently obtained by news organizations revealed state officials originally intended to publicly thank the reporter before Parson ordered a shift in tone and demanded the reporter’s prosecution.

Parson’s false accusations quickly became national news with technology experts widely mocking the governor’s ignorance of how websites work. Not a single Republican elected official backed Parson’s position in the matter, and the Cole County prosecuting attorney ultimately found no basis for criminal charges. When asked at the news conference about his role, Bailey maintained he still believes state law supported prosecution but acknowledged others reached the opposite conclusion.

Although Bailey said he intends to run for a full term as attorney general in 2024, given that he has never before campaigned for elected office and isn’t widely known in political circles, he could face competition in a Republican primary from more established opponents. Parson said Bailey will have his full backing in his election bid.

Parson will become just the second Missouri governor to twice fill a vacancy in the attorney general’s office. The first was Gov. Samuel A. Baker, a Republican who appointed replacements to post in 1925 and 1928. Parson previously appointed Schmitt to the office in 2018 following Josh Hawley’s election to the U.S. Senate.

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=cc469ec8a6&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.

| **RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY **
Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit:

As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy.

Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that **anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program.**

Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free.

---
|

| **LOW-COST INSULIN** Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the [Eli Lilly and Co. Website](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=a9b22074fd&e=a088917f89).
