clean_body: Senator Steven Roberts files legislation to address kids with guns | | | | | | | Capitol Report December 2, 2022 | | Sen. Steven Roberts files legislation to address kids with guns JEFFERSON CITY — State Sen. Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis, has pre-filed legislation that would make it an unlawful offense for a minor to possess a concealed firearm or handgun. The offense would be a Class A misdemeanor, but would not include a person under the age of 18 who possesses a concealable firearm or handgun at a shooting range or while under the supervision of a parent, guardian, or adult supervisor. “Forty-three U.S. states have specific laws against possession by a minor and there is a federal provision prohibiting juveniles from possessing handguns that is enforceable in every U.S. state - except Missouri.” Sen. Roberts said. “The Missouri Legislature’s 2021 passage of the ‘Second Amendment Preservation Act’ means Missouri is the only state in the union to have zero checks on kids who are too young to drive possessing guns. This has tied up our police and made the citizens in our neighborhoods fearful. Fixing this problem makes our communities safer.” Sen. Steven Roberts has stated that addressing gun violence must be a priority of the Missouri Legislature as lawmakers head into the 2023 Legislative Session. | | Contact Senator Roberts 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329 Jefferson City, MO 65101 (573) 751-4415 Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov | | | | | | | | | | | | Recreational marijuana becomes legal in Missouri on Dec. 8 Starting Dec. 8, recreational use of marijuana by adults age 21 and over will be legal in Missouri. However, it could be a couple months before Missouri dispensaries will be able to sell marijuana to those who don’t have a medical marijuana card. With 53.1 percent support, Missouri voters ratified Amendment 3 on Nov. 8 to legalize recreational marijuana for adults. New amendments to the state constitution take effect 30 days after the ratification vote. The approval of recreational marijuana came just four years after voters authorized medical marijuana in 2018 with 65.6 percent support. Under Amendment 3, those already licensed to cultivate, manufacture or sell medical marijuana can apply to convert their licenses in to “comprehensive” licenses that also cover recreational marijuana. The Missouri Department of Health and Senior Services, which regulates the state’s marijuana industry, has up to 60 days to process conversion requests. As a result, the department must act no later than Feb. 6 on requests filed the first day Amendment 3 takes effect. However, the department has publicly stated it intends to process requests as quickly as possible, which could allow some dispensaries to begin selling recreational marijuana prior to Feb. 6. Once adult recreational marijuana use and possession becomes generally legal, many restrictions will remain, including a ban on public consumption, with violations punishable by a maximum $100 civil fine. Possession or use by minors also will be subject to a $100 fine. Civil fines for possessing more than 3 ounces of marijuana will range from $250 for a first offense to $1,000 for a third or subsequent offense. | | Governor appoints his lawyer as next state attorney general Gov. Mike Parson plans to appoint Andrew Bailey, a political novice who currently serves as the top attorney in the governor’s office, as Missouri’s next attorney general when incumbent Eric Schmitt steps down in January after being elected to the U.S. Senate last month. Parson announced his choice, which had been rumored for weeks, during a Nov. 23 news conference. Bailey, 41, has worked as an attorney in Parson’s office since 2019, including the past year as the governor’s general counsel. Bailey graduated from the University of Missouri School of Law in 2012 after serving several years as a U.S. Army officer. Bailey played a central role in Parson’s decision to falsely accuse a St. Louis Post-Dispatch reporter of criminal hacking in 2021 after the reporter discovered a flaw in a website maintained by Parson’s administration that publicly exposed the Social Security numbers of hundreds of thousands of Missouri teachers. Government records subsequently obtained by news organizations revealed state officials originally intended to publicly thank the reporter before Parson ordered a shift in tone and demanded the reporter’s prosecution. Parson’s false accusations quickly became national news with technology experts widely mocking the governor’s ignorance of how websites work. Not a single Republican elected official backed Parson’s position in the matter, and the Cole County prosecuting attorney ultimately found no basis for criminal charges. When asked at the news conference about his role, Bailey maintained he still believes state law supported prosecution but acknowledged others reached the opposite conclusion. Although Bailey said he intends to run for a full term as attorney general in 2024, given that he has never before campaigned for elected office and isn’t widely known in political circles, he could face competition in a Republican primary from more established opponents. Parson said Bailey will have his full backing in his election bid. Parson will become just the second Missouri governor to twice fill a vacancy in the attorney general’s office. The first was Gov. Samuel A. Baker, a Republican who appointed replacements to post in 1925 and 1928. Parson previously appointed Schmitt to the office in 2018 following Josh Hawley’s election to the U.S. Senate. | | 2022 SENATE BILLS \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility \- Authorizes a property tax credit for certain senior citizens \- Creates new provisions relating to financial institutions \- Modifies the practice of dentistry to include the prescription and administration of vaccines \- Modifies the Show-Me Heroes Program to provide for grants for veteran apprenticeship training programs \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons \- Relating to the legal minimum standard for valuation of insurance policies and contracts \- Creates provisions relating to certificates of moral character for persons convicted of certain offenses \- Modifies provisions relating to travel insurance \- Modifies provisions relating to arrests by private persons \- Modifies provisions relating to wrongful convictions \- Authorizes a tax credit for employers providing educational assistance to employees \- Establishes provisions relating to inquiries of wage ranges \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution processes \- Creates provisions relating to grants to not-for-profit organizations for physical security measures \- Designates "Police Officer Tamarris Bohannon Memorial Bridge" \- Modifies provisions relating to the Municipal Land Reutilization Law - Authorizes a tax credit for contributions made to refugee resource centers - Modifies provisions relating to warrants executed by law enforcement officers \- Designates every November 7th as Victims of Communism Memorial Day \- Authorizes a freeze on property tax assessments for senior citizens | | 2022 CO-SPONSORED BILLS \- Establishes the "Truth in Medicine Act" (Schupp) | | "Signed By Governor" | "Truly Agreed Bills" | | | | | HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19). SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing. Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and . Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov for more information on SBA disaster assistance. | | SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. The Missouri Department of Health and Senior Services hotline can be reached at tel:%20\(877\%20435-8411). | | | | | | RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit: As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy. Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program. Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free. | | LOW-COST INSULIN Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. body:
| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q8-ToMXBXbbSvu0UjXkLKGcHq6SqlYBoIyxGFq7yyxtdftxsvg8nTvwE14qhgiwlWiFa4IqRTyY4AW2S0U_wd0VAHVHK7wCex4jtmvF0kLqSTkJpC4JpxZGcQmqtEK0O93NrCpsiRC4pzb6JuPAaqmcooTA3CC9lntTAFkomY2jql24HqyMPKqrWbsOOdBXZg3af5dlixEXo8Bf2QdbUDGoSF6cHXBLywqqeP0A_PbtSg/3rn/2OjcnMSfS561BjasNb9k9g/h0/DW81orBHBdDt3xALVwGNmhgU-lRydGUZYZR-BxvWWV8)
Peter, Where is 43 greater than 52? The answer is simple: the United States Senate, thanks to Kyrsten Sinema. Yesterday, a *minority* of Senators (42 Republicans plus Joe Manchin) blocked paid sick leave for rail workers as part of a labor deal to prevent a strike. Seven measly sick days, is that too much for workers to ask for? Even several Republicans, including Marco Rubio and Lindsay Graham, sided with Democrats on this issue. That’s how non-controversial this should be. But in the United States Senate, thanks to Kyrsten Sinema’s beloved filibuster, that level of support simply isn’t enough to pass commonsense, fair measures into law. While Sinema voted yes, it’s her opposition to changing the filibuster rules that prevents even measures she claims to support from ever becoming law. Sinema’s beloved filibuster has obstructed common sense measures and progress for everyday Americans time and time again. It has robbed Sinema’s constituents of abortion access, it has enabled Republicans to gut voting rights, it has stymied efforts to make child care more affordable. Every “yes” becomes a “no” unless 10 Republicans agree to end debate. (Technically, that’s what the filibuster is – a refusal to end debate so that a bill can be voted on.) If only Sinema cared half as much about improving the lives of her constituents as she does about currying favor with Republicans and her self-stylized image as a “bipartisan dealmaker,” we’d get a lot more done. Basic freedoms and the quality of life for American families shouldn’t be limited only to what 10 Republicans in the Senate will agree to. [**But Sinema doesn’t care. That’s why we’re fighting hard to make absolutely certain that Sinema’s first term is her last. Chip in now to help us lay the groundwork for a primary challenger in 2024 >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSmylie-0JH3IZaZFgGvmNGATnNVtbHoFoMSdq47l58W2aEPFJWaBR_bmaZtzJEMOM8L8nxaPQBrgMtG2c8Qrfd23PzfvfLaebYMiOcwE-sfhr1m9pmT6vQZzEwKCFwYHvwR2TWvEbfkoABii5P2AnxXubzd6vk22UnRTcv7AFC8UGczHJ6qNpIg_k46emv9oxwAQNoPoAvvbsDPfliFWLO2HAGbyrQ0-Thz7SWZFguSupnN4VmpwxbB0teT4QkNQhzgY7xDihEYV49IWW4oGibFBV3O6_O67F82EwN3k503GTL11ZqjvK6jjSJLTRXIJy/3rn/2OjcnMSfS561BjasNb9k9g/h1/_Sn295QQcBe9mkyVN_R3G5lZQlgICr3JobaoVOoym88) [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSmylie-0JH3IZaZFgGvmNGK69eWCoFeT8SZ94BpnuLrQPii04LvmxLHfwpLjNnaCgApQg5YpIzOUT5u2ITq6Nyp4biZia5dbCoR2jRiaMdbYx5hfAI7X1_jz57JM7zru4XizbTWfoPnwUH-l8rFNO5L5CHvx4i14oiMOVWVokJuG3DSY4jZ43XU0xZ_nK7MmvmnPMwssSsUR_AwmkdED3_iCVS4k-6_3pKbS7YO4Z95A3ZGK-mgSSe1dI5n6tAuRhMcqwIU7ydRXpIgbhiWPt-NAgbrWclriH9QI1Vd7yQdYk_DzlVKsk-5ud6AzxOWep/3rn/2OjcnMSfS561BjasNb9k9g/h2/R1KrAiaqcVO7WBuPJHKsY4Cy-NOBTTnMV0yIKGCrixo) We can elect a better Senator for Arizona with your help, -Primary Sinema | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

clean_body: | | | Peter, Where is 43 greater than 52? The answer is simple: the United States Senate, thanks to Kyrsten Sinema. Yesterday, a minority of Senators (42 Republicans plus Joe Manchin) blocked paid sick leave for rail workers as part of a labor deal to prevent a strike. Seven measly sick days, is that too much for workers to ask for? Even several Republicans, including Marco Rubio and Lindsay Graham, sided with Democrats on this issue. That’s how non-controversial this should be. But in the United States Senate, thanks to Kyrsten Sinema’s beloved filibuster, that level of support simply isn’t enough to pass commonsense, fair measures into law. While Sinema voted yes, it’s her opposition to changing the filibuster rules that prevents even measures she claims to support from ever becoming law. Sinema’s beloved filibuster has obstructed common sense measures and progress for everyday Americans time and time again. It has robbed Sinema’s constituents of abortion access, it has enabled Republicans to gut voting rights, it has stymied efforts to make child care more affordable. Every “yes” becomes a “no” unless 10 Republicans agree to end debate. (Technically, that’s what the filibuster is – a refusal to end debate so that a bill can be voted on.) If only Sinema cared half as much about improving the lives of her constituents as she does about currying favor with Republicans and her self-stylized image as a “bipartisan dealmaker,” we’d get a lot more done. Basic freedoms and the quality of life for American families shouldn’t be limited only to what 10 Republicans in the Senate will agree to. We can elect a better Senator for Arizona with your help, -Primary Sinema | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC | | Sent via . ---
_NOTE: Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s new weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - that you need to know from the week. We will also continue to provide you with the most important events and information about the Indiana Democratic Party, its values, and its leaders._ ___U.S. Senator Mike Braun has been one of Indiana's most ineffective senators in recent memory._ Mike Braun formally filed to run for Indiana governor in the 2024 election year. But, the so-called businessman has not supported Indiana’s economic future while in Washington. Simply look at his “NO” votes on historic investments like the state’s READI program (American Rescue Plan), broadband (Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act), and climate change (Inflation Reduction Act) - to name a few. | Peter, it’s official: voting is underway in our critical runoff Senate race.

With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking:[Will you split $25 or more right now between me and Upset the Setup to keep Georgia blue?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55446955/381732428/94119165?amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=UTS_20221202_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlMzQzNDg1LTczNzItZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=75YQZiQgV8azPB8Tk90hUsl1M6BrY4NinIWJoSUwzu8=)** GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.

name: Rev. Warnock
subject: I’m humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.

|
---
| Peter, it’s official: our critical runoff Senate race is underway.

With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking:[_Will you split $10 or more right now between me and Fight for Progress to keep Georgia blue?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55447193/381733165/748748839?refcode=BLU-FFP-20221202-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdjNjg5NWNiLTczNzItZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4eHwYChZ1CoFqpShwJUvtcftV67Fq01K6EFWwwZMfH0=)**

GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.

**I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans going all-in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks – but we're falling short, and I need your help.**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I’m personally asking you for a favor Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|

---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007942:6uNiz2GeN:m:1:3374012347:0795C5D0DFAAEB035BB67F0D29963D69:r)**

[** Chip in before Midnight -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007942:6uNiz2GeN:m:1:3374012347:0795C5D0DFAAEB035BB67F0D29963D69:r)
We only have a few hours left to pick up the pace. **[If every person reading this email right now would chip in, we'd easily hit our goal.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007942:6uNiz2GeN:m:1:3374012347:0795C5D0DFAAEB035BB67F0D29963D69:r)**

**[So Peter, I'm personally asking you today to chip in to my campaign BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so that we win this critical runoff!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007942:6uNiz2GeN:m:1:3374012347:0795C5D0DFAAEB035BB67F0D29963D69:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007942:6uNiz2GeN:m:1:3374012347:0795C5D0DFAAEB035BB67F0D29963D69:r)

Herschel Walker

body:
| | | Peter, The support Senate Republicans received this election was incredible. Thanks to your help, Conservatives saw a massive voter turnout, _but there’s still much work to be done_.

Now that election season is coming to a close, we need to rebuild our war chest and prepare for 2023. The new Senate convenes in just a few short weeks and we need all the help we can get to start strong and take our country back.

**As of this morning, we remain short of missing our November grassroots goal and we need to catch up. **To make up for lost time, we’re asking every top contributing member to RUSH a donation to help us rebuild.

name: Gwen Moore
subject: You make the difference!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
Thanks to generous supporters like you| | |
---
Peter, Thanks to generous supporters like you, we made history by holding the Senate this November! Because of your determination and support, the “red wave” simply didn’t happen in the House, with the GOP having a razor-thin majority. When we continue to be proactive, we accomplish so much together. **That’s why I want to recognize you, Peter.** We should feel proud that our efforts are creating a government that is more representative of American families than ever before. Now, we must fight forward to make sure our voices are heard. Please come together with Americans from sea to shining sea to stay vigilant and active in the political process. Let’s build on our momentum and make this movement meaningful as we look towards 2024!
---

Together, #WeRepresent! Gwen Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice Stay Connected! Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates!

|
---
The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates! | The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92. = | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress P.O. name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: Where should we start?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
Hi Team, It’s been a whirlwind couple weeks preparing to begin my work representing Colorado’s 7th District in Congress. There’s no time to waste, and I’m already hard at work meeting with my new colleagues, building a team, and learning the ins and outs of Capitol Hill. Throughout our campaign this year, I talked about my commitment to delivering real results to make life better for Colorado families. I fully intend to follow through on that commitment — serving Colorado is a privilege, and I’m going to make every single second count, friend. **[That’s why I would love to hear from you about what you think the most pressing issues facing our nation are. Will you please take a minute to take a short survey and share your perspective with me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55448556/381737339/-917419389?refcode=email_120222_PrioritiesSurvey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTgzOWViNy03NzcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vQTSLS5oxGNUxfW-02m8_yOhrbQFMNvkoB5HzcEht7c=&emci=81678d34-6772-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=3e839eb7-7772-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=19954364)** | | [TAKE SURVEY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55448559/381737341/-917419389?refcode=email_120222_PrioritiesSurvey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTgzOWViNy03NzcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vQTSLS5oxGNUxfW-02m8_yOhrbQFMNvkoB5HzcEht7c=&emci=81678d34-6772-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=3e839eb7-7772-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=19954364)

Across the country on November 8th, we saw voters rally behind Democratic values like the right to choose, the integrity of our democracy, and opportunity for working families.
But none of us were elected to enforce the status quo. For too many Americans, between rising costs and attacks on our basic civil rights, life is harder than it should be. And my colleagues and I were elected to deliver solutions that will make things better than they are today.
**[I am honored and humbled by the opportunity to take on these challenges on behalf of this community that has given me so much, and I would be very grateful if you would take a moment to share your thoughts with me in this pivotal moment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55448561/381737343/-2113143899?refcode=email_120222_PrioritiesSurvey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTgzOWViNy03NzcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vQTSLS5oxGNUxfW-02m8_yOhrbQFMNvkoB5HzcEht7c=&emci=81678d34-6772-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=3e839eb7-7772-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=19954364)**

Brittany

There is one reason we need 51 Senators and re-elect Senator Raphael Warnock, Derek.
_**Joe Manchin**_
_****_This week we saw Joe Manchin cross party lines to vote with Republicans against paid sick leave for rail workers. We can't afford to have a 50-50 Senate when we have Democrats who will not vote along with the Democratic progressive agenda. We need Senators who will fight for our American workers.
**_That's Raphael Warnock._ **
[CLICK HERE IF YOU AGREE WE NEED TO SEND WARNOCK BACK TO CONGRESS](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zNra5tIr9qXBOFThEXgvzdEIjenHbjYHoJrelfzIM04L1Lruo7eHTA-nmpbHM5TknPiT-lP4n6rnh85vivGBihw8hd0Ud0EYeHVv9bu-bQZa5UlzbmvkWUFa9Z3a0B20dy_UcZFOTxCZ5tMsvxY-2RGx2Jt45Bt81NC80grfSkj19Iuxdk4vlUv98ptT9kYWqyS9U_ASUOi6pHB-ux_B2xVeJNvBGXmlN8Mr5xnDxSP_AzaIPZCqH7TGbXB-cTb7A96RvM6yJoIBw67PIn5DKmU9uToR95JOEMUUqkUnntVUY5FNP3LEZYsHtKvRGgIpA/3rn/_Zl8pZaASB2H6C4E641KaA/h1/E1wKBxCKKPGMP5kYuxNZ_Mn7B2chsC8jn9Xys58VNfU)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: The secessionists caved. It wasn’t a foregone conclusion.
body:
Preview of future elections
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4451e097-726f-4eb2-849c-962d7caea6ec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Dear Peter, In the end, **Cochise County, AZ Secessionists Caved. But it wasn't a foregone conclusion.** Yes, **we had a preview of future elections playing out in our courts yesterday, [and it is so important that I produced a video on the subject.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T126bcb2a-b292-4475-a732-fc6d2392d3e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** After a week of defiance, the Cochise County Election Supervisors submitted to a court order and shared their election tallies with the state. And in this particular case, had they not, it would've delivered a congressional seat and additional statewide office in Arizona to Democrats. Not what one might call a logical move. But cultists don't do logic. The problem is--as is so often the case when a few Republicans do something completely bonkers--this is just the canary in the coal mine. A second Arizona County (Mohave) refused to submit at first, and one of its supervisors, when they gave in, said he was doing so "under duress" because he'd have been charged with a felony if he didn't. I guess we all walk around each day not grabbing anything we want from the local grocery store or appropriating that new convertible we always wanted "under duress." _**And it wasn't just Arizona. [As I documented](https://default.salsalabs.org/T658a467d-0627-40a5-be95-4de1824b867b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), this also happened in Pennsylvania's Luzerne County** too, where it took a lawsuit to force the county to share their vote tallies with the state. When does this simply become...secession?_ **Republicans control a lot of small counties, and I don't think any of us are naive enough to think this will stop here.** The number of counties that try to pull something like this may quintuple--or more--with a presidential race at stake in 2024. And what happens if/when Republicans gain enough power to be nihilists in blue or purple counties where it wouldn't hurt their own candidates, but disenfranchises Democrats? As I said, I did a video at my Blue Amp youtube channel on this dangerous development before Cochise County cried uncle (and, yes, I must admit as I joked in the video, would've served them right to lose a House seat because of their actions). It will, sadly, remain incredibly relevant, [and I would love for you to check it out.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf87fb237-5b5b-4567-a515-3b4af41cd44c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) If you like it, [subscribe to the channel ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11a20567-f201-4bab-8604-f09502975612/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)so we can grow its voice and power. Thank you! Cliff

---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb0fb950-775b-43b4-8e9e-2f27fe4455ff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62007927:6rQzn2G5N:m:1:3374627611:32F70CFFCE46AEE9586B4C88B81CA312:r)**

subject: Only four days left!
body:
Early voting is taking place in Georgia and there is work to do! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nuestropac/only-four-days-left?e=b8f90417f9)
---
| |
---
| |
Good afternoon nuestra gente,

Early voting is taking place in Georgia and there is great news. On Monday and Tuesday, the record was broken for early voter turnout in a single day in Georgia. This includes a stunning 1 million ballots already cast!

While this is good news, the [New York Times ](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=8e013df4d6&e=b8f90417f9)has stated it “appears unlikely to match early voting turnout levels from the 2021 runoffs". It is absolutely crucial that we make sure this doesn’t happen.

Nuestro PAC is the largest independent Latino-focused super PAC in the country, bringing culturally competent and carefully crafted messaging and support to turn out Latino voters across all key races. Let's get the job done in Georgia!
[With just four days left in the Georgia runoff, can you chip in to make our outreach to Latino voters possible? ](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=cced9dc9ee&e=b8f90417f9)
---

clean_body: I need your help to flip Georgia RED | I'm reaching out to you because the fate of Georgia and our Country is on the line. Friend, I'm reaching out to you because the fate of Georgia and our Country is on the line. We have the chance to STOP Raphael Warnock from becoming ANOTHER rubber stamp for the disastrous Biden Presidency, but we can't do that without YOUR HELP. I trust you'll step up and do your part to help Republicans take back this Senate seat, which is why I'm activating a just for YOU. We can't leave anything to chance. If we fail now, the far-Left will become emboldened and send America down a dark path that we WILL NOT recover from. We can't waste a single second. This is of the utmost importance. ********** ****SUPPORTER: Friend CONTRIBUTION STATUS: ****PENDING DEADLINE: 1 HOUR**** Thank you and God bless you, Ronna McDaniel Chairwoman, Republican National Committee ** | Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st Street SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Communist China continues to enforce aggressive COVID lockdowns. Brave people are rising up to protest the Communist regime’s top-down control—and the regime is responding with brutal violence. America should support the Chinese people's demands for freedom from tyrannical COVID mandates—and we should all condemn the ruthless Communist leaders who use COVID mandates to strengthen their control. [**Will you join me today and stand up for freedom by signing our pledge today?**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=9d3b30404be94587bb589853f54a57fd&_e=VYUmrl-G0dyDlz1oFo023rantUoRAyw44eCBKGiuavEcAtXzEuW_AoWP1OhtcPCEBybF3HtsTGsXXCIosUmIpiJNlEULkI-nKQjSugvBHQPEzVcNpbrzk7_pI5Wye-8RU4fzov1UCn6FoD3Ny-w4gNCRo0fWPvbT21UCdM75KmmjmIFepqhc_Ij6t2h9vpLEHrJFWhiPfHnX6Gd89mS9_ZL56i64UjKkE4rF2qcLGtN9Be0iOOuSBRfKUueWAwtju2PfEV0lad57RnJZ4XAaXj9Yq_RcpEEf3qYfrpgTWzNZbcffCin_1Vv69YIIRRQ3qnZiUu-_I0QcrIShHCBP-PW9bmDk2oMB2ixLEfL5jcaRk9elZBBeimPrOHyOuxlGzisLYKziJZ8SrmC1XjbFJA%3D%3D)

name: Rev. Warnock
subject: open for puppies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia

Friend, this is exciting: We're just four days away from our runoff election on Dec. 6 – and we launched a brand-new TV ad to make sure the people of Georgia know who I am and what I'm fighting for in the Senate.
You'd think that Herschel Walker would _also_ want to explain what he stands for. But instead, he repeats the same lies – trying to distract from the fact that he's not ready to represent Georgia. But I know if I stay focused on the issues that matter to Georgia families, we'll make voters' choice at the ballot box clear – and we'll win this race. So that's what I intend to do.
**And for the record, I _love_ puppies. (You'll have to watch the ad to understand that part!)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55457481/381747420/-1936314725?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5235-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGE4ZGIxNy04MDcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j0Ldq1SJ9XYGoGuLtl6QiA20EmGCwkVzy5EK7G7VEIY=)
But here's the reality: As we fight to secure this 51st seat in the Senate for Democrats, Mitch McConnell and the GOP are flooding our race with attack ads – _on top of the $58 million_ that Republican donors are pouring into Walker's campaign to turn Georgia red.
**The ONLY way we can fight back against the GOP, keep our critical TV ad on the air, and defend this seat is if grassroots folks like you pitch in right now.**
[**Please, friend, will ****you give $5 or more now to keep our ad on the air, power us to victory in this runoff election, and expand our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55457482/381747421/-1936314725?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5235-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGE4ZGIxNy04MDcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j0Ldq1SJ9XYGoGuLtl6QiA20EmGCwkVzy5EK7G7VEIY=)

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I know we can keep Georgia blue
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, [please click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC1zXjOgMKTq1qg9b7LMk8NY4biyiGBVJXIDelS7m60cKaXwQDfsi6wVlrlpGB5RcgfuIIHe6hd8iOGFvsd6XbH6bPGloasmPsNPOUCpYuDqjrfWXPulk7ACO8jglUSTgxgJKqGJ1qUr55iIbwuSpPtIYLJwldSQ2QdbNlN1f0ASVqVm1cN8cKjP_b_0jgb8vMz90eH7MvXIO2LB9figa9iezHX8NlHmqGa7FlZfKiQl9kyErzTiCtBfKQvYaAEl4IydVQjVAoJOcOymLkuehp78lfpSbnwJ3wxQZ6g6BEab/3rn/jp0ao_svQsGAcAhjjcXVrw/h0/XLk3FPI40LFf09uLG0EWEpwMZqwj6xvfIvvhjRy8JOY) And if you have a moment, please read our message below.
[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE0Vd8nKqW85ZXV9rlZ14r6UtUEfpxpRFiPOSJMuOc_izw712zDLrtY4gsLC5Yo4UdfTaA7hEkM2x106j8KhqPXpwKP7v4jAGbbCem_2cj2y5a7fYZmed76xeFFJydoD82aNmxSnyrJMhYsHCrkAn1DRiyxVvlA5I9Y1HUarMp4mVD4jZhBOdf6ek9H3O9WnkF_xCcd4mW1ayg-59wbLWcdoF-xhZVj7HNX6hgPn6WaZpiqHzc-2qw3whQTfHCz3Twt54lTcyjMtbHh-Kn19fWwA5TRcqYOhwFFgco3psDamep5wxOwCOsN6bzEEfQyfUr58Hj-HbQINxpCXl4zwZSnP68awa5CigrOCIfrzHLXxfe1d7MUn55BfcLvx-3XBOGQZs_Ls7TiSJ9ty8NCm7bIFpOseHDl1J8JBPKbIUltA406G_NeG_rQ872UphFZ3P9iXwpgsU-gffaZEjIbaJ3jccE79MpbpDgbhcXKY3ajAig/3rn/jp0ao_svQsGAcAhjjcXVrw/h1/dSKJL9XeDsNozYTXhtQWHZCXepdzxHGeJ3lkNkAc-00) Rev. Warnock here – I'm feeling good, and I hope you are, too.

Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign – and now, Georgians are voting in our critical runoff election.

Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State – and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue.

**But right now, we’re falling about $15,000 short of our daily fundraising goal – and it’s important we close this gap before midnight.** The GOP has already poured more than $52 million into Georgia to try to buy this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this.

name: Lt. Gen. (Ret.) William G. Boykin, FRC Action
subject: Protect Women’s Sports: Sign the Petition Now!
body:
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3ec89a14a14e426dbcf0f758b413f3ab&_e=Mz0V62RfZpRHUrzD_PXfBHbSKg3uC2v-dk9KXSDmGNbmytVdj6yn3nSgoDanoPssszjLFdOJQfrJYZqI3XewjXg8UMeOzrm-qF101XcFafx4Ip1dCS27yMva_NQszT5qGTjjYUkgOCqbA-Upe-Vjr9dWDvCTko5SfzpChqASE2hoO7nHs8VBlsZPakrd0ffYvXZShd3fNOtuzM67nUm4ig%3D%3D)
---
|
---
Dear Friend, **There is a war on women taking place in this country right at this moment.** For decades, women have fought for their right to equal opportunities in academics and athletics. But in its push to radically redefine the previously undisputed definitions of "man" and "woman," the Left is depriving women of some of their hard-won civil rights gains. Thanks to the current anti-scientific gender identity movement that the far Left is forcing onto our society, biological male athletes who self-identify as women are being allowed to compete in women's athletic competitions. In one prominent example, the NCAA has allowed a biological male swimmer--now going by the name Lia Thomas--to compete in women's competitions, outracing all the biological female competitors at the NCAA women's 500-yard freestyle national championship meet. Far from being the only case of females being bumped off victor podiums by biological males, the Lia Thomas story shines a light on a disturbing cultural trend increasingly permeating women's sports. You and I both know that sex is an immutable biological reality. We must uphold the scientific and biblical meaning of the words "man" and "woman." In doing so, we will protect female athletes from the injustice of being completely driven out of their sports by biological males. Friend, if you agree that biological males should stay out of women's sports**,****[show your support for women athletes by signing the NATIONAL PETITION right now--there is no time to waste.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3ec89a14a14e426dbcf0f758b413f3ab&_e=Mz0V62RfZpRHUrzD_PXfBHbSKg3uC2v-dk9KXSDmGNbmytVdj6yn3nSgoDanoPssOH8QJ8xyr96lEv5T-u78XiA_qOf_DAKar3V1_oepPM3Q17YpnmFpOJQTp0MwRBUnMiguRa8k68PXiDSGHQKMj7xkyFTPArPAzzFY6fct0x4JxsdKMNyzLDJ_MOZmLt1GCE-yvUv-v8flgnqS-AvcyA%3D%3D) **
---
[**Sign to Keep Males out of Women 's Sports**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3ec89a14a14e426dbcf0f758b413f3ab&_e=Mz0V62RfZpRHUrzD_PXfBHbSKg3uC2v-dk9KXSDmGNbmytVdj6yn3nSgoDanoPssypwNRgsiJgPrBRhYidsMUk1B9umAZ2mRvgQmWC7xJ0cbcxRfV9_hHdf2WJH06cEAE9wUBDfrxmgEmyK8fJfM2TLsHnZX9QuKTMIXUYOoyV2JNvPJlGR9EKogHV5yse1wEa_pPHeWh4GnGE8cOIH6JA%3D%3D)
---
| | By allowing biological males to dominate women's athletic competitions, the NCAA has perpetrated an attack on women's and girls' athletic opportunities. This grave injustice is wildly unpopular amongst rational members of society... _yet_ most people are too afraid to speak out against it out of fear of extreme social criticism or political backlash. **One collegiate female athlete said that Thomas ' participation in women**'**s swimming has completely ruined the integrity of the sport, and she finds it disappointing to know that the NCAA lacks the courage to do the right thing.** Title IX prohibits any school that receives federal funding from discriminating on the basis of sex. But instead of ensuring equal treatment of the sexes in all areas--including athletics--some schools are allowing athletes to compete based on what gender they self-identify with. Such a policy undermines the purpose of Title IX. **More importantly, it undermines the American way of life and the principles we stand for --we can't allow it to continue. ** [**Click here to sign the National Petition to STOP BIOLOGICAL MALES FROM COMPETING IN WOMEN 'S SPORTS.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3ec89a14a14e426dbcf0f758b413f3ab&_e=Mz0V62RfZpRHUrzD_PXfBHbSKg3uC2v-dk9KXSDmGNbmytVdj6yn3nSgoDanoPss-VArctUiRLObUgDfZ4kLBE0dMhAo2HfxOPIOz8CBdgP56UJgH3hEHrwv2gJYOk9QsqmR57m1Vy1KMWx2qMzRffwxb9mnzpXcRB1vAqP2fs3__7CuTnVf6gThkNo6blGufW1TwJLGNlHdeMZtue4flw%3D%3D)
---
[**Sign to Keep Males out of Women 's Sports**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3ec89a14a14e426dbcf0f758b413f3ab&_e=Mz0V62RfZpRHUrzD_PXfBHbSKg3uC2v-dk9KXSDmGNbmytVdj6yn3nSgoDanoPsstpc1Y8Rr1FZTE7KwfgmekPMVbsbUjs6SQPQx0Fy0LNKXnzoMXda-lFv0r5Ze9KlizM_4zYUDwFBf-hwTdGn8wJpBL9u1Aeto6NLhuIWg4HFk7nQX2Xn5ZyEAJ7dI1wmJwBFX9NHBe78exdaABoDj9w%3D%3D)
---
It's unlikely that the NCAA has enough sense or courage to admit the harm they have created given that our universities have been overrun by "woke" administrators. So we must make our voices heard. _By signing this petition right away, you will be doing your part as an American citizen to encourage policymakers to take action and protect women_ '_s rights._ We must fight this radical ideological attack against God and human nature. We must work to protect women's rights in sports and society and fight to preserve the scientific and biblical definitions of the sexes. **That** '**s why FRC Action started this petition --to protect young girls and women and continue providing family-centered policy for all branches of government.** [**Add your signature to the rapidly growing list of faithful supporters now. Please sign Family Research Council Action** '**s national petition right away to block men from competing in female sports.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3ec89a14a14e426dbcf0f758b413f3ab&_e=Mz0V62RfZpRHUrzD_PXfBHbSKg3uC2v-dk9KXSDmGNbmytVdj6yn3nSgoDanoPssmD2r79OzoBKhMOTOwsrk1J4tjMfe9tzHPnmxkGTLUf0UOIgdFrri7ttDpA7_CMBApVGsNwNRlXTixvL6c81Bn0rJXuMm_IZviYBcHVu4MV1Trf66pzlnocQ4uBe2ElsCFRHcFxqzji8FC8mtE1syxg%3D%3D)
---
[**Sign to Keep Males out of Women 's Sports**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3ec89a14a14e426dbcf0f758b413f3ab&_e=Mz0V62RfZpRHUrzD_PXfBHbSKg3uC2v-dk9KXSDmGNbmytVdj6yn3nSgoDanoPss_tJTUkA5swVH5n-gQten6ZBKLtpxafwKeSs7nH_OFsmsAVBnvGmWapLuPh8Kz8FMEpyzV_cxHgurnYCHsw-5ErQiNl7POL5hM1syK0qsH_h-H0HEwDf7ttLLzW-A5do5XKdonPAdUiasWbuWb2K1EA%3D%3D)
---
Thank you, and God bless! For America, Lt. Gen. (Ret.) William G. Boykin Executive Vice President Family Research Council Action
---
**_P.S._** President Biden recently spoke in favor of the transgender movement and publicly encouraged more young people to permanently alter their bodies with puberty-blocking drugs, cross-sex hormones, and reassignment surgeries. [**_Please sign the petition right away to help stop this extremely harmful and disturbing trend from progressing any further. _**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3ec89a14a14e426dbcf0f758b413f3ab&_e=Mz0V62RfZpRHUrzD_PXfBHbSKg3uC2v-dk9KXSDmGNbmytVdj6yn3nSgoDanoPsshwajNhJlp6uFjBGK8gRqkPRRM6FMN6LRoDPl6q_KROGdE28QyGckBKWfdzsxKkkPC5-_BlLHFw6i661euewZxpgdfNDKURbNmz1pqPc70j0zXGyYKpvlVI8vMBaX85TdpR4FPwXA4k2h9Yjwpr9oWA%3D%3D)
---

But in its push to radically redefine the previously undisputed definitions of "man" and "woman," the Left is depriving women of some of their hard-won civil rights gains. Thanks to the current anti-scientific gender identity movement that the far Left is forcing onto our society, biological male athletes who self-identify as women are being allowed to compete in women's athletic competitions. In one prominent example, the NCAA has allowed a biological male swimmer--now going by the name Lia Thomas--to compete in women's competitions, outracing all the biological female competitors at the NCAA women's 500-yard freestyle national championship meet. Far from being the only case of females being bumped off victor podiums by biological males, the Lia Thomas story shines a light on a disturbing cultural trend increasingly permeating women's sports. You and I both know that sex is an immutable biological reality. We must uphold the scientific and biblical meaning of the words "man" and "woman." In doing so, we will protect female athletes from the injustice of being completely driven out of their sports by biological males. Friend, if you agree that biological males should stay out of women's sports, | | By allowing biological males to dominate women's athletic competitions, the NCAA has perpetrated an attack on women's and girls' athletic opportunities. This grave injustice is wildly unpopular amongst rational members of society... yet most people are too afraid to speak out against it out of fear of extreme social criticism or political backlash. One collegiate female athlete said that Thomas ' participation in women's swimming has completely ruined the integrity of the sport, and she finds it disappointing to know that the NCAA lacks the courage to do the right thing. Title IX prohibits any school that receives federal funding from discriminating on the basis of sex. But instead of ensuring equal treatment of the sexes in all areas--including athletics--some schools are allowing athletes to compete based on what gender they self-identify with. Such a policy undermines the purpose of Title IX. More importantly, it undermines the American way of life and the principles we stand for --we can't allow it to continue. It's unlikely that the NCAA has enough sense or courage to admit the harm they have created given that our universities have been overrun by "woke" administrators. So we must make our voices heard. By signing this petition right away, you will be doing your part as an American citizen to encourage policymakers to take action and protect women 's rights. We must fight this radical ideological attack against God and human nature. We must work to protect women's rights in sports and society and fight to preserve the scientific and biblical definitions of the sexes. That 's why FRC Action started this petition --to protect young girls and women and continue providing family-centered policy for all branches of government. Thank you, and God bless! For America, Lt. Gen. (Ret.) William G. Boykin Executive Vice President Family Research Council Action P.S. President Biden recently spoke in favor of the transgender movement and publicly encouraged more young people to permanently alter their bodies with puberty-blocking drugs, cross-sex hormones, and reassignment surgeries. | | | FRC Action 801 G Street NW, Washington, D.C. 20001 Family Research Council Action (FRC Action) operates as a social welfare organization organized under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to FRC Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. Your contribution will be used in support of the general mission of FRC Action. name: =?utf-8?Q?Andrew=20Roth?=
subject: This is Bonkers
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
Friends,

Things are busy here at the State Freedom Caucus Network. Here are some of the things we’re working on:

* We helped launch the **Pennsylvania Freedom Caucus** earlier this week. It received tons of coverage. One headline [read](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=05d33a2e50&e=64ecec6d03), “The new Pennsylvania branch of the House Freedom Caucus is open and ready for business.” Another [one](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=666b380e11&e=64ecec6d03): “More compromise with Dems? Not if new Pennsylvania Freedom Caucus has its way”.

* Pennsylvania is now our 8th state freedom caucus. To see the public members of the PAFC and the other states we’re in, please check out [our website](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=41805b77f9&e=64ecec6d03).

* But our favorite was [this reaction](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=f3c1e8bfcd&e=64ecec6d03) from a liberal Democrat: “This is bonkers. This is the most radical, most extreme members of the Republican Caucus banding together, insisting to stall any type of progress,” said Representative Ryan Bizzarro (D-Erie). “What we saw today with the announcement of the Freedom Caucus was nothing more than a cry for attention and a cry for help of a failing Republican caucus that has no direction moving forward. This was nothing more than the grievance caucus.”

* Pennsylvania Congressman Scott Perry, who’s also the chairman of the House Freedom Caucus in DC, was in attendance to help introduce the PA Freedom Caucus. He [said](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=ae57e9fb35&e=64ecec6d03), “We stand for the millions of Americans who feel that government, state capitols, federal capitols have left them behind and they don’t have a voice. We’re bringing that voice.”

* Scroll to the bottom of this email to check out the photos from the PAFC press conference.

* The **Arizona Freedom Caucus** is fighting Maricopa County for their botched handling of the 2022 midterm elections...and they are rightfully demanding resignations. “After taking an absurd and unnecessary amount of time to count ballots, we are now finding Maricopa County election officials may not merely be incompetent but may also be criminals,” said AZFC Chairman, State Rep. Jake Hoffman in [a statement](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7704aa4c62&e=64ecec6d03).

* Hoffman did interviews with [Steve Bannon’s WarRoom](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=975336541e&e=64ecec6d03) and with [The Charlie Kirk Show](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=be793320c6&e=64ecec6d03). More from Hoffman: “What they have done is evil. It is vindictive. And according to the Attorney General it is illegal. The AG's office has outlined a litany of allegedly illegal violations of Arizona election law. This election must not be certified until an exhaustive investigation and complete adjudication of the issues has been permitted to occur.”

* The **Illinois Freedom Caucus** is calling for an end of the “consent calendar”. This may seem like a boring legislative issue, but it’s a very big deal. Big spending politicians love to pass bills through the “consent calendar”. It lets them bundle a ton of bills together and pass them by a single vote. This also means very little debate and little ability to make amendments. This one single move by the ILFC could shut down the consideration and passage of a lot of bad legislation.

* From [their statement](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=fbcf2e503b&e=64ecec6d03), “There is nothing wrong with voting on ceremonial legislation on a single roll call, but substantive bills need to be stricken from the Consent Calendar. It is certainly easier to vote on hundreds of bills on one roll call vote, but this process is not in the best interest of the people of Illinois. Substantive bills deserve individual roll calls so that members are completely aware of the full implication of their votes. The people of Illinois expect legislators to do their jobs and debating and voting on legislation is part of the job. It is time to stop taking the easy way out. It is time to end the Consent Calendar for substantive legislation.”

**Please help us continue to support these brave members of the various state freedom caucuses.**

**For just $10 a month, you can support the State Freedom Caucus Network as it works to fight big government and secure liberty at the state level.

Click **[here](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=44e576d64a&e=64ecec6d03)** to set up your recurring monthly donation now. Even $25 or $50 will make a huge difference.**

**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
**President**
**State Freedom Caucus Network**

P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation’s state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution here](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=f646488a43&e=64ecec6d03) and join us as together we work to advance the cause of liberty.

clean_body: | | | | | | | Friends, Things are busy here at the State Freedom Caucus Network. Here are some of the things we’re working on: We helped launch the Pennsylvania Freedom Caucus earlier this week. It received tons of coverage. One headline , “The new Pennsylvania branch of the House Freedom Caucus is open and ready for business.” Another : “More compromise with Dems? Not if new Pennsylvania Freedom Caucus has its way”. Pennsylvania is now our 8th state freedom caucus. To see the public members of the PAFC and the other states we’re in, please check out . But our favorite was from a liberal Democrat: “This is bonkers. This is the most radical, most extreme members of the Republican Caucus banding together, insisting to stall any type of progress,” said Representative Ryan Bizzarro (D-Erie). “What we saw today with the announcement of the Freedom Caucus was nothing more than a cry for attention and a cry for help of a failing Republican caucus that has no direction moving forward. This was nothing more than the grievance caucus.” Pennsylvania Congressman Scott Perry, who’s also the chairman of the House Freedom Caucus in DC, was in attendance to help introduce the PA Freedom Caucus. He , “We stand for the millions of Americans who feel that government, state capitols, federal capitols have left them behind and they don’t have a voice. We’re bringing that voice.” Scroll to the bottom of this email to check out the photos from the PAFC press conference. The Arizona Freedom Caucus is fighting Maricopa County for their botched handling of the 2022 midterm elections...and they are rightfully demanding resignations. “After taking an absurd and unnecessary amount of time to count ballots, we are now finding Maricopa County election officials may not merely be incompetent but may also be criminals,” said AZFC Chairman, State Rep. Jake Hoffman in . Hoffman did interviews with and with . More from Hoffman: “What they have done is evil. It is vindictive. And according to the Attorney General it is illegal. The AG's office has outlined a litany of allegedly illegal violations of Arizona election law. This election must not be certified until an exhaustive investigation and complete adjudication of the issues has been permitted to occur.” The Illinois Freedom Caucus is calling for an end of the “consent calendar”. This may seem like a boring legislative issue, but it’s a very big deal. Big spending politicians love to pass bills through the “consent calendar”. It lets them bundle a ton of bills together and pass them by a single vote. This also means very little debate and little ability to make amendments. This one single move by the ILFC could shut down the consideration and passage of a lot of bad legislation. From , “There is nothing wrong with voting on ceremonial legislation on a single roll call, but substantive bills need to be stricken from the Consent Calendar. It is certainly easier to vote on hundreds of bills on one roll call vote, but this process is not in the best interest of the people of Illinois. Substantive bills deserve individual roll calls so that members are completely aware of the full implication of their votes. The people of Illinois expect legislators to do their jobs and debating and voting on legislation is part of the job. It is time to stop taking the easy way out. It is time to end the Consent Calendar for substantive legislation.” Please help us continue to support these brave members of the various state freedom caucuses. For just $10 a month, you can support the State Freedom Caucus Network as it works to fight big government and secure liberty at the state level. Click to set up your recurring monthly donation now. Even $25 or $50 will make a huge difference. Keep fighting, Andy Roth President State Freedom Caucus Network P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation’s state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a and join us as together we work to advance the cause of liberty. | "CLICK HERE TO DONATE" | | | | Photos: PennLive - Dan Gleiter. November 28, 2022. | | | | | Copyright © 2022 State Freedom Caucus Network, All rights reserved.

subject: The Great Reset and American liberty
body:
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=665e80e1f00e43c7a63e46d09e77cb90&_e=2Ra5wDdsE8jOUmxnbM32QHUkBaTpWv0hfVxhxcqtSkxFPsad9x1ZXPVN2A377k9tzbwiP03u3qjeYSjt8pvGhJHZ4y4z6HgktqvQ5ci2Xme7Zo8SyGl5qOCyVU1sii66vhRSXG-M9lhpmpZU5Qy4uFMvU3xlxrsG5hu56c4NdyswjfcpYZBHLk23UEUOI1nMi4wj3gQA_GRV83UXIGuqBh4BykdZCVHT_nh4JJc0ExM0AaX3E2zwGBCOdbMf2EEf9eNNd9wGeQBurRMdeCtXqiJfwAOCQQxMSvQH4NFFhJjl323Lk7uTdnpju8ilRm7fedddqFC9iS9ucvchYoc4H8JMW5zZKYJGi582NjrUD5dmnzeKySeA63CwBwfca56n)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Does America need a "Great Reset?"
In 2020, members of the world's elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy.
As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "we need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life.
A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives.
**This seminar --titled ["The Great Reset?](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=665e80e1f00e43c7a63e46d09e77cb90&_e=2Ra5wDdsE8jOUmxnbM32QHUkBaTpWv0hfVxhxcqtSkxFPsad9x1ZXPVN2A377k9tzbwiP03u3qjeYSjt8pvGhJHZ4y4z6HgktqvQ5ci2Xme7Zo8SyGl5qOCyVU1sii66vhRSXG-M9lhpmpZU5Qy4uFMvU3xlxrsG5hu56c4NdyswjfcpYZBHLk23UEUOI1nMi4wj3gQA_GRV83UXIGuqBh4BykdZCVHT_nh4JJc0ExNdgZlbh8ID_oOVr3KP748TYcpuqiAu74RLO9oABhqCY_lN_-bjtNkdZ23Ziz7bJxd-omSkMwdR3QpLOyUilvpMDGB3kZW2_df0BJvkFNDVNSGVRtZGVAsbqgDsVXhlW_gtuHmgajigmghkEMJ3cfzb)****["](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=665e80e1f00e43c7a63e46d09e77cb90&_e=2Ra5wDdsE8jOUmxnbM32QHUkBaTpWv0hfVxhxcqtSkxFPsad9x1ZXPVN2A377k9tzbwiP03u3qjeYSjt8pvGhJHZ4y4z6HgktqvQ5ci2Xme7Zo8SyGl5qOCyVU1sii66vhRSXG-M9lhpmpZU5Qy4uFMvU3xlxrsG5hu56c4NdyswjfcpYZBHLk23UEUOI1nMi4wj3gQA_GRV83UXIGuqBh4BykdZCVHT_nh4JJc0ExOrWi4lSUkrLNOBsDRbVAGB2kh-qLs3gaj9kAWKgeFEP1aMRU_Q4iDixg-w-lQkCvdtCvhXKD45Kvr8xtUunD5oUUrSYiHFKYvOE43nn7BuZcp4fSU_T15THaWSlXv8fSE_vestKar3-PKTMoI-TkYH) --is now available as a free online video series.**

subject: One Last Ask on Behalf of Ed Thelander
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by The Committee to Elect Ed Thelander for Congress, Inc
body:
It was almost a year ago I met Ed and Liliana Thelander. I have come to know them as two of the kindest, most generous people I have ever met. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/thelanderforcongress/after-action-report-9250310?e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| | [ ](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=0fbc07f4b9&e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
# ONE LAST ASK
---
| | Hi All,

I’ll be brief.

It was almost a year ago I met Ed and Liliana Thelander. In that time, I have come to know them as two of the kindest, most generous and patriotic people I have ever met. They do not know I am sending this e-mail.

Ed and I have become pretty good friends. Being a Navy SEAL, Ed is not one to readily ask for help, being much more accustomed to offering his help wherever it is needed. That’s why I feel compelled to send this message on his behalf.

The entire Thelander family sacrificed much during the campaign – time spent apart, missed family outings, parentless soccer games, fewer family meals – and I’m sure many more things than I am aware of. But they also sacrificed financially.

Ed personally loaned the campaign a fair amount of money, being one to leave it all on the field. The fact is, Ed put more money into the campaign than the RNC, the NRCC and the Maine GOP, combined! I send this request, One Last Ask, to help Ed and his family move forward as whole as they came into this effort.

So, as Ed’s friend, I ask you to please consider hitting that red donate button one more time. Let’s all help Ed and his family close the books on a hard-fought race, and on solid footing to hit the ground running in 2023. The battle may not have turned out the way we had hoped, but no one can say that the war for the future of Maine and America is over. We will need soldiers like Ed to win!

Thank you for your kind consideration,
**-MWP**

Michael W. Pajak
Political Director
Thelander for Congress
---
|
---
| [One Last Ask - THANK YOU!](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=6d0d9b3435&e=f8a0a76a2b "One Last Ask - THANK YOU!")
---
|
---
|
---

The entire political world has descended on Georgia. clean_body: The entire political world has descended on Georgia. | Fellow American, Here we go again. The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia will - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted. However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance. The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, so the 80,000+ votes he received on November 8th are up for grabs. This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes. The entire political world has descended on Georgia. Democrats are spending hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. We need your help RIGHT NOW to fund our 'Get-Out-The-Vote' advertising. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Pete Maysmith, LCV Victory Fund
subject: Georgia run-off -- early voting is underway. Herschel Walker could win -- we need your help:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LCV Victory Fund, www
body:
(TIME SENSITIVE)? ? ? ? ? 3X MATCH ACTIVE: Help us defeat Big Oil this November >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/x_
Peter ? this is bad ? really bad. We've just received word that a major right-wing Super PAC has dropped $5 million into the Arizona Senate race, where Senator Mark Kelly is up against venture capital executive Blake Masters.

Mark Kelly is an environmental champion who just helped secure the most significant climate investment in history. Blake Masters is a climate change denier who's backed by white supremacists.

This move follows a poll that puts the race within two points. Masters' political backers see a window to swing this Senate race, and they've jumped on it. What's more: the same Super PAC has spent millions on the Senate race in Georgia for Herschel Walker to defeat Senator Raphael Warnock.

Peter: Bottom line, we need your help. Environmental field operations are still underfunded, and a group of donors has put together an emergency match fund to triple every contribution. We have to move now or we could lose these races.

Your support is needed to secure important wins from climate candidates in November. TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT when you make a gift of any amount ? even $5 makes a difference >>> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/8wqzCNw4-

We have a goal to knock on 161,875 doors in Arizona, and a total of 1.17 million doors in critical swing states including Nevada, New Hampshire, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin. And we have digital ads running in support of dozens of pro-environmental candidates, which we'll continue leading up to the election.

Study after study shows that speaking with voters through field organizing is the best way to connect with voters about where candidates stand on critical issues ? and get them to turn out on Election Day.

We're scaling up on-the-ground canvassing operations, getting folks to sign commit-to-vote cards, and helping them sign up to vote by mail. And we're encouraging voters to commit to reminding three friends or family members to vote, a tactic called "Vote Tripling."

We're looking for fellow environmentalists like you, Peter, to help us continue our canvassing efforts and get pro-climate candidates elected in November. Can you chip in?

Every single vote counts. Please, pitch in ? ANY amount can really make a difference right now, even if it's just $5. This could be the difference between ensuring an environmental majority or setting us back indefinitely >> https://links.messages.lcv.

Help defeat Blake Masters and the other Big Oil candidates running this election cycle. Our future depends on it.

Onward,

Pete Maysmith
Senior VP of Campaigns
LCV Victory Fund

name: Congressman-elect Tom Kean, Jr.
subject: Quick Update From Congressional Orientation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc _Copyright © 2022 Kean for Congress_
body:
We've been working hard the past few weeks to hit the ground running on January 3rd. | | |
---
[](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=a34fa4aac3f44c4c8be7e5e25fc6415d&_e=LrUzIfZ929IZdRVEBbsiph3QwNTbPLHmpXMOY252Sq0GsZ8-3Wt3TWDbMEkcSLAEH1QI5KTrFqhIyl9d24fsnlpH368u9PQuGp-BnaYcGUwLM1QbJ0XqKduflssqOsG6avKr22wojLZDMahEUV0xdl0S6WPcL896ESzcbxRZT_4PoklIn4BCh72rUaoMPYsQ)
---
| | Friend, As I finish up my final day of New Member Orientation in Washington, DC, I wanted to reach out and update you on our work the past few weeks here. I have learned a lot, met many new people and have begun advocating for our needs in NJ-7. My team and I have been hard at work organizing and setting up an office that is ready to serve on Day 1. We are committed to providing the very best constituent services that are both easily accessible and effective for everyone in our district. Meeting all of my new colleagues from across the country has been an amazing experience. They are Americans from every corner of the country and every walk of life. I have already begun sharing NJ-7's priorities and have taken the time to better understand what is important to them and their constituents. I am confident that our district's voice will be heard in this Congress. This incoming class has been given an opportunity to change the course of history. We have a lot of important work ahead of us, and I am excited to hit the ground running on January 3rd!

clean_body: We've been working hard the past few weeks to hit the ground running on January 3rd. | | | | | Friend, As I finish up my final day of New Member Orientation in Washington, DC, I wanted to reach out and update you on our work the past few weeks here. I have learned a lot, met many new people and have begun advocating for our needs in NJ-7. My team and I have been hard at work organizing and setting up an office that is ready to serve on Day 1. We are committed to providing the very best constituent services that are both easily accessible and effective for everyone in our district. Meeting all of my new colleagues from across the country has been an amazing experience. They are Americans from every corner of the country and every walk of life. I have already begun sharing NJ-7's priorities and have taken the time to better understand what is important to them and their constituents. I am confident that our district's voice will be heard in this Congress. This incoming class has been given an opportunity to change the course of history. We have a lot of important work ahead of us, and I am excited to hit the ground running on January 3rd! Be Safe, Tom Kean, Jr.Congressman-elect, NJ-07 | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2022 Kean for Congress

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=2785855bbb94480d8f57fb45a3fc5294&_e=PGXlQgUP4CDfUA3aIWbYb1KYOHa75P6WG5Utt8L_N_3g4gMHwZ4hgrusUdBPh4HoolVFm2lL5Mj7Chs_OVlMZ1i-DzfUbQB5zjuygGBsQIBGkjo75SDLs7Hu_SFaHLfsuwBy5b-3AIiycRo8O8zWGUZOoy8Osc_uur8Ld2WgYylwBGSxp-fegFF5cO0zNtwNsODk4WiTAHc8ZYGWnkN92XY1IiCjj1w8fo0BlsNodlzBWRV6pRQeLmITGJJYKRSyuaP39PlueiXNVBdA4fg4wBg1DXf0ec5zzjVuBvyuGhVHnPKqK1O0uzflhiwd644KY3EXmRqsR5nZ7BBKTp2UXm8nX2swwI1fJN3ph7wFbDRc8xLE7BsCfnFth_0WG5tPAjCZGRaYVzmGqUlhcWYKwMW_fNSXcoJ-2V5d13NppKf3Xio4nbF8D3jLMIZIqg7h)

Peter,

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Georgia on my mind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Rev. Raphael Warnock has done everything possible to win his race and continue representing Georgians in the Senate. Tuesday’s runoff will be his fourth statewide election in just 2 years to finally secure a full Senate term.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1414%2E5257348%2E4bWG1L)
Derek, let’s lay it all out on the table:
Rev. Raphael Warnock has done everything possible to win his race and continue representing Georgians in the Senate. **Tuesday’s runoff will be his fourth statewide election in just 2 years to finally secure a full Senate term.**
He is Georgia’s first Black senator. His victory on January 5, 2021 is the reason why Democrats secured our Senate majority and were able to confirm Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson as the first Black woman on the Supreme Court.
Rev. Warnock is a _history maker._ And many more good things will come from him being in the Senate. They already have.
**[If you’re as fired up as I am to re-elect Rev. Raphael Warnock to the Senate and defeat Trump’s handpicked, hypocritical, disastrous Republican nominee Herschel Walker, then I’m asking you to split a $10 donation to Rev. Warnock’s campaign and ours now.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em_warnock.fJ5pfg&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221202_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1414%2E5257348%2E4bWG1L)**
But if you need any more reason to support his race, I’ve got three:
**West Virginia. Ohio. Montana.**
Three vulnerable seats — in states Donald Trump won both in 2016 and 2020 — that Democrats **must** defend and win in 2024.
If Herschel Walker wins Georgia, we will have zero margin for error in these states and many others — including the battlegrounds of Pennsylvania, Michigan, Wisconsin, Arizona, and Nevada.
All are sure to see hundreds of millions of dollars in combined spending from Mitch McConnell’s super PAC to defeat Democratic incumbents.
**The first fight for the Senate majority in 2024 is happening this Tuesday in Georgia, and Rev. Warnock needs our support, so please:**
**[Split $10 or any amount you can spare to Rev. Warnock’s campaign and ours to help him win Georgia and be Democrats’ 51st vote in the Senate.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em_warnock.fJ5pfg&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221202_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1414%2E5257348%2E4bWG1L)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Raphael Warnock and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:_

body:
The entire political world has descended on Georgia. |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=09264052eddc46f2a5fffe4a43414a8b&_e=EH3jSROXvmq4hGaSLx7gTBH8dZyRY3znaRCsCcMkBgxcaevJ_PWGkN4bqbe-AiyL63uT69F40yYlPCUopDtOONqlawEKlKlsml7a4AeGxDhUqiTTJwmiMhfH5lETnr_gKp23YqrB_00Sy0BPPHOdIp0BsQJV8QndIF0uUwmOTTLfgzRg_YrLpQPDLXedYAQ2V9yQUDEk1vkUH5BZA4vW3CbMHcGBWcU76b-ectFgRC7hTmIAVVhJoiiBr86NPnF99m7-hCpjfpS-6NbJMfz8NbE9MCPwGsk1djNl5UE-L6nBNKt-ppPoSo6g4OQBh8Hxin8XBJ2pEqrbIaeDSjtMrRD4ZacFYA_VARi1Y_7mHyNBlhfCoLxg1ex8lrjLi-frC9CP24K3YwEarT5DlOnleGIskFdaZtkWNGy0Zu_cuYT95ScaRWp7jSwp6E_dTd8N6nevvDHCJPwLIZPkOU8YPA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia will - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now?
